source: On a steaming, misty afternoon, Mr. Lorry sat at his desk, and Charles Darnay stood leaning on it, talking with him in a low voice. The penitential den once set apart for interviews with the House, was now the news-Exchange, and was filled to overflowing. It was within half an hour or so of the time of closing.
domestication: 那是一个下午，天气闷热，雾气弥漫。洛里先生坐在桌子旁边，夏尔·丹雷则斜靠在桌上，低声与他交谈。曾经用于会见贵族的忏悔室，如今已变成了新闻交易所，里面挤满了人。离关门的时间只剩下大约半个小时左右，房间里热闹非凡。
foreignization: 在一个雾气弥漫的下午，劳里先生坐在他的办公桌旁，夏尔·丹雷靠在桌子上，用低沉的声音与他交谈。曾经被指定为与众议院接洽的忏悔室，现在变成了新闻交流中心，里面已经满满当当的。离关门的时间只有大约半个小时左右。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On a steaming, misty afternoon, Mr. Lorry sat at his desk, and Charles Darnay stood leaning on it, talking with him in a low voice. The penitential den once set apart for interviews with the House, was now the news-Exchange, and was filled to overflowing. It was within half an hour or so of the time of closing.
那是一个下午，天气闷热，雾气弥漫。洛里先生坐在桌子旁边，夏尔·丹雷则斜靠在桌上，低声与他交谈。曾经用于会见贵族的忏悔室，如今已变成了新闻交易所，里面挤满了人。离关门的时间只剩下大约半个小时左右，房间里热闹非凡。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On a steaming, misty afternoon, Mr. Lorry sat at his desk, and Charles Darnay stood leaning on it, talking with him in a low voice. The penitential den once set apart for interviews with the House, was now the news-Exchange, and was filled to overflowing. It was within half an hour or so of the time of closing.
在一个雾气弥漫的下午，劳里先生坐在他的办公桌旁，夏尔·丹雷靠在桌子上，用低沉的声音与他交谈。曾经被指定为与众议院接洽的忏悔室，现在变成了新闻交流中心，里面已经满满当当的。离关门的时间只有大约半个小时左右。

source: It was a hard day, that day of being among them, with the first reservation of their joint lives on his mind. It was a hard matter to preserve the innocent deceit of which they were profoundly unsuspicious. But, an affectionate glance at his wife, so happy and busy, made him resolute not to tell her what impended (he had been half moved to do it, so strange it was to him to act in anything without her quiet aid), and the day passed quickly. Early in the evening he embraced her, and her scarcely less dear namesake, pretending that he would return by-and-bye (an imaginary engagement took him out, and he had secreted a valise of clothes ready), and so he emerged into the heavy mist of the heavy streets, with a heavier heart.
domestication: 那天他和他们在一起，心里总觉得很沉重，因为他还没告诉他们，他和妻子共同生活的前景已经有了变化。他觉得很难保守这个秘密，装作若无其事的样子，因为他的妻子完全没有察觉到任何异常。但每当他看到妻子高兴地忙碌的样子，他就下定决心不告诉她即将发生的事情（他曾经动摇过，想要坦白，因为平时他习惯在妻子的帮助下处理事情）。就这样，时间飞逝，白天很快过去了。到了晚上早些时候，他拥抱了妻子和他们的孩子，假装说他一会儿就会回来（其实他是借故离开，并且已经悄悄打包好了行李），然后他走进了雾气弥漫的街道，他的心比这雾还要沉重。
foreignization: 那天和他们一起度过的日子很艰难，他脑海中始终有他们共同生活中的第一道阴影。维持他们深信不疑的无辜欺骗，对他来说是一个艰难的事情。但是，对他幸福而忙碌的妻子的充满爱意的一瞥，使他下定决心不告诉她即将发生的事情（他已经有一半想这样做了，这对他来说如此陌生，因为他从来没有在任何事情上没有她的安静帮助），于是这一天很快就过去了。傍晚时分，他拥抱了他的妻子和他几乎同样亲切的同名人，假装说他一会儿就会回来（一个虚构的约会使他出门，他已经悄悄准备了一只装好衣服的箱子），于是他走进了沉重的雾气弥漫的街道，带着更加沉重的心情。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It was a hard day, that day of being among them, with the first reservation of their joint lives on his mind. It was a hard matter to preserve the innocent deceit of which they were profoundly unsuspicious. But, an affectionate glance at his wife, so happy and busy, made him resolute not to tell her what impended (he had been half moved to do it, so strange it was to him to act in anything without her quiet aid), and the day passed quickly. Early in the evening he embraced her, and her scarcely less dear namesake, pretending that he would return by-and-bye (an imaginary engagement took him out, and he had secreted a valise of clothes ready), and so he emerged into the heavy mist of the heavy streets, with a heavier heart.

那天他和他们在一起，心里总觉得很沉重，因为他还没告诉他们，他和妻子共同生活的前景已经有了变化。他觉得很难保守这个秘密，装作若无其事的样子，因为他的妻子完全没有察觉到任何异常。但每当他看到妻子高兴地忙碌的样子，他就下定决心不告诉她即将发生的事情（他曾经动摇过，想要坦白，因为平时他习惯在妻子的帮助下处理事情）。就这样，时间飞逝，白天很快过去了。到了晚上早些时候，他拥抱了妻子和他们的孩子，假装说他一会儿就会回来（其实他是借故离开，并且已经悄悄打包好了行李），然后他走进了雾气弥漫的街道，他的心比这雾还要沉重。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

It was a hard day, that day of being among them, with the first reservation of their joint lives on his mind. It was a hard matter to preserve the innocent deceit of which they were profoundly unsuspicious. But, an affectionate glance at his wife, so happy and busy, made him resolute not to tell her what impended (he had been half moved to do it, so strange it was to him to act in anything without her quiet aid), and the day passed quickly. Early in the evening he embraced her, and her scarcely less dear namesake, pretending that he would return by-and-bye (an imaginary engagement took him out, and he had secreted a valise of clothes ready), and so he emerged into the heavy mist of the heavy streets, with a heavier heart.

那天和他们一起度过的日子很艰难，他脑海中始终有他们共同生活中的第一道阴影。维持他们深信不疑的无辜欺骗，对他来说是一个艰难的事情。但是，对他幸福而忙碌的妻子的充满爱意的一瞥，使他下定决心不告诉她即将发生的事情（他已经有一半想这样做了，这对他来说如此陌生，因为他从来没有在任何事情上没有她的安静帮助），于是这一天很快就过去了。傍晚时分，他拥抱了他的妻子和他几乎同样亲切的同名人，假装说他一会儿就会回来（一个虚构的约会使他出门，他已经悄悄准备了一只装好衣服的箱子），于是他走进了沉重的雾气弥漫的街道，带着更加沉重的心情。

source: The sunset struck so brilliantly into the travelling carriage when it gained the hill-top, that its occupant was steeped in crimson. “It will die out,” said Monsieur the Marquis, glancing at his hands, “directly.”
domestication: 当马车爬上山顶时，夕阳的余晖一下子照了进来，把车厢照得通红。坐车里的人顿时被映得满身血红。“不一会儿就会暗下去的，”马奎斯先生抬头看了看自己的双手，说道。
foreignization: 当马车登上山顶时，夕阳的光线照射进来，如此耀眼地照亮了正在行驶的马车，以至于车内的人被笼罩在深红色之中。“它会很快消退，”马基斯先生说着，看了看自己的双手，“马上就会。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The sunset struck so brilliantly into the travelling carriage when it gained the hill-top, that its occupant was steeped in crimson. “It will die out,” said Monsieur the Marquis, glancing at his hands, “directly.”
当马车爬上山顶时，夕阳的余晖一下子照了进来，把车厢照得通红。坐车里的人顿时被映得满身血红。“不一会儿就会暗下去的，”马奎斯先生抬头看了看自己的双手，说道。

source: That was done too, and the Marquis went on with his supper. He was half way through it, when he again stopped with his glass in his hand, hearing the sound of wheels. It came on briskly, and came up to the front of the chateau.
domestication: 这事也办完了，马基斯继续吃他的晚饭。他快吃完的时候，又一次停下来，端着酒杯，听到了马车轮子的声音。声音越来越近，很快就开到城堡门口来了。
foreignization: 那件事也办完了，马奎斯继续吃他的晚餐。他吃到一半的时候，又一次停下来，手里拿着酒杯，听到轮子的声音。那声音响亮地传来，并且开到城堡的前面。

source: As he held her to his heart and turned her beautiful head between his face and the brawling crowd, so that his tears and her lips might come together unseen, a few of the people fell to dancing. Instantly, all the rest fell to dancing, and the courtyard overflowed with the Carmagnole. Then, they elevated into the vacant chair a young woman from the crowd to be carried as the Goddess of Liberty, and then swelling and overflowing out into the adjacent streets, and along the river’s bank, and over the bridge, the Carmagnole absorbed them every one and whirled them away.
domestication: 当他把她搂在怀里，转过她那美丽的头，隔开了自己和喧闹的人群，以便自己的眼泪和她的嘴唇可以在无人注意中相遇时，有几个人开始跳舞了。瞬间，所有其他人都加入其中，整个庭院里都沸腾着卡马戈尔舞的热潮。接着，他们从人群中抬出一位年轻女子，把她当作自由女神一样抬到了空着的椅子上，接着这股人潮像洪水一样溢出到邻近的街道、河岸、桥梁上，卡马戈尔舞席卷了每一个人，将他们都带走了。整个场面，就像一股狂潮般不可阻挡。
foreignization: 当他紧紧抱着她，将她的美丽头部转向自己和喧闹的人群之间，以便他的眼泪和她的嘴唇可以不被人看到地相遇时，一些人开始跳舞。瞬间，所有其他人都开始跳舞，院子里充满了卡马尼奥尔舞。然后，他们从人群中抬起一个年轻的女人，让她坐在空椅子上，被当作自由女神抬着，接着，人群像波浪般涌出，流向邻近的街道，沿着河岸，跨过桥梁，卡马尼奥尔舞席卷了他们每一个人，并将他们旋转着带走。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As he held her to his heart and turned her beautiful head between his face and the brawling crowd, so that his tears and her lips might come together unseen, a few of the people fell to dancing. Instantly, all the rest fell to dancing, and the courtyard overflowed with the Carmagnole. Then, they elevated into the vacant chair a young woman from the crowd to be carried as the Goddess of Liberty, and then swelling and overflowing out into the adjacent streets, and along the river’s bank, and over the bridge, the Carmagnole absorbed them every one and whirled them away.

source: “You are good enough to say so, as a fashion of speech; but, I don’t mean any fashion of speech. Indeed, when I say I wish we might be friends, I scarcely mean quite that, either.”
domestication: 你说我够朋友，纯属客气话罢了，我不是这个意思。当我说希望我们能成为朋友的时候，其实也不完全是这个意思。
foreignization: “你说得够好了，只是用一种说话的方式；但是我不是那个意思的时尚表达方式。的确，当我说我希望我们能成为朋友的时候，我几乎也不完全是这个意思。”

source: He did not take the identification as a compliment; but he made the best of it, and turned it off with a laugh. After sipping his cognac to the end, he added:

source: The Doctor looked at him for a moment—half inquiringly, half as if he were angry at being spoken to—and bent over his work again.
domestication: 医生看了他一眼，有点像在问他什么，又像是在对他说话时心中不满，随后又低头继续干活。
foreignization: 医生看着他一会儿，半是询问的神情，半是好像被人搭话而生气的样子，然后又弯下腰去继续工作。

source: He occupied rooms in the Bank, in his fidelity to the House of which he had grown to be a part, like strong root-ivy. It chanced that they derived a kind of security from the patriotic occupation of the main building, but the true-hearted old gentleman never calculated about that. All such circumstances were indifferent to him, so that he did his duty. On the opposite side of the courtyard, under a colonnade, was extensive standing—for carriages—where, indeed, some carriages of Monseigneur yet stood. Against two of the pillars were fastened two great flaring flambeaux, and in the light of these, standing out in the open air, was a large grindstone: a roughly mounted thing which appeared to have hurriedly been brought there from some neighbouring smithy, or other workshop. Rising and looking out of window at these harmless objects, Mr. Lorry shivered, and retired to his seat by the fire. He had opened, not only the glass window, but the lattice blind outside it, and he had closed both again, and he shivered through his frame.
domestication: 他占据了银行大楼的一些房间，就像根深蒂固的常春藤一样，他已经成为银行大家庭中不可或缺的一部分。他从来没去想自己这样做到底有什么好处，只是觉得这样才算对得起自己的良心。其实，他们占领银行大楼还能让他们得到一些安全保障，但这位老先生可不管那么多，他只认死理，认为自己有职责在身。就在庭院的另一边，有一排车棚，几辆贵族的马车还停在那里。两根石柱上各挂着一个大火炬，在火光照耀下，一块大磨刀石赫然摆在空地上。这东西看起来像是匆忙从附近的铁匠铺或者其他什么作坊里搬来的，显得很粗糙。洛里先生站起来，走到窗前看着这些东西，禁不住打了个寒战，赶紧退回到火炉旁边。刚才他打开了窗玻璃，还推开了外面的百叶窗，这会儿又把它们都关上了，仍旧感到浑身发抖。
foreignization: 他居住在银行的一些房间里，出于对这栋房子的忠诚，他已经像强壮的常春藤一样成为其中的一部分。他碰巧从银行大楼的爱国主义占领中获得了一种安全感，但这位真心的老先生从不考虑这些事情。所有这些情况对于他来说都是无所谓的，只要他能完成他的职责就行。在庭院的另一侧，在一排柱廊下，有一个广阔的停车场——那里确实还停着蒙西尼尔的一些马车。两根柱子上挂着两盏巨大的火炬，在它们的光线下，站在露天的地方，是一个大磨刀石：一个粗糙安装的东西，看起来像是匆忙地从附近的铁匠铺或者其他工作室里搬来的。洛里先生站起来，从窗口向外望着这些无害的物品，打了个寒战，然后退回到壁炉旁边的座位。他不仅打开了玻璃窗，还打开了外面的格子百叶窗，随后又关闭了它们，他浑身发抖。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He occupied rooms in the Bank, in his fidelity to the House of which he had grown to be a part, like strong root-ivy. It chanced that they derived a kind of security from the patriotic occupation of the main building, but the true-hearted old gentleman never calculated about that. All such circumstances were indifferent to him, so that he did his duty. On the opposite side of the courtyard, under a colonnade, was extensive standing—for carriages—where, indeed, some carriages of Monseigneur yet stood. Against two of the pillars were fastened two great flaring flambeaux, and in the light of these, standing out in the open air, was a large grindstone: a roughly mounted thing which appeared to have hurriedly been brought there from some neighbouring smithy, or other workshop. Rising and looking out of window at these harmless objects, Mr. Lorry shivered, and retired to his seat by the fire. He had opened, not only the glass window, but the lattice blind outside it, and he had closed both again, and he shivered through his frame.

他占据了银行大楼的一些房间，就像根深蒂固的常春藤一样，他已经成为银行大家庭中不可或缺的一部分。他从来没去想自己这样做到底有什么好处，只是觉得这样才算对得起自己的良心。其实，他们占领银行大楼还能让他们得到一些安全保障，但这位老先生可不管那么多，他只认死理，认为自己有职责在身。就在庭院的另一边，有一排车棚，几辆贵族的马车还停在那里。两根石柱上各挂着一个大火炬，在火光照耀下，一块大磨刀石赫然摆在空地上。这东西看起来像是匆忙从附近的铁匠铺或者其他什么作坊里搬来的，显得很粗糙。洛里先生站起来，走到窗前看着这些东西，禁不住打了个寒战，赶紧退回到火炉旁边。刚才他打开了窗玻璃，还推开了外面的百叶窗，这会儿又把它们都关上了，仍旧感到浑身发抖。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He occupied rooms in the Bank, in his fidelity to the House of which he had grown to be a part, like strong root-ivy. It chanced that they derived a kind of security from the patriotic occupation of the main building, but the true-hearted old gentleman never calculated about that. All such circumstances were indifferent to him, so that he did his duty. On the opposite side of the courtyard, under a colonnade, was extensive standing—for carriages—where, indeed, some carriages of Monseigneur yet stood. Against two of the pillars were fastened two great flaring flambeaux, and in the light of these, standing out in the open air, was a large grindstone: a roughly mounted thing which appeared to have hurriedly been brought there from some neighbouring smithy, or other workshop. Rising and looking out of window at these harmless objects, Mr. Lorry shivered, and retired to his seat by the fire. He had opened, not only the glass window, but the lattice blind outside it, and he had closed both again, and he shivered through his frame.

他居住在银行的一些房间里，出于对这栋房子的忠诚，他已经像强壮的常春藤一样成为其中的一部分。他碰巧从银行大楼的爱国主义占领中获得了一种安全感，但这位真心的老先生从不考虑这些事情。所有这些情况对于他来说都是无所谓的，只要他能完成他的职责就行。在庭院的另一侧，在一排柱廊下，有一个广阔的停车场——那里确实还停着蒙西尼尔的一些马车。两根柱子上挂着两盏巨大的火炬，在它们的光线下，站在露天的地方，是一个大磨刀石：一个粗糙安装的东西，看起来像是匆忙地从附近的铁匠铺或者其他工作室里搬来的。洛里先生站起来，从窗口向外望着这些无害的物品，打了个寒战，然后退回到壁炉旁边的座位。他不仅打开了玻璃窗，还打开了外面的格子百叶窗，随后又关闭了它们，他浑身发抖。

source: “I am going to tell you. The door-keeper will pass the note to Mr. Lorry, and do you make any gesture that will attract Mr. Lorry’s attention, and show him where you stand. Then what you have to do, is, to remain there until he wants you.”
domestication: 我要告诉你这个计划：门卫会把纸条交给洛里先生，你只要做出个动作，让他注意到你并知道你站在哪里就行了。然后，你只要在那里等着，直到他需要你的时候。这样就万无一失了！
foreignization: “我要告诉你，门卫会把便条交给洛里先生，你做出任何动作吸引洛里先生的注意力，并指明你所站的位置。然后，你要做的就是留在那里，直到他需要你。”

“I am going to tell you. The door-keeper will pass the note to Mr. Lorry, and do you make any gesture that will attract Mr. Lorry’s attention, and show him where you stand. Then what you have to do, is, to remain there until he wants you.”
我要告诉你这个计划：门卫会把纸条交给洛里先生，你只要做出个动作，让他注意到你并知道你站在哪里就行了。然后，你只要在那里等着，直到他需要你的时候。这样就万无一失了！

source: “It was to you,” said the spy, “that his daughter came; and it was from your care that his daughter took him, accompanied by a neat brown monsieur; how is he called?—in a little wig—Lorry—of the bank of Tellson and Company—over to England.”
domestication: 那位密探说：“他的女儿就是来找你的，而且是在你的照顾下，他的女儿带着一个留着整齐胡须、头戴小假发的先生——我想起来了，是个叫罗瑞的家伙，在泰尔森和公司银行工作——把他送回了英格兰。”
foreignization: “是她来找你，”间谍说，“他女儿来找你；而且他女儿是从你的照顾下带着他离开的，陪伴他们的是一个整洁的棕色头发先生，他叫什么名字呢？——戴着一顶小假发——洛里——泰尔森和公司银行的——去了英格兰。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“It was to you,” said the spy, “that his daughter came; and it was from your care that his daughter took him, accompanied by a neat brown monsieur; how is he called?—in a little wig—Lorry—of the bank of Tellson and Company—over to England.”
那位密探说：“他的女儿就是来找你的，而且是在你的照顾下，他的女儿带着一个留着整齐胡须、头戴小假发的先生——我想起来了，是个叫罗瑞的家伙，在泰尔森和公司银行工作——把他送回了英格兰。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“It was to you,” said the spy, “that his daughter came; and it was from your care that his daughter took him, accompanied by a neat brown monsieur; how is he called?—in a little wig—Lorry—of the bank of Tellson and Company—over to England.”
“是她来找你，”间谍说，“他女儿来找你；而且他女儿是从你的照顾下带着他离开的，陪伴他们的是一个整洁的棕色头发先生，他叫什么名字呢？——戴着一顶小假发——洛里——泰尔森和公司银行的——去了英格兰。”

source: Jerry hoarsely professed himself at Miss Pross’s service. He had worn all his rust off long ago, but nothing would file his spiky head down.

source: “Infected with the new doctrines,” said a third, eyeing the direction through his glass in passing; “set himself in opposition to the last Marquis, abandoned the estates when he inherited them, and left them to the ruffian herd. They will recompense him now, I hope, as he deserves.”

foreignization: “被新思想感染了”，第三个人边从眼镜那头看向远方边说：“他与最后一位马尔基斯（Marquis）对立，当他继承了那些领地之后，他就抛弃了它们，让它们任由暴徒群像一群牲口一样践踏。希望他们现在会给予他应有的回报。”

source: “Then I tell you again, Mr. Darnay, I am sorry for it. I am sorry to hear you putting any such extraordinary questions. Here is a fellow, who, infected by the most pestilent and blasphemous code of devilry that ever was known, abandoned his property to the vilest scum of the earth that ever did murder by wholesale, and you ask me why I am sorry that a man who instructs youth knows him? Well, but I’ll answer you. I am sorry because I believe there is contamination in such a scoundrel. That’s why.”
domestication: "我再次跟你说，达纳利先生，我很遗憾听到你提出这样的问题。这里有个家伙，被最恶毒和亵渎神灵的邪教思想所感染，把他的财产拱手让给了世上最下等的混蛋，他们还大肆杀戮无辜的人，你却问我为什么遗憾一个教育年轻人的人会认识他？好吧，我告诉你，我遗憾是因为我相信跟这样一个无赖来往会有感染的危险。这就是原因。"
foreignization: 然后我再告诉你，达尼先生，我为此感到抱歉。我为听到你提出这样的非常规问题感到抱歉。这里有一个家伙，他被最有害和亵渎神灵的恶魔般行为所感染，将他的财产拱手让给了地球上最肮脏的渣滓，这些人曾经大肆进行谋杀，而你问我为什么我为一位教育年轻人的人认识他而感到抱歉？好吧，我会回答你。我为此感到抱歉，因为我相信这样一个无赖是有污染性的。这就是原因。

source: Miss Pross, submitting herself to his judgment, the scheme was worked out with care. Having abundance of time for his usual methodical toilette, Mr. Lorry presented himself at the breakfast-hour in his usual white linen, and with his usual neat leg. The Doctor was summoned in the usual way, and came to breakfast.
domestication: 普罗小姐完全听从他的安排，他们认真地制定了这个计划。洛瑞先生有足够的时间打理自己，他按照平常的方式洗漱打扮，一贯穿着洁白的衬衫，穿着笔挺的裤子。到了吃早餐的时候，他像往常一样把博士请到了餐桌旁。
foreignization: 普罗斯小姐听从他的判断，于是他们小心翼翼地制定了这个计划。洛瑞先生有足够的时间按照他平常的方法进行梳洗打扮，所以在吃早餐的时候，他穿着平常的白色亚麻服装，穿着平常穿得整洁的长筒袜出现在众人面前。医生也像平常一样被邀请来吃早餐，并且如约而至。

source: Through gloomy vaults where the light of day had never shone, past hideous doors of dark dens and cages, down cavernous flights of steps, and again up steep rugged ascents of stone and brick, more like dry waterfalls than staircases, Defarge, the turnkey, and Jacques Three, linked hand and arm, went with all the speed they could make. Here and there, especially at first, the inundation started on them and swept by; but when they had done descending, and were winding and climbing up a tower, they were alone. Hemmed in here by the massive thickness of walls and arches, the storm within the fortress and without was only audible to them in a dull, subdued way, as if the noise out of which they had come had almost destroyed their sense of hearing.
domestication: 他们穿过一片片从未见过阳光的昏暗地牢，走过一个个黑暗恐怖的地洞和铁笼，沿着蜿蜒曲折的楼梯向下，又爬上陡峭险峻的石头和砖墙，仿佛干涸了的瀑布一般的楼梯，狱卒迪法尔热和雅克三手挽手臂，快步向前。这里那里，尤其是开始时，洪水般的人潮常常围绕着他们，但当他们下降完毕，转而盘旋而上一座塔楼时，他们便独自一人了。在这里，被厚重的墙壁和拱门所环绕，堡垒内外的暴风雨对他们来说只能是一种闷声的、低沉的喧嚣，就好像他们刚刚离开的那阵喧闹几乎要摧毁他们的听觉一样。
foreignization: 穿过从未见过阳光的昏暗穹顶，走过黑暗洞穴和兽笼的丑陋大门，沿着洞穴般的楼梯向下，又爬上陡峭崎岖的石头和砖块的阶梯，这些阶梯更像干涸的瀑布，而不是楼梯，狱卒德法尔热和雅克三，手挽着手臂，尽可能快地前进。在这里和那里，尤其是在开始时，洪水向他们袭来并席卷而过；但是当他们完成了下降，并且正在盘旋和攀登一座塔楼时，他们是孤身一人。在这里，被厚厚的墙壁和拱门所环绕，城堡内外的风暴对于他们来说只有在一种沉闷、抑制的方式下是可以听到的，就好像他们离开的那阵喧嚣几乎摧毁了他们的听觉。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Through gloomy vaults where the light of day had never shone, past hideous doors of dark dens and cages, down cavernous flights of steps, and again up steep rugged ascents of stone and brick, more like dry waterfalls than staircases, Defarge, the turnkey, and Jacques Three, linked hand and arm, went with all the speed they could make. Here and there, especially at first, the inundation started on them and swept by; but when they had done descending, and were winding and climbing up a tower, they were alone. Hemmed in here by the massive thickness of walls and arches, the storm within the fortress and without was only audible to them in a dull, subdued way, as if the noise out of which they had come had almost destroyed their sense of hearing.

source: Time was, when a poet sat upon a stool in a public place, and mused in the sight of men. Mr. Cruncher, sitting on a stool in a public place, but not being a poet, mused as little as possible, and looked about him.
domestication: 从前，有一位诗人坐在公共场所的凳子上，在众人的注视下沉思冥想。克朗奇先生也坐在公共场所的凳子上，不过他可不是什么诗人，他尽量少思考，眼观四方，打量着周围的情况。
foreignization: 过去，诗人常常坐在公共场所的凳子上，在众人面前沉思。克朗彻先生坐在公共场所的凳子上，但他不是诗人，他尽可能少地思考，四周张望。

source: Thus the evening wore away with the Cruncher family, until Young Jerry was ordered to bed, and his mother, laid under similar injunctions, obeyed them. Mr. Cruncher beguiled the earlier watches of the night with solitary pipes, and did not start upon his excursion until nearly one o’clock. Towards that small and ghostly hour, he rose up from his chair, took a key out of his pocket, opened a locked cupboard, and brought forth a sack, a crowbar of convenient size, a rope and chain, and other fishing tackle of that nature. Disposing these articles about him in skilful manner, he bestowed a parting defiance on Mrs. Cruncher, extinguished the light, and went out.
domestication: 就这样，克兰彻一家人的晚上就在聊天中慢慢过去了，直到小杰里被命令去睡觉，他的母亲也在接到同样的命令后遵从了。克兰彻先生独自抽着烟斗，消磨着夜晚的时光，直到快一点钟才出门。随着夜幕的降临，越来越深，已经是寂静无声的时刻，他从椅子上站起来，从口袋里掏出一把钥匙，打开了一个锁着的柜子，从里面拿出一个麻袋、一根适合大小的撬棍、一条绳子和链条，以及其他类似的渔具。他娴熟地整理好这些东西，恶狠狠地瞪了妻子一眼，熄灭了灯，然后走了出去。

Thus the evening wore away with the Cruncher family, until Young Jerry was ordered to bed, and his mother, laid under similar injunctions, obeyed them. Disposing these articles about him in skilful manner, he bestowed a parting defiance on Mrs. Cruncher, extinguished the light, and went out.

source: Nothing more was said, and the mender of roads, being found already dozing on the topmost stair, was advised to lay himself down on the pallet-bed and take some rest. He needed no persuasion, and was soon asleep.
domestication: 没再说什么了，修路工人已经在楼梯顶上打起瞌睡来了，就让他躺在床板上休息一会儿吧。他用不着别人说，他很快就睡着了。
foreignization: 没有再说什么，这个修路工人已经被发现在楼梯顶上打瞌睡，被建议躺在木板床上休息一会儿。他不需要说服，很快就睡着了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nothing more was said, and the mender of roads, being found already dozing on the topmost stair, was advised to lay himself down on the pallet-bed and take some rest. He needed no persuasion, and was soon asleep.

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Nothing more was said, and the mender of roads, being found already dozing on the topmost stair, was advised to lay himself down on the pallet-bed and take some rest. He needed no persuasion, and was soon asleep.
没有再说什么，这个修路工人已经被发现在楼梯顶上打瞌睡，被建议躺在木板床上休息一会儿。他不需要说服，很快就睡着了。

source: The stillness consequent on the cessation of the rumbling and labouring of the coach, added to the stillness of the night, made it very quiet indeed. The panting of the horses communicated a tremulous motion to the coach, as if it were in a state of agitation. The hearts of the passengers beat loud enough perhaps to be heard; but at any rate, the quiet pause was audibly expressive of people out of breath, and holding the breath, and having the pulses quickened by expectation.
domestication: 马车突然停了下来，车轮和马匹的嘈杂声戛然而止，夜晚的寂静一下子变得更加深沉了。这静得有些出奇，连马的喘息声都能引起马车轻微的颤动，就好像它也跟着激动不已似的。乘客们的心跳得很厉害，几乎可以听到声音，总之，这短暂的安静充满了人们屏住呼吸、心跳加速的期待感，整个氛围都显得非常凝重。
foreignization: 马车隆隆作响和喘息的声音停止后所产生的寂静，再加上夜晚的静谧，使得一切变得非常安静。马匹喘息的呼吸使马车传来颤抖的动作，就好像它处于一种激动状态。乘客们的心脏跳动得足够大声，可能可以被听到；但无论如何，安静的暂停清楚地表明人们都气喘吁吁，屏住呼吸，并且由于期待而心跳加速。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The stillness consequent on the cessation of the rumbling and labouring of the coach, added to the stillness of the night, made it very quiet indeed. The panting of the horses communicated a tremulous motion to the coach, as if it were in a state of agitation. The hearts of the passengers beat loud enough perhaps to be heard; but at any rate, the quiet pause was audibly expressive of people out of breath, and holding the breath, and having the pulses quickened by expectation.
马车突然停了下来，车轮和马匹的嘈杂声戛然而止，夜晚的寂静一下子变得更加深沉了。这静得有些出奇，连马的喘息声都能引起马车轻微的颤动，就好像它也跟着激动不已似的。乘客们的心跳得很厉害，几乎可以听到声音，总之，这短暂的安静充满了人们屏住呼吸、心跳加速的期待感，整个氛围都显得非常凝重。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The stillness consequent on the cessation of the rumbling and labouring of the coach, added to the stillness of the night, made it very quiet indeed. The panting of the horses communicated a tremulous motion to the coach, as if it were in a state of agitation. The hearts of the passengers beat loud enough perhaps to be heard; but at any rate, the quiet pause was audibly expressive of people out of breath, and holding the breath, and having the pulses quickened by expectation.
马车隆隆作响和喘息的声音停止后所产生的寂静，再加上夜晚的静谧，使得一切变得非常安静。马匹喘息的呼吸使马车传来颤抖的动作，就好像它处于一种激动状态。乘客们的心脏跳动得足够大声，可能可以被听到；但无论如何，安静的暂停清楚地表明人们都气喘吁吁，屏住呼吸，并且由于期待而心跳加速。

source: “Gentlemen,” said her husband, who had kept his bright eye observantly upon her, “good day. The chamber, furnished bachelor-fashion, that you wished to see, and were inquiring for when I stepped out, is on the fifth floor. The doorway of the staircase gives on the little courtyard close to the left here,” pointing with his hand, “near to the window of my establishment. But, now that I remember, one of you has already been there, and can show the way. Gentlemen, adieu!”
domestication: 这位先生的丈夫一直密切地注视着她，他说：“先生们，早上好。你们想看的那间单身汉风格的房间，在五楼。我刚刚出去的时候，你们还在问这件事。从这里往左边走，穿过小院子，就能看到楼梯的入口，离我的店铺的窗户很近。但是我现在记起来了，好像你们其中一个人已经去过那里了，可以带路的。先生们，告辞！”
foreignization: “先生们，”她丈夫说，他一直用明亮、警觉的眼睛注视着她，“一天好。你们想要看的、并且在我出去时询问的、像单身汉那样布置的房间，在五楼。楼梯口通向就在这里左边的小院子，”他用手指着，“靠近我的店铺的窗户。但是，现在我记起来了，你们中一个人已经去过那里，能够带路。先生们，再见！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Gentlemen,” said her husband, who had kept his bright eye observantly upon her, “good day. The chamber, furnished bachelor-fashion, that you wished to see, and were inquiring for when I stepped out, is on the fifth floor. The doorway of the staircase gives on the little courtyard close to the left here,” pointing with his hand, “near to the window of my establishment. But, now that I remember, one of you has already been there, and can show the way. Gentlemen, adieu!”
这位先生的丈夫一直密切地注视着她，他说：“先生们，早上好。你们想看的那间单身汉风格的房间，在五楼。我刚刚出去的时候，你们还在问这件事。从这里往左边走，穿过小院子，就能看到楼梯的入口，离我的店铺的窗户很近。但是我现在记起来了，好像你们其中一个人已经去过那里了，可以带路的。先生们，告辞！”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Gentlemen,” said her husband, who had kept his bright eye observantly upon her, “good day. The chamber, furnished bachelor-fashion, that you wished to see, and were inquiring for when I stepped out, is on the fifth floor. The doorway of the staircase gives on the little courtyard close to the left here,” pointing with his hand, “near to the window of my establishment. But, now that I remember, one of you has already been there, and can show the way. Gentlemen, adieu!”
“先生们，”她丈夫说，他一直用明亮、警觉的眼睛注视着她，“一天好。你们想要看的、并且在我出去时询问的、像单身汉那样布置的房间，在五楼。楼梯口通向就在这里左边的小院子，”他用手指着，“靠近我的店铺的窗户。但是，现在我记起来了，你们中一个人已经去过那里，能够带路。先生们，再见！”

source: “Not dead! He feared us so much—and with reason—that he caused himself to be represented as dead, and had a grand mock-funeral. But they have found him alive, hiding in the country, and have brought him in. I have seen him but now, on his way to the Hotel de Ville, a prisoner. I have said that he had reason to fear us. Say all! Had he reason?”
domestication: 他没死！他太害怕我们了，确实也是应该的，于是就装死，还大张旗鼓地弄了一场假葬礼。但是他们还是找到了他，在乡下把他抓住，带回来了。我刚刚在市政厅前见过他，被当作囚犯带走了。我说他有理由害怕我们，说到底，他真是有这个理由吧？
foreignization: “他没死！他非常害怕我们，而且有理由这么做，以至于他假装自己已经死了，并且还举行了一场盛大的葬礼。但是他们找到了他，他还活着，在乡下躲藏，于是他们把他抓了回来。我刚刚看到他，被当作囚犯带往市政厅的路上。我说他有理由害怕我们。全部说出来吧！他有理由害怕吗？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Not dead! He feared us so much—and with reason—that he caused himself to be represented as dead, and had a grand mock-funeral. But they have found him alive, hiding in the country, and have brought him in. I have seen him but now, on his way to the Hotel de Ville, a prisoner. I have said that he had reason to fear us. Say all! Had he reason?”
他没死！他太害怕我们了，确实也是应该的，于是就装死，还大张旗鼓地弄了一场假葬礼。但是他们还是找到了他，在乡下把他抓住，带回来了。我刚刚在市政厅前见过他，被当作囚犯带走了。我说他有理由害怕我们，说到底，他真是有这个理由吧？

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Not dead! He feared us so much—and with reason—that he caused himself to be represented as dead, and had a grand mock-funeral. But they have found him alive, hiding in the country, and have brought him in. I have seen him but now, on his way to the Hotel de Ville, a prisoner. I have said that he had reason to fear us. Say all! Had he reason?”
“他没死！他非常害怕我们，而且有理由这么做，以至于他假装自己已经死了，并且还举行了一场盛大的葬礼。但是他们找到了他，他还活着，在乡下躲藏，于是他们把他抓了回来。我刚刚看到他，被当作囚犯带往市政厅的路上。我说他有理由害怕我们。全部说出来吧！他有理由害怕吗？

source: But, he had oppressed no man, he had imprisoned no man; he was so far from having harshly exacted payment of his dues, that he had relinquished them of his own will, thrown himself on a world with no favour in it, won his own private place there, and earned his own bread. Monsieur Gabelle had held the impoverished and involved estate on written instructions, to spare the people, to give them what little there was to give—such fuel as the heavy creditors would let them have in the winter, and such produce as could be saved from the same grip in the summer—and no doubt he had put the fact in plea and proof, for his own safety, so that it could not but appear now.
domestication: 不过，他没有欺压过任何人，也没有关押过任何人。他根本就没强迫别人还债，反而主动放弃了自己的权利，独自闯荡在一个毫无关系的世界里，自己创造了立足之地，也自己赚取了生活所需。加贝先生是在书面命令下接管了陷入困境和债务的庄园的，他的目的是为了保护当地百姓，给予他们所能给予的微薄帮助——比如在严冬时，向债主求得一些柴火，在夏天，从债主手中保留下一些庄稼。而且他肯定早就将这些事实写成文件，作为自我保护的手段，这样一来，现在这些事情自然都有据可查了。
foreignization: 但是，他没有欺压任何人，也没有监禁任何人；他根本没有严厉地催要他的债权，反而是他自己放弃了它们，独自面对一个对他毫无照顾的世界，在那里赢得了自己的位置，并且靠自己的努力挣到了自己的面包。加贝先生是在书面指令下接管了这家已经破产和负债累累的庄园，目的是为了减轻人民的负担，给予他们微薄的救济——在冬天，让他们得到重重债务者允许他们拿到的那么多燃料，在夏天，让他们从债主的魔爪中拯救出那么多农作物——毫无疑问，他已经将这些事实作为自己的抗辩和证据，以确保自己的安全，所以现在看来，这些都是理所当然的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, he had oppressed no man, he had imprisoned no man; he was so far from having harshly exacted payment of his dues, that he had relinquished them of his own will, thrown himself on a world with no favour in it, won his own private place there, and earned his own bread. Monsieur Gabelle had held the impoverished and involved estate on written instructions, to spare the people, to give them what little there was to give—such fuel as the heavy creditors would let them have in the winter, and such produce as could be saved from the same grip in the summer—and no doubt he had put the fact in plea and proof, for his own safety, so that it could not but appear now.

不过，他没有欺压过任何人，也没有关押过任何人。他根本就没强迫别人还债，反而主动放弃了自己的权利，独自闯荡在一个毫无关系的世界里，自己创造了立足之地，也自己赚取了生活所需。加贝先生是在书面命令下接管了陷入困境和债务的庄园的，他的目的是为了保护当地百姓，给予他们所能给予的微薄帮助——比如在严冬时，向债主求得一些柴火，在夏天，从债主手中保留下一些庄稼。而且他肯定早就将这些事实写成文件，作为自我保护的手段，这样一来，现在这些事情自然都有据可查了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, he had oppressed no man, he had imprisoned no man; he was so far from having harshly exacted payment of his dues, that he had relinquished them of his own will, thrown himself on a world with no favour in it, won his own private place there, and earned his own bread. Monsieur Gabelle had held the impoverished and involved estate on written instructions, to spare the people, to give them what little there was to give—such fuel as the heavy creditors would let them have in the winter, and such produce as could be saved from the same grip in the summer—and no doubt he had put the fact in plea and proof, for his own safety, so that it could not but appear now.

但是，他没有欺压任何人，也没有监禁任何人；他根本没有严厉地催要他的债权，反而是他自己放弃了它们，独自面对一个对他毫无照顾的世界，在那里赢得了自己的位置，并且靠自己的努力挣到了自己的面包。加贝先生是在书面指令下接管了这家已经破产和负债累累的庄园，目的是为了减轻人民的负担，给予他们微薄的救济——在冬天，让他们得到重重债务者允许他们拿到的那么多燃料，在夏天，让他们从债主的魔爪中拯救出那么多农作物——毫无疑问，他已经将这些事实作为自己的抗辩和证据，以确保自己的安全，所以现在看来，这些都是理所当然的。

source: Mr. Lorry reddened as if he were conscious of having debated the point in his mind, and Mr. Carton made his way to the outside of the bar. The way out of court lay in that direction, and Jerry followed him, all eyes, ears, and spikes.
domestication: 洛里先生的脸一下子红了，好像他也在心里权衡这件事。卡顿先生朝着酒吧外面走去，这边正是出庭的路。杰瑞跟在后面，眼睛耳朵和脚步都专注地盯着他。
foreignization: 洛里先生脸红了，好像他知道自己在心里曾经辩论过这个问题，卡顿先生朝酒吧外面走去。法庭的出路就在那个方向，杰瑞跟着他，他的眼睛、耳朵和马刺都高度警觉。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Mr. Lorry reddened as if he were conscious of having debated the point in his mind, and Mr. Carton made his way to the outside of the bar. The way out of court lay in that direction, and Jerry followed him, all eyes, ears, and spikes.
洛里先生的脸一下子红了，好像他也在心里权衡这件事。卡顿先生朝着酒吧外面走去，这边正是出庭的路。杰瑞跟在后面，眼睛耳朵和脚步都专注地盯着他。

messages_foreignization.content:

Mr. Lorry reddened as if he were conscious of having debated the point in his mind, and Mr. Carton made his way to the outside of the bar. The way out of court lay in that direction, and Jerry followed him, all eyes, ears, and spikes.
洛里先生脸红了，好像他知道自己在心里曾经辩论过这个问题，卡顿先生朝酒吧外面走去。法庭的出路就在那个方向，杰瑞跟着他，他的眼睛、耳朵和马刺都高度警觉。

source: “Not even so. I might not have the hopefulness to do it for weeks; I might (mistaken or not mistaken) have that hopefulness to-morrow.”
domestication: 不会的，根本不是那么回事儿。我也许没信心做这件事，可能需要几个星期的时间才会有足够的信心去尝试；但也有可能（不管我是对还是错），明天我就会有这种信心了。
foreignization: “甚至不会如此，我可能没有足够的希望去做这件事，可能需要几周；我可能（无论正确与否）明天就会有这种希望。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Not even so. I might not have the hopefulness to do it for weeks; I might (mistaken or not mistaken) have that hopefulness to-morrow.”
不会的，根本不是那么回事儿。我也许没信心做这件事，可能需要几个星期的时间才会有足够的信心去尝试；但也有可能（不管我是对还是错），明天我就会有这种信心了。

“Not even so. I might not have the hopefulness to do it for weeks; I might (mistaken or not mistaken) have that hopefulness to-morrow.”
“甚至不会如此，我可能没有足够的希望去做这件事，可能需要几周；我可能（无论正确与否）明天就会有这种希望。”

source: Mr. Cruncher was soothed, but shook his head in a dubious and moral way. “It depends upon how you dewelop your talents. Be careful to dewelop your talents, and never to say no more than you can help to nobody, and there’s no telling at the present time what you may not come to be fit for.” As Young Jerry, thus encouraged, went on a few yards in advance, to plant the stool in the shadow of the Bar, Mr. Cruncher added to himself: “Jerry, you honest tradesman, there’s hopes wot that boy will yet be a blessing to you, and a recompense to you for his mother!”
domestication: 克朗奇先生有些安心，但还是怀疑地摇了摇头，说：“这就得看你如何发挥自己的才能了，注意好好培养自己的才能，别到处乱说话，不能随便什么都说，否则谁也无法预测你将来会成就什么。小杰瑞听到这些话很受鼓舞，于是走在前面几码的地方，把凳子放在酒吧的阴影下。克朗奇先生自言自语地说：“杰瑞，你这个老实人，我看好你的儿子，将来他会成为你的福气，也是对得起他母亲的一种补偿。”
foreignization: 克兰彻先生被安慰了，但他以一种疑虑和道德的方式摇着头。“这取决于你如何发展你的才能。小心地发展你的才能，并且永远不要对任何人说超过你能说的，目前无法预测你可能会成为什么样的人。”当小杰瑞这样受到鼓励，在前面走了几码，去在酒吧的阴影下摆放凳子时，克兰彻先生自言自语地补充道：“杰瑞，你这个诚实的工匠，我希望那个男孩最终会成为你的福气，并且是对你的一种补偿，为他的母亲！

source: The sort of interest with which this man was stared and breathed at, was not a sort that elevated humanity. Had he stood in peril of a less horrible sentence—had there been a chance of any one of its savage details being spared—by just so much would he have lost in his fascination. The form that was to be doomed to be so shamefully mangled, was the sight; the immortal creature that was to be so butchered and torn asunder, yielded the sensation. Whatever gloss the various spectators put upon the interest, according to their several arts and powers of self-deceit, the interest was, at the root of it, Ogreish.
domestication: 人们盯着这个人，喘着粗气，带着一种让人感到低劣的兴趣。这不仅仅是出于同情或好奇，而是一种残忍的施虐欲望。如果这个人的命运不是如此悲惨，如果他的刑罚中有一丝丝的慈悲，那么他在众人眼中的吸引力就会大大减弱。被判处如此惨无人性的酷刑的那个人形态，是大家关注的焦点；而那个不朽的生命体即将被残酷地肢解和撕裂，这才是吸引众人目光的真正原因。尽管各色观众根据自己的狡猾和自欺能力，对这种兴趣进行了各种各样的解读，但归根结底，这种兴趣却是具有怪物般的性质。
foreignization: 人们用一种什么样的眼神凝视着这个人，并喘息不已，这种眼神并没有让人类的价值变得高尚。如果他面临的惩罚不那么可怕——如果有任何机会可以避免这种惩罚的某些残酷细节——那么他也就不会有这么大的吸引力。即将被如此羞辱地肢解的躯体，是人们关注的焦点；即将被如此残忍地凌虐和撕裂的不死之身，带来了刺激。不管各位观众如何用他们不同的狡猾和自我欺骗手段为自己的好奇心辩解，这种好奇心从根本上来说，是食人魔一样的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The sort of interest with which this man was stared and breathed at, was not a sort that elevated humanity. Had he stood in peril of a less horrible sentence—had there been a chance of any one of its savage details being spared—by just so much would he have lost in his fascination. The form that was to be doomed to be so shamefully mangled, was the sight; the immortal creature that was to be so butchered and torn asunder, yielded the sensation. Whatever gloss the various spectators put upon the interest, according to their several arts and powers of self-deceit, the interest was, at the root of it, Ogreish.

source: “And now speak to your father, dearest. No other man in all this France could have done what he has done for me.”
domestication: 现在该跟你父亲好好谈谈了，亲爱的。他在整个法国可能是唯一能对我做到如此地步的人吧。说实话，他真算得上是我的大恩人了。
foreignization: “现在，跟你父亲说吧，亲爱的。在整个法国，没有哪个男人能像他一样为我做这么多。”

“And now speak to your father, dearest. No other man in all this France could have done what he has done for me.”

source: “Then be so kind,” urged Miss Manette, “as to leave us here. You see how composed he has become, and you cannot be afraid to leave him with me now. Why should you be? If you will lock the door to secure us from interruption, I do not doubt that you will find him, when you come back, as quiet as you leave him. In any case, I will take care of him until you return, and then we will remove him straight.”
domestication: “那就请便吧，”曼妮特小姐说，“把我们丢下吧。你看他现在已经镇定下来了，你也就不用担心把他交给我了。有什么好担心的呢？如果你愿意锁上门把外面的人挡住，我相信等你回来的时候，他还会是你离开时一样平静的。不管怎样，我都会照顾他直到你回来，我们会直接把他带走的。
foreignization: “那么，请你好心，”曼妮特小姐请求道，“把我们留在这里。你可以看到他现在已经恢复了平静，你也没有必要害怕把他交给我看管。为什么你还要担心呢？如果你肯把门锁上，以确保不被打扰，我毫不怀疑，当你回来时，你会发现他和你离开时一样平静。不管怎样，在你回来之前，我都会照顾他，然后我们就会直接带他离开这里。

In any case, I will take care of him until you return, and then we will remove him straight.”

source: “Do you know, Sydney,” said Mr. Stryver, looking at him with sharp eyes, and slowly drawing a hand across his florid face: “do you know, I rather thought, at the time, that you sympathised with the golden-haired doll, and were quick to see what happened to the golden-haired doll?”
domestication: 斯特赖弗先生打量着他，目光锐利，慢慢地用手抚过那张红光满面的脸，说：“你知道吗，悉尼，我当时还真觉得，你对那个金发美人很有好感，见到她出了事，眼皮都快要翻上天了。”
foreignization: “你知道吗，悉尼，”斯特莱佛先生看着他，目光锐利，慢慢地把手拖过他那脸红的脸：“你知道吗，我当时倒是这么想，你是同情那个金发女孩的，你很快就看出来了那个金发女孩发生了什么事？”

messages_domestication.content:

“Do you know, Sydney,” said Mr. Stryver, looking at him with sharp eyes, and slowly drawing a hand across his florid face: “do you know, I rather thought, at the time, that you sympathised with the golden-haired doll, and were quick to see what happened to the golden-haired doll?”

“Do you know, Sydney,” said Mr. Stryver, looking at him with sharp eyes, and slowly drawing a hand across his florid face: “do you know, I rather thought, at the time, that you sympathised with the golden-haired doll, and were quick to see what happened to the golden-haired doll?”

source: “It will be much the same to your knowledge, miss, I should think,” retorted Jerry, “whether they drink your health or the Old Un’s.”
domestication: “这种事跟你了解多少根本没什么两样，小姐，”杰瑞反驳道，“他们祝酒时说的是你的好还是老家伙的好，与你又有什么关系呢？”
foreignization: “无论他们为你的健康还是为老头子的健康干杯，对你来说都是一样的，我这么想，”杰瑞反驳道。

source: “Monseigneur, hear me! Monseigneur, hear my petition! My husband died of want; so many die of want; so many more will die of want.”
domestication: 大人，我求您听我说！大人，我求您允许我陈述我的请求！我丈夫是因穷困而死的；这么多人都是因为穷困而死的；还有更多的人将来也会因为穷困而死的。
foreignization: “大人，请听我说！大人，请听我的请求！我的丈夫死于贫困；这么多人死于贫困；这么多更多的人将会死于贫困。”

source: It was the rush and roar of rain that he typified, and it stopped him, for no voice could be heard in it. A memorable storm of thunder and lightning broke with that sweep of water, and there was not a moment’s interval in crash, and fire, and rain, until after the moon rose at midnight.
domestication: 他所描绘的正是雨声的狂暴和雷鸣的震耳欲聋，就连说话的声音都被淹没了。接着一场惊天动地的雷暴席卷而来，电闪雷鸣，狂风暴雨，整个过程中没有一刻的间歇，直到半夜月亮升起，才渐渐平息。直到那时，雨声仍然嘈杂，宛如千万鼓点敲打着大地，一片混乱的景象。
foreignization: 那是雨的奔腾和雷鸣，他用这种方式来描述它，而且它制止了他，因为在雨中没有任何声音可以被听到。 一场难忘的雷暴和闪电与雨水一起倾泻而下，从头到尾没有一刻停止，直到午夜月亮升起之前，雷鸣、闪电和雨水都没有片刻的间歇。

It was the rush and roar of rain that he typified, and it stopped him, for no voice could be heard in it. A memorable storm of thunder and lightning broke with that sweep of water, and there was not a moment’s interval in crash, and fire, and rain, until after the moon rose at midnight.

source: The footsteps were incessant, and the hurry of them became more and more rapid. The corner echoed and re-echoed with the tread of feet; some, as it seemed, under the windows; some, as it seemed, in the room; some coming, some going, some breaking off, some stopping altogether; all in the distant streets, and not one within sight.
domestication: 脚步声不断地响着，越来越快的脚步声让人感到十分急促。街道的拐角处回荡着脚步声，一会儿似乎有人从窗下经过，一会儿又像有人在房间里走动，有的人匆忙而过，有的人停下来观望，有的人突然折回去，有的人完全静止不动。这些声音都来自远处的街道，但周围却一个人影也没有。
foreignization: 脚步声不断，脚步声的匆忙变得越来越迅速。拐角处回荡着脚步声，在那里重复回荡；似乎有些脚步声是在窗户下面，有些脚步声似乎在房间里；有些人来了，有些人走了，有些人突然停住了，有些人完全停了下来；所有的声音都在远处的街道上，没有一个在视线范围内。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The footsteps were incessant, and the hurry of them became more and more rapid. The corner echoed and re-echoed with the tread of feet; some, as it seemed, under the windows; some, as it seemed, in the room; some coming, some going, some breaking off, some stopping altogether; all in the distant streets, and not one within sight.

The footsteps were incessant, and the hurry of them became more and more rapid. The corner echoed and re-echoed with the tread of feet; some, as it seemed, under the windows; some, as it seemed, in the room; some coming, some going, some breaking off, some stopping altogether; all in the distant streets, and not one within sight.
脚步声不断，脚步声的匆忙变得越来越迅速。拐角处回荡着脚步声，在那里重复回荡；似乎有些脚步声是在窗户下面，有些脚步声似乎在房间里；有些人来了，有些人走了，有些人突然停住了，有些人完全停了下来；所有的声音都在远处的街道上，没有一个在视线范围内。

source: “Of his own necessity. As he was, when I first saw him after they found me and demanded to know if I would take him, and, at my peril be discreet—as he was then, so he is now.”
domestication: 他原本就是这样子的。我记得当他们找到我并问我是否愿意收留他时，我被告诫要谨慎行事，不能让他受到伤害。当时他就是这副模样，现在还是一样。
foreignization: “出于他的必要。正如我第一次见到他之后他们发现我并要求我是否愿意接受他一样，我冒着风险保持谨慎——他当时的样子，现在还是一样。”

source: It was the year of Our Lord one thousand seven hundred and seventy-five. Spiritual revelations were conceded to England at that favoured period, as at this. Mrs. Southcott had recently attained her five-and-twentieth blessed birthday, of whom a prophetic private in the Life Guards had heralded the sublime appearance by announcing that arrangements were made for the swallowing up of London and Westminster. Even the Cock-lane ghost had been laid only a round dozen of years, after rapping out its messages, as the spirits of this very year last past (supernaturally deficient in originality) rapped out theirs. Mere messages in the earthly order of events had lately come to the English Crown and People, from a congress of British subjects in America: which, strange to relate, have proved more important to the human race than any communications yet received through any of the chickens of the Cock-lane brood.
domestication: 那一年是西元一七七五年，英格兰正值灵感迭起的有利时期，就像现在一样。索思考特夫人刚满二十五岁，就有一个卫队的预言家宣称，伦敦和威斯敏斯特即将被吞没。就在十二年前，考克巷的鬼魂还在敲出它的讯息，而去年的灵异事件也同样缺乏新意，只是重复着类似的信息。与此同时，来自美国的英国臣民大会却给英国皇室和人民带来了更为实际的讯息，这些讯息比过去从考克巷那些鸡仔那里得到的任何信息都重要得多。
foreignization: 那是公元一千七百七十五年。 在那个受宠的时期，精神启示像现在一样被允许在英格兰发生。 南科特夫人刚刚度过了她二十五岁的生日，一个来自近卫军的先知士兵曾预言过她的降临，并宣布已经安排好了伦敦和威斯敏斯特被吞噬的计划。 就连考克巷的鬼魂也已经被安息了十二年，它通过敲击传递信息，就像去年的这个时候（那些超自然的缺乏独创性）鬼魂一样。 地球事件的凡间消息最近从美国的英国臣民大会传到了英国王室和人民：奇怪的是，这些消息比通过考克巷那些鸡传来的任何信息都对人类更重要。

Even the Cock-lane ghost had been laid only a round dozen of years, after rapping out its messages, as the spirits of this very year last past (supernaturally deficient in originality) rapped out theirs. Mere messages in the earthly order of events had lately come to the English Crown and People, from a congress of British subjects in America: which, strange to relate, have proved more important to the human race than any communications yet received through any of the chickens of the Cock-lane brood.

source: There were three rooms on a floor, and, the doors by which they communicated being put open that the air might pass freely through them all, Mr. Lorry, smilingly observant of that fanciful resemblance which he detected all around him, walked from one to another. The first was the best room, and in it were Lucie’s birds, and flowers, and books, and desk, and work-table, and box of water-colours; the second was the Doctor’s consulting-room, used also as the dining-room; the third, changingly speckled by the rustle of the plane-tree in the yard, was the Doctor’s bedroom, and there, in a corner, stood the disused shoemaker’s bench and tray of tools, much as it had stood on the fifth floor of the dismal house by the wine-shop, in the suburb of Saint Antoine in Paris.
domestication: 这层楼上有三间房，为了让空气能够自由流通，各个房间的门都敞开着。洛里先生带着微笑，饶有兴趣地观察着四周，仿佛无处不在发现新奇之处。他走进第一间房，发现这是最好的房间，里面摆放着卢西的鸟儿、鲜花、书籍、书桌、工作台和水彩画盒等。一转眼，他来到了第二间房，这是医生的诊所，同时也用作餐厅。再往前走，是第三间房，窗外树叶的沙沙声在室内投下斑驳的阴影，这是医生的卧室。就在房间的一个角落里，摆放着一张废弃的鞋匠工作台和工具箱，跟它当年放在巴黎圣安托万区一家酒馆旁边那座破旧大楼五楼的样子别无二致。
foreignization: 一层楼上有三间屋子，屋与屋之间的门都敞开着，这样空气可以自由地流通所有这些房间。洛里先生带着微笑，观察到他周围所有那些富有幻想的相似之处，在这些房间之间走来走去。第一个房间是最好的房间，里面有露西的鸟、鲜花、书籍、桌子、工作台和水彩盒；第二个房间是医生的诊所，同时也用作餐厅；第三个房间，由院子里的梧桐树的沙沙声不时点缀， 是医生的卧室，在那里，角落里摆放着废弃已久的鞋匠的工作台和工具箱，就像它曾经放在巴黎圣安托万郊区酒馆旁边那座令人沮丧的房子的五楼一样。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

There were three rooms on a floor, and, the doors by which they communicated being put open that the air might pass freely through them all, Mr. Lorry, smilingly observant of that fanciful resemblance which he detected all around him, walked from one to another. The first was the best room, and in it were Lucie’s birds, and flowers, and books, and desk, and work-table, and box of water-colours; the second was the Doctor’s consulting-room, used also as the dining-room; the third, changingly speckled by the rustle of the plane-tree in the yard, was the Doctor’s bedroom, and there, in a corner, stood the disused shoemaker’s bench and tray of tools, much as it had stood on the fifth floor of the dismal house by the wine-shop, in the suburb of Saint Antoine in Paris.

source: “And then breakfast, sir? Yes, sir. That way, sir, if you please. Show Concord! Gentleman’s valise and hot water to Concord. Pull off gentleman’s boots in Concord. (You will find a fine sea-coal fire, sir.) Fetch barber to Concord. Stir about there, now, for Concord!”
domestication: “那早餐怎么办，先生？好的，先生。这边请，先生。快点准备好康科德的房间！把这位先生的行李和热水送到康科德房间。赶紧去康科德房间给先生脱靴子。（先生，您会发现康科德房间里有一堆很好的煤炭火正在烧，很暖和。）快点叫理发师去康科德房间。快点动起来，为康科德房间做准备！”
foreignization: “然后，先生，吃早餐吗？是的，先生。请往这边走，先生。传送康科德！康科德房间准备好男士的行李和热水。康科德房间里为男士脱下靴子。（先生，您会找到一个很好的煤炭火，先生。）把理发师叫到康科德。现在快点，康科德！”

source: The mender of roads went home, with the dust going on before him according to the set of the wind, and was soon at the fountain, squeezing himself in among the lean kine brought there to drink, and appearing even to whisper to them in his whispering to all the village. When the village had taken its poor supper, it did not creep to bed, as it usually did, but came out of doors again, and remained there. A curious contagion of whispering was upon it, and also, when it gathered together at the fountain in the dark, another curious contagion of looking expectantly at the sky in one direction only. Monsieur Gabelle, chief functionary of the place, became uneasy; went out on his house-top alone, and looked in that direction too; glanced down from behind his chimneys at the darkening faces by the fountain below, and sent word to the sacristan who kept the keys of the church, that there might be need to ring the tocsin by-and-bye.
domestication: 马路修理工回到家，脚下的尘土随着风向飘散，很快就来到了村里的喷泉旁。他挤在排队饮水的牛群中间，似乎像对整个村庄窃窃私语一般地与它们低声说着什么。当村民们吃完简陋的晚餐后，没有像往常一样急着回家睡觉，而是又出来到屋外，聚集在一起。一种奇怪的窃窃私语的“传染病”似乎蔓延了整个村庄，当他们在黑暗中聚集在喷泉旁时，又出现了一种奇怪的“传染病”——大家都期待地抬头看着天空的同一个方向。村长加贝尔先生感到不安，独自登上了自家的屋顶，也朝着那个方向看去。他从烟囱后面俯瞰着喷泉周围正在变暗的面孔，然后派人通知保管教堂钥匙的司事，说可能很快就需要敲响警钟。
foreignization: 道路修理工朝着他家走去，风吹起尘土在他面前飘散，很快他就来到了喷泉旁，挤进了那些被带来喝水的瘦牛中间，甚至似乎在他对整个村庄低声说话时也在对它们低声说些什么。当村庄吃完了简陋的晚餐后，它并没有像通常那样悄悄地回到床上，而是又走出门外，仍然留在那里。一种奇怪的窃窃私语的传染病降临到村庄，当它在黑暗中聚集在喷泉周围时，又有一种奇怪的传染病使得所有人都期待地朝一个方向看着天空。这个地方的首席官员加贝先生变得不安；独自走到他的屋顶上，也朝着那个方向看了一眼；从烟囱后面往下瞥了喷泉旁逐渐变黑的面孔一眼，然后派人告诉保管教堂钥匙的执事，也许稍后需要敲响警钟。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The mender of roads went home, with the dust going on before him according to the set of the wind, and was soon at the fountain, squeezing himself in among the lean kine brought there to drink, and appearing even to whisper to them in his whispering to all the village. When the village had taken its poor supper, it did not creep to bed, as it usually did, but came out of doors again, and remained there. A curious contagion of whispering was upon it, and also, when it gathered together at the fountain in the dark, another curious contagion of looking expectantly at the sky in one direction only. Monsieur Gabelle, chief functionary of the place, became uneasy; went out on his house-top alone, and looked in that direction too; glanced down from behind his chimneys at the darkening faces by the fountain below, and sent word to the sacristan who kept the keys of the church, that there might be need to ring the tocsin by-and-bye.

source: Accordingly, when Mr. Lorry called that night as late as ten o’clock, Mr. Stryver, among a quantity of books and papers littered out for the purpose, seemed to have nothing less on his mind than the subject of the morning. He even showed surprise when he saw Mr. Lorry, and was altogether in an absent and preoccupied state.
domestication: 那天夜里十点钟，洛瑞先生来访，史特莱佛先生在一大堆书籍和文件中间，似乎根本没把早上的事放在心上。他看到洛瑞先生竟然还表现出很惊讶的样子，完全是一副心不在焉的模样。
foreignization: 于是，当洛里先生在晚上十点钟左右来访时，斯特赖弗先生在散落的书籍和纸张中，似乎根本没把早上的事情放在心上。他甚至在看到洛里先生时表现出惊讶，完全处于一种心不在焉、陷入沉思的状态。

Accordingly, when Mr. Lorry called that night as late as ten o’clock, Mr. Stryver, among a quantity of books and papers littered out for the purpose, seemed to have nothing less on his mind than the subject of the morning. He even showed surprise when he saw Mr. Lorry, and was altogether in an absent and preoccupied state.
于是，当洛里先生在晚上十点钟左右来访时，斯特赖弗先生在散落的书籍和纸张中，似乎根本没把早上的事情放在心上。他甚至在看到洛里先生时表现出惊讶，完全处于一种心不在焉、陷入沉思的状态。

source: “It is the law,” remarked the ancient clerk, turning his surprised spectacles upon him. “It is the law.”
domestication: 这位年迈的职员转过头来，眼镜片后面的眼睛里满是惊讶的神色，他说：“这是法律规定的，没办法。”他又重复了一遍：“这是法律。”
foreignization: “这是法律，”那位年迈的职员说着，将他惊讶的眼镜转向他。“这是法律。”

source: The hands of the clock verging upon the hour of closing the Bank, there was a general set of the current of talkers past Mr. Lorry’s desk. He held the letter out inquiringly; and Monseigneur looked at it, in the person of this plotting and indignant refugee; and Monseigneur looked at it in the person of that plotting and indignant refugee; and This, That, and The Other, all had something disparaging to say, in French or in English, concerning the Marquis who was not to be found.
domestication: 钟表的指针快要指到银行关门的时间了，这时一群人都朝洛里先生的办公桌走来，大家都在议论纷纷。洛里先生将那封信举起来，疑惑地看着，而站在他面前的这位满腹牢骚、愤愤不平的难民模样的男人——蒙西尼尔，也在看这封信。蒙西尼尔代表着那位满腹牢骚、愤愤不平的难民，也在看这封信。这位，那位和那另一位，都对那个失踪的侯爵进行了贬损，语气中充满鄙视，人们你一言我一语，七嘴八舌，不论是说法语还是英语，都在批评那位不见踪影的侯爵。
foreignization: 钟表的指针即将指向银行闭馆的时刻，一般性的谈话的趋势都汇聚在了洛里先生的办公桌旁。他好奇地把信举起来；蒙西尼尔通过那个阴谋和愤怒的难民的身份看着这封信；蒙西尼尔通过那个阴谋和愤怒的难民的身份看着这封信；还有这个，那个，和别人，都用法语或英语说了一些贬低失踪侯爵的话。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The hands of the clock verging upon the hour of closing the Bank, there was a general set of the current of talkers past Mr. Lorry’s desk. He held the letter out inquiringly; and Monseigneur looked at it, in the person of this plotting and indignant refugee; and Monseigneur looked at it in the person of that plotting and indignant refugee; and This, That, and The Other, all had something disparaging to say, in French or in English, concerning the Marquis who was not to be found.

source: But, though the bank was almost always with him, and though the coach (in a confused way, like the presence of pain under an opiate) was always with him, there was another current of impression that never ceased to run, all through the night. He was on his way to dig some one out of a grave.
domestication: 然而，尽管银行的事务几乎总是伴随在他身边，尽管马车（就像麻醉剂下的疼痛一般模糊地存在）也总是在他的脑海里挥之不去，但他心里始终有另一股无法停止的念头：他正前往挖掘某个坟墓，去解救埋葬其中的人。
foreignization: 但是，尽管银行几乎总是在他身边，尽管马车（以一种混乱的方式，像鸦片下的痛苦存在一样）总是在他身边，但有一种印象的流动从未停止，整夜都在流淌。他正在赶去挖掘某个人从坟墓中出来。

source: “Pretty witness,” he muttered, looking down into his glass. “I have had enough of witnesses to-day and to-night; who’s your pretty witness?”
domestication: 他低头看着杯子嘟囔道：“好一个漂亮的证人啊。”今天和今晚我已经见过够多证人了，你说的漂亮证人是谁呀？
foreignization: “漂亮的证人，”他自言自语，望着手中的酒杯，“我今天和今晚已经受够了证人；谁是你的漂亮证人？”

“Pretty witness,” he muttered, looking down into his glass. “I have had enough of witnesses to-day and to-night; who’s your pretty witness?”
“漂亮的证人，”他自言自语，望着手中的酒杯，“我今天和今晚已经受够了证人；谁是你的漂亮证人？”

source: Dress was the one unfailing talisman and charm used for keeping all things in their places. Everybody was dressed for a Fancy Ball that was never to leave off. From the Palace of the Tuileries, through Monseigneur and the whole Court, through the Chambers, the Tribunals of Justice, and all society (except the scarecrows), the Fancy Ball descended to the Common Executioner: who, in pursuance of the charm, was required to officiate “frizzled, powdered, in a gold-laced coat, pumps, and white silk stockings.” At the gallows and the wheel—the axe was a rarity—Monsieur Paris, as it was the episcopal mode among his brother Professors of the provinces, Monsieur Orleans, and the rest, to call him, presided in this dainty dress. And who among the company at Monseigneur’s reception in that seventeen hundred and eightieth year of our Lord, could possibly doubt, that a system rooted in a frizzled hangman, powdered, gold-laced, pumped, and white-silk stockinged, would see the very stars out!
domestication: 穿着是保持一切正常运转的唯一可靠的护身符和魅力。在那时，每个人都打扮得漂漂亮亮，就像要去参加一个永不结束的化装舞会一样。从杜乐丽宫到蒙西尼尔和整个皇廷，从议会到司法机构，乃至整个社会（除了那些穷酸鬼），这种浮夸的风气一直蔓延到行刑官身上。即使是执行死刑的时候，行刑官也必须“头发弄得油光锃亮，身上抹着粉，穿着金色镶边的外套，戴着高跟鞋，穿着白丝袜”。在绞刑架和轮刑台旁（因为斧头已经很少用了），巴黎先生——正如他在省里的同行们，奥尔良先生等人所说的那样——穿着这身漂亮的衣服主持执行。谁能怀疑，在一七八零年，蒙西尼尔举办招待会时，那些衣冠楚楚的客人会认为，这种以行刑官为代表的制度，哪怕天翻地覆，也会安然无恙呢？
foreignization: 服装是保持一切东西在其位置的唯一可靠的护身符和魅力。每个人都打扮得像要去参加一个永不结束的花样舞会。从杜伊勒里宫，经过蒙西尼尔和整个朝廷，经过议会，司法法院和整个社会（除了稻草人），花样舞会一直延伸到普通刽子手：按照这种魅力的要求，他必须穿着“卷发、洒粉、镶金线的大衣、鞋和白丝袜”来执行职务。在绞刑架和车轮——斧头很少见——巴黎先生，如同他同行中的主教模式一样，他的兄弟教授们在省份中，他被称为奥尔良先生和其他人，在这种精致的服装中担任主持人。而在那一七八零年，我们主的年份，谁在蒙西尼尔接待会上的宾客中能怀疑，一种植根于卷发、洒粉、镶金线、鞋子和白丝袜的刽子手的体系，会看到星星熄灭！

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Dress was the one unfailing talisman and charm used for keeping all things in their places. Everybody was dressed for a Fancy Ball that was never to leave off. From the Palace of the Tuileries, through Monseigneur and the whole Court, through the Chambers, the Tribunals of Justice, and all society (except the scarecrows), the Fancy Ball descended to the Common Executioner: who, in pursuance of the charm, was required to officiate “frizzled, powdered, in a gold-laced coat, pumps, and white silk stockings.” At the gallows and the wheel—the axe was a rarity—Monsieur Paris, as it was the episcopal mode among his brother Professors of the provinces, Monsieur Orleans, and the rest, to call him, presided in this dainty dress. And who among the company at Monseigneur’s reception in that seventeen hundred and eightieth year of our Lord, could possibly doubt, that a system rooted in a frizzled hangman, powdered, gold-laced, pumped, and white-silk stockinged, would see the very stars out!

From the Palace of the Tuileries, through Monseigneur and the whole Court, through the Chambers, the Tribunals of Justice, and all society (except the scarecrows), the Fancy Ball descended to the Common Executioner: who, in pursuance of the charm, was required to officiate “frizzled, powdered, in a gold-laced coat, pumps, and white silk stockings.” At the gallows and the wheel—the axe was a rarity—Monsieur Paris, as it was the episcopal mode among his brother Professors of the provinces, Monsieur Orleans, and the rest, to call him, presided in this dainty dress. And who among the company at Monseigneur’s reception in that seventeen hundred and eightieth year of our Lord, could possibly doubt, that a system rooted in a frizzled hangman, powdered, gold-laced, pumped, and white-silk stockinged, would see the very stars out!

服装是保持一切东西在其位置的唯一可靠的护身符和魅力。每个人都打扮得像要去参加一个永不结束的花样舞会。从杜伊勒里宫，经过蒙西尼尔和整个朝廷，经过议会，司法法院和整个社会（除了稻草人），花样舞会一直延伸到普通刽子手：按照这种魅力的要求，他必须穿着“卷发、洒粉、镶金线的大衣、鞋和白丝袜”来执行职务。在绞刑架和车轮——斧头很少见——巴黎先生，如同他同行中的主教模式一样，他的兄弟教授们在省份中，他被称为奥尔良先生和其他人，在这种精致的服装中担任主持人。而在那一七八零年，我们主的年份，谁在蒙西尼尔接待会上的宾客中能怀疑，一种植根于卷发、洒粉、镶金线、鞋子和白丝袜的刽子手的体系，会看到星星熄灭！

source: “Be comforted!” he said, “I am not worth such feeling, Miss Manette. An hour or two hence, and the low companions and low habits that I scorn but yield to, will render me less worth such tears as those, than any wretch who creeps along the streets. Be comforted! But, within myself, I shall always be, towards you, what I am now, though outwardly I shall be what you have heretofore seen me. The last supplication but one I make to you, is, that you will believe this of me.”
domestication: "放心吧！"他说，“我不值得你这么难过，曼妮特小姐。再过一两个小时，我就会回到那些卑劣的朋友和习惯中，虽然我轻蔑他们，但又无法自拔，这样我就不配你为我流下这么宝贵的眼泪。任何街头流浪的人都比我强。放心吧！但在我的内心深处，我对你的感情永远不会改变，即使外表上我还是以前那个样子。除了最后一次请求外，我现在只求你相信这一点。"
foreignization: “请安慰自己！”他说，“我不值得你有这样的感受，曼妮特小姐。一两个小时后，我所鄙视但屈从的那些下流的伙伴和下流的习惯，将使我比街上匍匐前行的任何可怜虫更不值得你流这样的眼泪。请安慰自己！但是，在我内心深处，我将永远对你像现在这样，虽然在外表上我将会是你以前看到的那样。我向你提出的最后一个请求之一，就是你要相信这一点。”

source: “I speak, miss, of twenty years ago. He married—an English lady—and I was one of the trustees. His affairs, like the affairs of many other French gentlemen and French families, were entirely in Tellson’s hands. In a similar way I am, or I have been, trustee of one kind or other for scores of our customers. These are mere business relations, miss; there is no friendship in them, no particular interest, nothing like sentiment. I have passed from one to another, in the course of my business life, just as I pass from one of our customers to another in the course of my business day; in short, I have no feelings; I am a mere machine. To go on—”
domestication: "姑娘，我说的是二十年前的事了。他娶了一个英国女人，而我是他财产的监护人之一。他的事务，就像许多其他法国绅士和家庭一样，全都由泰尔森公司打理。我也曾是我们许多客户的某种形式的监护人。这一切只是生意上的关系，姑娘，并不包含友谊、特别的兴趣或情感。我在整个商业生涯中，从一个客户转到另一个，就像我在工作日从一笔业务转到另一笔业务；总之，我没有感情，我只是机器。继续往下说..."
foreignization: “我说，小姐，是二十年前的事。他结婚了——一位英国淑女——而我是信托人之一。他的事务，就像许多其他法国绅士和法国家庭的那样，全都由特尔森公司打理。在类似的方式上，我曾经或现在是各种形式的信托人为我们的许多客户服务。这些仅仅是生意上的关系，小姐；它们之间没有友谊，没有特别的兴趣，一点情感也没有。我在我的商业生涯中，从一个人转到另一个人，就像我在我的工作日中，从一个客户转到另一个客户一样；简而言之，我没有感情；我只是一个机器。继续来说——”

messages_domestication.content:

source: The garret, built to be a depository for firewood and the like, was dim and dark: for, the window of dormer shape, was in truth a door in the roof, with a little crane over it for the hoisting up of stores from the street: unglazed, and closing up the middle in two pieces, like any other door of French construction. To exclude the cold, one half of this door was fast closed, and the other was opened but a very little way. Such a scanty portion of light was admitted through these means, that it was difficult, on first coming in, to see anything; and long habit alone could have slowly formed in any one, the ability to do any work requiring nicety in such obscurity. Yet, work of that kind was being done in the garret; for, with his back towards the door, and his face towards the window where the keeper of the wine-shop stood looking at him, a white-haired man sat on a low bench, stooping forward and very busy, making shoes.
domestication: 阁楼原本是用来堆放柴火之类的东西的地方，光线很暗淡。因为阁楼的窗户是阁楼式的，实际上它是一扇屋顶的门，门上还安装着一个小型吊车，用来从街上提起物品。窗户没有玻璃，像其他法国式的门一样，是由两扇组成的。为了保持温暖，一半的门紧紧关着，另一半只开了一条缝。这样，只有很少的一部分光线可以透进来，刚刚进来时，几乎什么都看不见。只有长期在这里工作的人，才能慢慢适应这样的环境，学会在如此昏暗的光线下做一些细致的工作。而现在，这样的工作正在阁楼里进行着。一个白发老人背对着门，面对着窗户，他弯着腰，非常专注地坐在一个矮凳上，为人制作鞋子。酒馆老板站在窗外看着他。
foreignization: 阁楼，本来是用来贮存柴火等东西的，昏暗无光。因为，那阁楼窗的形状，是真正的一扇门，门上方有一个小型的起重机，用来从街上吊起货物：门没有安装玻璃，像法国式建筑里其他的门一样，是分成两半的。为了隔绝寒冷，这扇门的一半紧紧关闭，另一半只开了一条很小的缝。通过这样的方式，进来的光线非常稀少，以至于刚进来的时候，什么都看不见；只有长期的习惯才能使人慢慢具备在这样的黑暗中进行需要精细操作的工作能力。然而，这样的工作正在阁楼里进行；因为，背对着门，面对着窗户的老人，弯着腰，很忙，正在制作鞋子，而酒馆老板站在窗户那里看着他。

To exclude the cold, one half of this door was fast closed, and the other was opened but a very little way. Such a scanty portion of light was admitted through these means, that it was difficult, on first coming in, to see anything; and long habit alone could have slowly formed in any one, the ability to do any work requiring nicety in such obscurity. Yet, work of that kind was being done in the garret; for, with his back towards the door, and his face towards the window where the keeper of the wine-shop stood looking at him, a white-haired man sat on a low bench, stooping forward and very busy, making shoes.

source: It was characteristic of this lady (as of some other people before her time and since) that whenever her original proposition was questioned, she exaggerated it.
domestication: 这种人的特点就是，当别人质疑她的观点时，她会变得更加固执和武断。她越辩越偏，这种倾向不仅出现在她身上，也在其他人身上出现过。
foreignization: 这位女士（以及她之前和之后的一些其他人）有一个特点：每当她的最初论点受到质疑时，她都会夸大它。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It was characteristic of this lady (as of some other people before her time and since) that whenever her original proposition was questioned, she exaggerated it.
这种人的特点就是，当别人质疑她的观点时，她会变得更加固执和武断。她越辩越偏，这种倾向不仅出现在她身上，也在其他人身上出现过。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It was characteristic of this lady (as of some other people before her time and since) that whenever her original proposition was questioned, she exaggerated it.
这位女士（以及她之前和之后的一些其他人）有一个特点：每当她的最初论点受到质疑时，她都会夸大它。

source: He was not long in discovering that it was worse than useless to speak to him, since, on being pressed, he became worried. He abandoned that attempt on the first day, and resolved merely to keep himself always before him, as a silent protest against the delusion into which he had fallen, or was falling. He remained, therefore, in his seat near the window, reading and writing, and expressing in as many pleasant and natural ways as he could think of, that it was a free place.
domestication: 他很快就发现跟那个人说话不仅没用，还会让他更加烦恼。所以他在第一天就放弃了跟他沟通的尝试，决定沉默不语，只是时刻站在他面前，用自己的存在来对他产生影响，抵制他的错误想法。他一直坐在窗边，读书、写字，尽量表现得自然随和，让对方感觉到这是一个轻松自由的地方。
foreignization: 他很快发现跟他说话不仅没有用，反而会使他更加烦恼，因为一旦被催促，他就会变得烦躁。他在第一天就放弃了这种尝试，决心只要一直站在他面前，作为对他所陷入的或即将陷入的妄想的沉默抗议。他仍然坐在窗户旁边的座位上，阅读和写作，并以他能想到的尽可能多的令人愉快和自然的方式表达，这是一个自由的地方。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He was not long in discovering that it was worse than useless to speak to him, since, on being pressed, he became worried. He abandoned that attempt on the first day, and resolved merely to keep himself always before him, as a silent protest against the delusion into which he had fallen, or was falling. He remained, therefore, in his seat near the window, reading and writing, and expressing in as many pleasant and natural ways as he could think of, that it was a free place.
他很快就发现跟那个人说话不仅没用，还会让他更加烦恼。所以他在第一天就放弃了跟他沟通的尝试，决定沉默不语，只是时刻站在他面前，用自己的存在来对他产生影响，抵制他的错误想法。他一直坐在窗边，读书、写字，尽量表现得自然随和，让对方感觉到这是一个轻松自由的地方。

source: Naturally struck by the disagreeable word, Charles Darnay requested the speaker to take notice that he was a free traveller and French citizen, in charge of an escort which the disturbed state of the country had imposed upon him, and which he had paid for.
domestication: 查尔斯·达尼被那讨厌的话弄得很不舒服，于是他要求说这话的人注意一下自己的身份，他是一名自由旅行者和法国公民，因为国家动乱的原因不得不有护卫陪同，而这些费用都是他自己出的。
foreignization: 被不愉快的话所刺激，查尔斯·达尼要求演讲者注意到，他是一个自由旅行者和法国公民，由于这个国家处于动荡状态而被强加给他的护送团，他已经为此付费。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Naturally struck by the disagreeable word, Charles Darnay requested the speaker to take notice that he was a free traveller and French citizen, in charge of an escort which the disturbed state of the country had imposed upon him, and which he had paid for.
查尔斯·达尼被那讨厌的话弄得很不舒服，于是他要求说这话的人注意一下自己的身份，他是一名自由旅行者和法国公民，因为国家动乱的原因不得不有护卫陪同，而这些费用都是他自己出的。

messages_foreignization.content:

Naturally struck by the disagreeable word, Charles Darnay requested the speaker to take notice that he was a free traveller and French citizen, in charge of an escort which the disturbed state of the country had imposed upon him, and which he had paid for.
被不愉快的话所刺激，查尔斯·达尼要求演讲者注意到，他是一个自由旅行者和法国公民，由于这个国家处于动荡状态而被强加给他的护送团，他已经为此付费。

source: “That’s business,” said Mr. Lorry, resuming on the shortest notice his methodical manners; “and if business is to be done, I had better do it.”
domestication: "这就是工作嘛，”洛里先生话锋一转，又恢复了他一贯的办事讲究，“既然要办事，那我就来办吧。”
foreignization: “那是生意，”洛里先生说着，几乎没有任何犹豫就恢复了他一贯的办事方式；“如果需要处理生意，我最好亲自去办。”

messages_domestication.content:

“That’s business,” said Mr. Lorry, resuming on the shortest notice his methodical manners; “and if business is to be done, I had better do it.”
"这就是工作嘛，”洛里先生话锋一转，又恢复了他一贯的办事讲究，“既然要办事，那我就来办吧。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“That’s business,” said Mr. Lorry, resuming on the shortest notice his methodical manners; “and if business is to be done, I had better do it.”
“那是生意，”洛里先生说着，几乎没有任何犹豫就恢复了他一贯的办事方式；“如果需要处理生意，我最好亲自去办。”

source: “I do not show the soldiers that I recognise the tall man; he does not show the soldiers that he recognises me; we do it, and we know it, with our eyes. ‘Come on!’ says the chief of that company, pointing to the village, ‘bring him fast to his tomb!’ and they bring him faster. I follow. His arms are swelled because of being bound so tight, his wooden shoes are large and clumsy, and he is lame. Because he is lame, and consequently slow, they drive him with their guns—like this!”
domestication: 我没有向士兵表明我认识那个高个子男人，而他也没有向士兵表明他认识我。我们只是用眼神交流，心照不宣。士兵头目朝村庄一指，大喊：“快把他带到坟墓那儿去！”于是他们加快了脚步。我跟在后面。那个高个子男人因为被绑得太紧，胳膊都肿起来了，他穿着的木屐又大又笨重，还有腿伤走路一瘸一拐。由于他行动慢，他们就用枪托赶他——就像这样！
foreignization: "我没有向士兵们展示我认识那个高个子男人；他也没有向士兵们展示他认识我；我们通过我们的眼睛做到了这一点，我们知道这一点。" 那个连的首领说，指着村庄，"快点！把他带到他的坟墓那里！" 于是他们加快了速度。我跟在后面。他的手臂肿胀是因为绑得太紧，他的木屐又大又笨重，而且他还跛脚。因为他跛脚，所以行动很慢，他们用枪托赶他——就像这样！"

messages_domestication.content:

I follow. His arms are swelled because of being bound so tight, his wooden shoes are large and clumsy, and he is lame. Because he is lame, and consequently slow, they drive him with their guns—like this!”

source: A murky red and yellow sky, and a rising mist from the Seine, denoted the approach of darkness. It was almost dark when they arrived at the Bank. The stately residence of Monseigneur was altogether blighted and deserted. Above a heap of dust and ashes in the court, ran the letters: National Property. Republic One and Indivisible. Liberty, Equality, Fraternity, or Death!
domestication: 天空中红黄色的云层阴沉沉的，塞纳河上升起一层雾气，预示着夜幕即将降临。当他们到达银行的时候，天色已经渐暗。蒙西尼尔的豪宅原本壮丽堂皇，但现在却变得破败冷清。院子里满是尘土和灰烬，上面有一块匾额，歪歪斜斜地写着几个字：“国有财产， Republic 一统天下，自由、平等、博爱，否则就只有死路一条！”
foreignization: 一片浑浊的红色和黄色的天空，塞纳河上升起的雾气，标志着黑暗的临近。当他们到达银行的时候，天色几乎已经黑了。蒙西尼尔的宏伟住宅完全荒废和被遗弃。在庭院里尘土和灰烬堆中间，有行字迹：国有财产，一个不可分割的共和国，自由，平等，博爱，否则就是死亡！

The stately residence of Monseigneur was altogether blighted and deserted. Above a heap of dust and ashes in the court, ran the letters: National Property. Republic One and Indivisible. Liberty, Equality, Fraternity, or Death!

source: As to the strength of his case, he had not a doubt about it, but clearly saw his way to the verdict. Argued with the jury on substantial worldly grounds—the only grounds ever worth taking into account—it was a plain case, and had not a weak spot in it. He called himself for the plaintiff, there was no getting over his evidence, the counsel for the defendant threw up his brief, and the jury did not even turn to consider. After trying it, Stryver, C. J., was satisfied that no plainer case could be.
domestication: 至于案件的强度，他没有任何疑虑，清清楚楚地看到判决的结果。从实际的角点出发，与陪审团辩论，这个案件很简单明了，没有任何漏洞。他作为原告出庭作证，证词十分有力，无法被驳斥，被告的律师放弃了辩护，陪审团甚至没花时间商量就做出了判决。在经过审理后，首席法官斯特赖弗满意地认为，这是一个再明确不过的案件。
foreignization: 至于他案件的强度，他对此毫无疑问，清楚地看到了判决的结果。在与陪审团就实质性世俗理由进行辩论时——这是唯一值得考虑的理由——这是一件明显的案件，并且没有一个弱点。他自称为原告，有他的证据无法超越，被告的律师放弃了他的简报，陪审团甚至不需要商议。经过审理，Stryver，C. J.，相信不会有更明显的案件了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As to the strength of his case, he had not a doubt about it, but clearly saw his way to the verdict. Argued with the jury on substantial worldly grounds—the only grounds ever worth taking into account—it was a plain case, and had not a weak spot in it. He called himself for the plaintiff, there was no getting over his evidence, the counsel for the defendant threw up his brief, and the jury did not even turn to consider. After trying it, Stryver, C. J., was satisfied that no plainer case could be.
至于案件的强度，他没有任何疑虑，清清楚楚地看到判决的结果。从实际的角点出发，与陪审团辩论，这个案件很简单明了，没有任何漏洞。他作为原告出庭作证，证词十分有力，无法被驳斥，被告的律师放弃了辩护，陪审团甚至没花时间商量就做出了判决。在经过审理后，首席法官斯特赖弗满意地认为，这是一个再明确不过的案件。

Argued with the jury on substantial worldly grounds—the only grounds ever worth taking into account—it was a plain case, and had not a weak spot in it. J., was satisfied that no plainer case could be.
至于他案件的强度，他对此毫无疑问，清楚地看到了判决的结果。在与陪审团就实质性世俗理由进行辩论时——这是唯一值得考虑的理由——这是一件明显的案件，并且没有一个弱点。他自称为原告，有他的证据无法超越，被告的律师放弃了他的简报，陪审团甚至不需要商议。经过审理，Stryver，C. J.，相信不会有更明显的案件了。

source: At length, a person better informed on the merits of the case, tumbled against him, and from this person he learned that the funeral was the funeral of one Roger Cly.
domestication: 最后，碰巧遇到一位对情况比较了解的人，这个人无意中告诉他，那场葬礼竟然是为一个叫罗杰·克莱的人举行的。
foreignization: 最后，有一个人对案件的价值有了更深的了解，碰到了他，并从这个人那里得知，这场葬礼是罗杰·克莱（Roger Cly）的葬礼。

source: Mr. Lorry said what he could to calm her, and went himself into the Doctor’s room. The bench was turned towards the light, as it had been when he had seen the shoemaker at his work before, and his head was bent down, and he was very busy.
domestication: 洛里先生尽可能地安慰了她，然后自己走进了医生的房间。他发现凳子还是跟之前他看到鞋匠工作时一样朝着光源摆放，鞋匠的头又低下去了，正在专心忙活。
foreignization: 洛里先生尽力安慰她，然后他自己走进了医生的房间，长椅朝着灯光摆放着，就像他以前看到鞋匠工作时那样，他的头低着，正忙得不可开交。

Mr. Lorry said what he could to calm her, and went himself into the Doctor’s room. The bench was turned towards the light, as it had been when he had seen the shoemaker at his work before, and his head was bent down, and he was very busy.

source: “In her name, then, let it be done; I sanction it. But, I would not take it away while he was present. Let it be removed when he is not there; let him miss his old companion after an absence.”
domestication: 就这样吧，我同意了。但是，我不想当着他的面拿走它。等他不在的时候再带走吧，让他在离开后感觉少了点什么。
foreignization: “那么，就以她的名义来做吧；我批准了。但是，我不会在他在场的时候带走它。等他不在的时候再带走吧；让他在离开后怀念他的老朋友。”

messages_domestication.content:

“In her name, then, let it be done; I sanction it. But, I would not take it away while he was present. Let it be removed when he is not there; let him miss his old companion after an absence.”

“In her name, then, let it be done; I sanction it. But, I would not take it away while he was present. Let it be removed when he is not there; let him miss his old companion after an absence.”
“那么，就以她的名义来做吧；我批准了。但是，我不会在他在场的时候带走它。等他不在的时候再带走吧；让他在离开后怀念他的老朋友。”

source: A large cask of wine had been dropped and broken, in the street. The accident had happened in getting it out of a cart; the cask had tumbled out with a run, the hoops had burst, and it lay on the stones just outside the door of the wine-shop, shattered like a walnut-shell.
domestication: 有一桶酒被丢下来摔碎了，就在街上。出事的时候，是从一辆马车上卸货，酒桶滚出来就没有停下来，木桶的铁箍都爆开了，摔在了葡萄酒店门外的石头地上，就像核桃壳一样碎成几瓣。
foreignization: 一大桶酒被丢落并破碎，在街上。 这起事故发生在将它从一辆马车上卸下来的时候； 桶子伴着一声巨响滚了出来，铁箍突然破裂，它就躺在葡萄酒店门外的石头路面上，像核桃壳一样破碎。

一大桶酒被丢落并破碎，在街上。 这起事故发生在将它从一辆马车上卸下来的时候； 桶子伴着一声巨响滚了出来，铁箍突然破裂，它就躺在葡萄酒店门外的石头路面上，像核桃壳一样破碎。

source: “Courage, my dear Lucie,” said Mr. Lorry, as he raised her. “Courage, courage! So far all goes well with us—much, much better than it has of late gone with many poor souls. Cheer up, and have a thankful heart.”
domestication: 洛里先生一边搀扶卢西起来，一边鼓励她说：“卢西，孩子，要勇敢啊！到目前为止，我们还算幸运，远比许多可怜的人好得多。尽管振作起来吧，心存感激才是。”
foreignization: "勇气，我的亲爱的露西，”洛里先生一边说，一边扶她起来。“勇气，勇气！到目前为止，一切对我们来说都很好——比最近很多可怜的人过得要好得多。振作起来，心存感激。”

“Courage, my dear Lucie,” said Mr. Lorry, as he raised her. “Courage, courage! So far all goes well with us—much, much better than it has of late gone with many poor souls. Cheer up, and have a thankful heart.”
洛里先生一边搀扶卢西起来，一边鼓励她说：“卢西，孩子，要勇敢啊！到目前为止，我们还算幸运，远比许多可怜的人好得多。尽管振作起来吧，心存感激才是。”

“Courage, my dear Lucie,” said Mr. Lorry, as he raised her. “Courage, courage! So far all goes well with us—much, much better than it has of late gone with many poor souls. Cheer up, and have a thankful heart.”
"勇气，我的亲爱的露西，”洛里先生一边说，一边扶她起来。“勇气，勇气！到目前为止，一切对我们来说都很好——比最近很多可怜的人过得要好得多。振作起来，心存感激。”

source: The chateau was left to itself to flame and burn. In the roaring and raging of the conflagration, a red-hot wind, driving straight from the infernal regions, seemed to be blowing the edifice away. With the rising and falling of the blaze, the stone faces showed as if they were in torment. When great masses of stone and timber fell, the face with the two dints in the nose became obscured: anon struggled out of the smoke again, as if it were the face of the cruel Marquis, burning at the stake and contending with the fire.
domestication: 城堡任由大火吞噬，熊熊烈焰在怒吼和肆虐，火势像一阵来自地狱的热风，似乎要把整个城堡都吹散。随着火焰的上下舞动，石头上的面孔仿佛在受折磨一般。每当大量石头和木梁坠落时，鼻子上有两个凹陷的那张脸就会被遮蔽，但很快又会从烟雾中挣扎出来，就好像是残酷侯爵本人，在火刑柱上被烧而与火焰搏斗一般。
foreignization: 城堡被任其自燃烧毁。在熊熊烈火的呼啸和肆虐中，一股从地狱深处直吹而来的红热风似乎正在将建筑物吹得粉碎。随着火焰的升腾和落下，石头面孔仿佛在受折磨一般。当大量石头和木梁坠落时，鼻子上有两个凹陷的面孔变得模糊不清：转瞬间，又从烟雾中挣扎着显现出来，仿佛那是残酷的侯爵被绑在火刑柱上，与火焰搏斗的面容。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The chateau was left to itself to flame and burn. In the roaring and raging of the conflagration, a red-hot wind, driving straight from the infernal regions, seemed to be blowing the edifice away. With the rising and falling of the blaze, the stone faces showed as if they were in torment. When great masses of stone and timber fell, the face with the two dints in the nose became obscured: anon struggled out of the smoke again, as if it were the face of the cruel Marquis, burning at the stake and contending with the fire.

城堡被任其自燃烧毁。在熊熊烈火的呼啸和肆虐中，一股从地狱深处直吹而来的红热风似乎正在将建筑物吹得粉碎。随着火焰的升腾和落下，石头面孔仿佛在受折磨一般。当大量石头和木梁坠落时，鼻子上有两个凹陷的面孔变得模糊不清：转瞬间，又从烟雾中挣扎着显现出来，仿佛那是残酷的侯爵被绑在火刑柱上，与火焰搏斗的面容。

source: His streaming white hair, his remarkable face, and the impetuous confidence of his manner, as he put the weapons aside like water, carried him in an instant to the heart of the concourse at the stone. For a few moments there was a pause, and a hurry, and a murmur, and the unintelligible sound of his voice; and then Mr. Lorry saw him, surrounded by all, and in the midst of a line of twenty men long, all linked shoulder to shoulder, and hand to shoulder, hurried out with cries of—“Live the Bastille prisoner! Help for the Bastille prisoner’s kindred in La Force! Room for the Bastille prisoner in front there! Save the prisoner Evrémonde at La Force!” and a thousand answering shouts.
domestication: 他那一头白发如银河泻地般倾泻而下，他那张脸如同一件艺术品般令人惊叹，他的举止中透出一股大胆的自信，仿佛他只是随手将武器放在了一边。当他出现在石头前的广场上时，人群顿时一阵骚动，大家你一言我一语，议论纷纷，人们的目光都聚集在了他的身上。短暂的沉默后，人群开始变得喧闹起来，大家七嘴八舌地喊叫着。洛瑞先生看到他被众人围住，站在一条长长的队伍的中间，这条队伍由二十个男人组成，他们肩并肩，手挽手，高呼着口号：“巴士底狱囚徒万岁！帮助巴士底狱囚徒的家人在拉福斯！让开，给巴士底狱囚徒让路！救救拉福斯的厄弗门德囚徒！” 人群中爆发出千声附和的欢呼。
foreignization: 他那飘逸的白发，他那令人难忘的面容，以及他将武器像水一样随手放置时流露出的冲动的自信，令他在瞬间来到了石头场合的中心。有一刻钟，大家陷入了片刻的停顿、忙乱和喧哗之中，充满着他那听不懂的说话声；然后，劳瑞先生看见他被所有人围绕着，处在一条长达二十人的队伍的中间，所有人都肩并肩，手挽手，边喊叫着“巴士底监狱囚徒万岁！为巴士底监狱囚徒的亲属在拉福斯提供帮助！前面给巴士底监狱囚徒让路！救救拉福斯的埃弗芒德囚徒！”边急忙离开，引来千百声呼应的喊声。

source: “Five paces by four and a half, five paces by four and a half, five paces by four and a half.” The prisoner walked to and fro in his cell, counting its measurement, and the roar of the city arose like muffled drums with a wild swell of voices added to them. “He made shoes, he made shoes, he made shoes.” The prisoner counted the measurement again, and paced faster, to draw his mind with him from that latter repetition. “The ghosts that vanished when the wicket closed. There was one among them, the appearance of a lady dressed in black, who was leaning in the embrasure of a window, and she had a light shining upon her golden hair, and she looked like * * * * Let us ride on again, for God’s sake, through the illuminated villages with the people all awake! * * * * He made shoes, he made shoes, he made shoes. * * * * Five paces by four and a half.” With such scraps tossing and rolling upward from the depths of his mind, the prisoner walked faster and faster, obstinately counting and counting; and the roar of the city changed to this extent—that it still rolled in like muffled drums, but with the wail of voices that he knew, in the swell that rose above them.
domestication: 囚犯在牢房里来回踱步，数着房间的尺寸，一边数一边低声念叨：“五步长四步半宽，五步长四步半宽……”城市的声音如同闷鼓般响起，夹杂着人们的喧闹声。囚犯又开始数房间的尺寸，边数边加快脚步，想把自己的思绪从那些不断重复的记忆中拉回来。他又一次数了尺寸，走得更快了。突然，他想起了关门后消失的鬼魂，其中有一个穿着黑色衣服的女人，她站在窗户的凹陷处，金发在灯光下闪耀，容貌……哎，还是让我们继续赶路吧，穿过那些灯火通明的村庄，那里的人都还醒着呢！囚犯的思绪又回到了鞋匠的工作上，“他做鞋，他做鞋，他做鞋……”他边走边数，房间的尺寸又浮现在他的脑海里，“五步长四步半宽……”囚犯的思绪就这样翻腾着，像海浪般涌动，他加快了脚步，固执地数着尺寸。城市的声音仍然如同闷鼓般隆隆作响，但里面似乎还夹杂着他熟悉的哭泣声，这声音随着人潮的涌动而高涨起来。
foreignization: “五步乘以四又半，五步乘以四又半，五步乘以四又半。”囚犯在他的牢房里来回走着，数着牢房的尺寸，城市的声音像闷声的鼓一样响起，并且伴随着一阵阵狂野的、混杂了各种声音的喧嚣。“他制作鞋子，他制作鞋子，他制作鞋子。”囚犯再次数着牢房的尺寸，走得更快，试图将他的思绪从最后一次重复中引开。“当小门关上时消失的幽灵。在他们之中，有一个女人穿着黑色的衣服，她靠在窗户的凹陷处，头发上有一束光芒照耀着，她看起来像* * * *让我们再次骑马穿过灯火辉煌的村庄，所有人都醒着！* * * *他制作鞋子，他制作鞋子，他制作鞋子。* * * *五步乘以四又半。”囚犯这样碎步行走，思想深处涌现出片段，翻滚着向上涌动，他走得更快、更快，固执地数着、数着；城市的声音变化了——它仍然像闷声的鼓一样滚滚而来，但伴随着他熟悉的哀号声，溢于其上的浪潮中充满了那些声音。

source: “What is the matter?” asked the passenger, then, with mildly quavering speech. “Who wants me? Is it Jerry?”
domestication: “怎么了？”乘客问道，他的说话声微微颤抖。“谁在叫我？是杰瑞吗？”
foreignization: “怎么回事？”乘客随后问道，他的话语中带着微微的颤抖，“谁在叫我？是杰瑞吗？”

source: “Keep near to me, Jacques Three,” cried Defarge; “and do you, Jacques One and Two, separate and put yourselves at the head of as many of these patriots as you can. Where is my wife?”
domestication: "让雅克三紧跟着我," 德法尔热大声喊道，“至于你，雅克一和雅克二，分开去吧，带领尽可能多的爱国者冲到最前面。”他转头四周张望，问道：“我媳妇儿呢？”
foreignization: "靠近我，雅克三号，”德法尔热喊道；“至于你们，雅克一号和二号，分开去，带领尽可能多的这些爱国者站在前面。我的妻子在哪里？”

source: It had once been noted at the Bar, that while Mr. Stryver was a glib man, and an unscrupulous, and a ready, and a bold, he had not that faculty of extracting the essence from a heap of statements, which is among the most striking and necessary of the advocate’s accomplishments. But, a remarkable improvement came upon him as to this. The more business he got, the greater his power seemed to grow of getting at its pith and marrow; and however late at night he sat carousing with Sydney Carton, he always had his points at his fingers’ ends in the morning.
domestication: 在法庭上，人们曾经注意到斯特赖弗先生是一个油嘴滑舌的人，缺乏道德操守，反应快，胆子大，但是他并没有那种从大量陈述中提取精髓的能力，这是律师最引人注目和必要的才能之一。但是，他在这方面却有了显著的进步。他接到的案子越多，就越能准确地抓住案件的关键和核心；无论他晚上和悉尼·卡顿一起饮酒作乐到多晚，第二天早晨他总是能够对自己的案件了如指掌。
foreignization: 人们曾在法庭上注意到，虽然斯特莱弗先生口齿伶俐，并且无耻，并且反应敏捷，并且胆大妄为，但他没有从大量陈述中提取精髓的能力，这是律师最显著和必要的才能之一。但是，他在这方面有了显著的改进。 他接到的案件越多，他似乎越能掌握案件的核心和关键；无论他晚上与悉尼·卡顿饮酒作乐到多晚，他早上总是能够牢牢掌握案件的要点。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

It had once been noted at the Bar, that while Mr. Stryver was a glib man, and an unscrupulous, and a ready, and a bold, he had not that faculty of extracting the essence from a heap of statements, which is among the most striking and necessary of the advocate’s accomplishments. But, a remarkable improvement came upon him as to this. The more business he got, the greater his power seemed to grow of getting at its pith and marrow; and however late at night he sat carousing with Sydney Carton, he always had his points at his fingers’ ends in the morning.

source: “Not at all,” retained the ancient clerk. “Speak well of the law. Take care of your chest and voice, my good friend, and leave the law to take care of itself. I give you that advice.”
domestication: "一点也不，”老年职员说。“对法律要有好评。注意保养你的身体和嗓音，我的好朋友，让法律自己照顾自己吧。我给你这条建议。”
foreignization: “完全不，”那位年迈的职员说：“好好谈论法律吧。照顾好你的胸口和嗓音，我的好朋友，并且让法律自己照顾自己。我给你这个建议。”

“完全不，”那位年迈的职员说：“好好谈论法律吧。照顾好你的胸口和嗓音，我的好朋友，并且让法律自己照顾自己。我给你这个建议。”

source: In such risings of fire and risings of sea—the firm earth shaken by the rushes of an angry ocean which had now no ebb, but was always on the flow, higher and higher, to the terror and wonder of the beholders on the shore—three years of tempest were consumed. Three more birthdays of little Lucie had been woven by the golden thread into the peaceful tissue of the life of her home.
domestication: 就这样，大海和烈火一起爆发，固若金汤的大地被愤怒的海浪冲击得摇摇欲坠，这股怒涛没有回头路，只有越来越猛烈地向前涌去，岸边的观望者们既惊恐又惊讶地看着这一切。三年风暴岁月就这样过去了。在这三年里，小露西又过了三个生日，她的生日就像金线一样，被巧妙地织进了她家平静生活的画卷中。
foreignization: 在这种火的升起和海的升起中——坚实的大地被一个现在没有退潮、总是在涨潮的愤怒的海洋的袭击所震撼，越来越高，越来越高，让岸边的观察者感到恐惧和惊奇——三年风暴过去了。在她家里的生活的宁静织物中，织入了小露西三个更多的生日，由金线编织而成。
