“当他们像疯子一样比赛般下山时，他摔倒了。他们大笑并再次把他扶起来。他的脸在流血，满是尘土，但他却无法碰触它；于是他们再次大笑。他们把他带进村庄；整个村庄都跑来围观；他们把他从磨坊旁边带过，并一直带到监狱；整个村庄看到夜幕中的监狱大门敞开，然后把他吞没——就像这样！”

source: Its owner went downstairs into the courtyard, got into his carriage, and drove away. Not many people had talked with him at the reception; he had stood in a little space apart, and Monseigneur might have been warmer in his manner. It appeared, under the circumstances, rather agreeable to him to see the common people dispersed before his horses, and often barely escaping from being run down. His man drove as if he were charging an enemy, and the furious recklessness of the man brought no check into the face, or to the lips, of the master. The complaint had sometimes made itself audible, even in that deaf city and dumb age, that, in the narrow streets without footways, the fierce patrician custom of hard driving endangered and maimed the mere vulgar in a barbarous manner. But, few cared enough for that to think of it a second time, and, in this matter, as in all others, the common wretches were left to get out of their difficulties as they could.
domestication: 他一走下楼，来到庭院，就坐上马车，扬长而去。在招待会上，与他搭话的人并不多，他总是独自站在一旁，神态高傲。遇到这种场合，他似乎很高兴看到平民百姓在他马车前四散奔逃，经常险些被马车撞倒。他的马夫驾驶马车的样子就像是在冲锋陷阵，而马夫的狂怒并没有引起主人脸上或嘴唇上的任何反应。在那个充满喧嚣的城市和黑暗的时代，有时也能听到抱怨的声音，说在那些没有人行道的狭窄街道上，贵族们狂野的驾驶方式使得普通百姓在野蛮的状态下受到伤害和残害。但是，很少有人会关心这些事情，人们只会想一想，然后就忘记了。在这件事上，就像其他所有事情一样，普通百姓只能靠自己想办法解决困难。
foreignization: 它的主人走下楼来到庭院，上了他的马车，并驱车离去。在招待会上，没有多少人与他交谈；他站在一小块独立的空间里，莫尼塞尔在态度上可能会更温暖。在这种情况下，看着普通百姓在他的马匹前四散奔逃，常常几乎避免被践踏，对他来说似乎相当令人愉快。他的仆人开车的样子就像是在冲锋攻击敌人，而那个人狂怒的鲁莽并没有让主人脸上或嘴唇上露出任何顾虑。抱怨有时会被听到，甚至在那个聋城和哑巴时代，人们会说，在没有人行道的狭窄街道上，贵族阶层猛烈驾驶的风俗以野蛮的方式危及和残害普通老百姓。但是，很少有人关心到会再次思考这件事，在这件事上，如同其他所有事情一样，普通的可怜虫被遗弃去按照他们的方式摆脱困境。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Its owner went downstairs into the courtyard, got into his carriage, and drove away. Not many people had talked with him at the reception; he had stood in a little space apart, and Monseigneur might have been warmer in his manner. It appeared, under the circumstances, rather agreeable to him to see the common people dispersed before his horses, and often barely escaping from being run down. His man drove as if he were charging an enemy, and the furious recklessness of the man brought no check into the face, or to the lips, of the master. The complaint had sometimes made itself audible, even in that deaf city and dumb age, that, in the narrow streets without footways, the fierce patrician custom of hard driving endangered and maimed the mere vulgar in a barbarous manner. But, few cared enough for that to think of it a second time, and, in this matter, as in all others, the common wretches were left to get out of their difficulties as they could.

他一走下楼，来到庭院，就坐上马车，扬长而去。在招待会上，与他搭话的人并不多，他总是独自站在一旁，神态高傲。遇到这种场合，他似乎很高兴看到平民百姓在他马车前四散奔逃，经常险些被马车撞倒。他的马夫驾驶马车的样子就像是在冲锋陷阵，而马夫的狂怒并没有引起主人脸上或嘴唇上的任何反应。在那个充满喧嚣的城市和黑暗的时代，有时也能听到抱怨的声音，说在那些没有人行道的狭窄街道上，贵族们狂野的驾驶方式使得普通百姓在野蛮的状态下受到伤害和残害。但是，很少有人会关心这些事情，人们只会想一想，然后就忘记了。在这件事上，就像其他所有事情一样，普通百姓只能靠自己想办法解决困难。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Its owner went downstairs into the courtyard, got into his carriage, and drove away. Not many people had talked with him at the reception; he had stood in a little space apart, and Monseigneur might have been warmer in his manner. It appeared, under the circumstances, rather agreeable to him to see the common people dispersed before his horses, and often barely escaping from being run down. His man drove as if he were charging an enemy, and the furious recklessness of the man brought no check into the face, or to the lips, of the master. The complaint had sometimes made itself audible, even in that deaf city and dumb age, that, in the narrow streets without footways, the fierce patrician custom of hard driving endangered and maimed the mere vulgar in a barbarous manner. But, few cared enough for that to think of it a second time, and, in this matter, as in all others, the common wretches were left to get out of their difficulties as they could.

它的主人走下楼来到庭院，上了他的马车，并驱车离去。在招待会上，没有多少人与他交谈；他站在一小块独立的空间里，莫尼塞尔在态度上可能会更温暖。在这种情况下，看着普通百姓在他的马匹前四散奔逃，常常几乎避免被践踏，对他来说似乎相当令人愉快。他的仆人开车的样子就像是在冲锋攻击敌人，而那个人狂怒的鲁莽并没有让主人脸上或嘴唇上露出任何顾虑。抱怨有时会被听到，甚至在那个聋城和哑巴时代，人们会说，在没有人行道的狭窄街道上，贵族阶层猛烈驾驶的风俗以野蛮的方式危及和残害普通老百姓。但是，很少有人关心到会再次思考这件事，在这件事上，如同其他所有事情一样，普通的可怜虫被遗弃去按照他们的方式摆脱困境。

source: Greater things than the Doctor had at that time to contend with, would have yielded before his persevering purpose. While he kept himself in his place, as a physician, whose business was with all degrees of mankind, bond and free, rich and poor, bad and good, he used his personal influence so wisely, that he was soon the inspecting physician of three prisons, and among them of La Force. He could now assure Lucie that her husband was no longer confined alone, but was mixed with the general body of prisoners; he saw her husband weekly, and brought sweet messages to her, straight from his lips; sometimes her husband himself sent a letter to her (though never by the Doctor’s hand), but she was not permitted to write to him: for, among the many wild suspicions of plots in the prisons, the wildest of all pointed at emigrants who were known to have made friends or permanent connections abroad.
domestication: 那时候，医生面临的挑战很大，但是他坚持不懈的决心足以克服比这更艰巨的困难。当他作为一名医生，处理所有种类的病人时，他利用个人影响力，做事非常有分寸。结果，他很快就成为了三个监狱的巡诊医生，其中就包括拉弗斯监狱。他可以向露西保证，她的丈夫不再单独关押，而是和其他普通囚犯一起了。他每周都能见到她的丈夫，并且从丈夫口中带回甜蜜的消息给她；有时，她的丈夫会亲自写信给她（虽然从来没有通过医生的手），但她却不能给他写信，因为监狱里弥漫着各种各样的阴谋猜测，甚至有人怀疑那些在国外有朋友或永久居住联系的移民。这些猜测实在太过荒谬，但也使得露西无法与丈夫直接通信。
foreignization: 比医生当时所面临的更大的事情，都会在他坚持不懈的决心面前退让。当他把自己放在自己的位置上，作为一名医生，他的业务是与所有等级的人打交道，无论是奴隶还是自由人，富人还是穷人，坏人还是好人，他以极其明智的方式运用他的个人影响力，以至于不久他就成为了三个监狱的检查医生，其中包括拉福斯监狱。他现在可以向露西保证，她的丈夫不再单独被关押，而是与一般囚犯混在一起；他每周都能见到她的丈夫，并从他嘴里带来了甜蜜的信息给她；有时，她的丈夫亲自给她写信（尽管从不通过医生的手），但她不被允许给他写信：因为，在监狱中许多狂野的阴谋猜测中，最狂野的指向那些已知在国外结交朋友或建立长期联系的移民。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Greater things than the Doctor had at that time to contend with, would have yielded before his persevering purpose. While he kept himself in his place, as a physician, whose business was with all degrees of mankind, bond and free, rich and poor, bad and good, he used his personal influence so wisely, that he was soon the inspecting physician of three prisons, and among them of La Force. He could now assure Lucie that her husband was no longer confined alone, but was mixed with the general body of prisoners; he saw her husband weekly, and brought sweet messages to her, straight from his lips; sometimes her husband himself sent a letter to her (though never by the Doctor’s hand), but she was not permitted to write to him: for, among the many wild suspicions of plots in the prisons, the wildest of all pointed at emigrants who were known to have made friends or permanent connections abroad.

那时候，医生面临的挑战很大，但是他坚持不懈的决心足以克服比这更艰巨的困难。当他作为一名医生，处理所有种类的病人时，他利用个人影响力，做事非常有分寸。结果，他很快就成为了三个监狱的巡诊医生，其中就包括拉弗斯监狱。他可以向露西保证，她的丈夫不再单独关押，而是和其他普通囚犯一起了。他每周都能见到她的丈夫，并且从丈夫口中带回甜蜜的消息给她；有时，她的丈夫会亲自写信给她（虽然从来没有通过医生的手），但她却不能给他写信，因为监狱里弥漫着各种各样的阴谋猜测，甚至有人怀疑那些在国外有朋友或永久居住联系的移民。这些猜测实在太过荒谬，但也使得露西无法与丈夫直接通信。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Greater things than the Doctor had at that time to contend with, would have yielded before his persevering purpose. While he kept himself in his place, as a physician, whose business was with all degrees of mankind, bond and free, rich and poor, bad and good, he used his personal influence so wisely, that he was soon the inspecting physician of three prisons, and among them of La Force. He could now assure Lucie that her husband was no longer confined alone, but was mixed with the general body of prisoners; he saw her husband weekly, and brought sweet messages to her, straight from his lips; sometimes her husband himself sent a letter to her (though never by the Doctor’s hand), but she was not permitted to write to him: for, among the many wild suspicions of plots in the prisons, the wildest of all pointed at emigrants who were known to have made friends or permanent connections abroad.

比医生当时所面临的更大的事情，都会在他坚持不懈的决心面前退让。当他把自己放在自己的位置上，作为一名医生，他的业务是与所有等级的人打交道，无论是奴隶还是自由人，富人还是穷人，坏人还是好人，他以极其明智的方式运用他的个人影响力，以至于不久他就成为了三个监狱的检查医生，其中包括拉福斯监狱。他现在可以向露西保证，她的丈夫不再单独被关押，而是与一般囚犯混在一起；他每周都能见到她的丈夫，并从他嘴里带来了甜蜜的信息给她；有时，她的丈夫亲自给她写信（尽管从不通过医生的手），但她不被允许给他写信：因为，在监狱中许多狂野的阴谋猜测中，最狂野的指向那些已知在国外结交朋友或建立长期联系的移民。

source: He had put up a hand between his eyes and the light, and the very bones of it seemed transparent. So he sat, with a steadfastly vacant gaze, pausing in his work. He never looked at the figure before him, without first looking down on this side of himself, then on that, as if he had lost the habit of associating place with sound; he never spoke, without first wandering in this manner, and forgetting to speak.
domestication: 他用手遮住眼睛挡住了光线，手骨似乎都变得透明了。他就这样坐着，目光呆滞地凝视着前方，停下了手中的工作。每当他看向面前的那个人之前，他都会先低头看看自己左边，然后看看右边，就好像他已经忘记了声音与方位的关联一样。他从不直接说话，总是会先四处张望，结果反而忘了该说什么。这种样子，让人觉得他已经习惯了沉浸在自己的世界里，忘记了如何与外界交流。
foreignization: 他把一只手放在眼睛和光线之间，连手的骨骼似乎都变得透明了。于是，他就那样坐在那里，目光坚定地空洞，停顿了下来。他从不看面前的那个人之前，不先向自己这边看，然后再向那边看，就好像他已经失去了将位置与声音联系起来的习惯；他从不说话之前，不先以这种方式游移，并忘记说话。

source: Yes. The Loadstone Rock was drawing him, and he must sail on, until he struck. He knew of no rock; he saw hardly any danger. The intention with which he had done what he had done, even although he had left it incomplete, presented it before him in an aspect that would be gratefully acknowledged in France on his presenting himself to assert it. Then, that glorious vision of doing good, which is so often the sanguine mirage of so many good minds, arose before him, and he even saw himself in the illusion with some influence to guide this raging Revolution that was running so fearfully wild.
domestication: 是的，罗盘石像磁铁一样吸引着他，他必须继续航行，直到他到达那里。他不知道会遇到什么危险，也看不到任何危险的迹象。但他做了事，就算事情没完成，也有了一个好的开端，这让他相信在法国人面前，他的行为是值得感激的。然后，那个美好的愿景出现在他面前：他希望做好事，虽然这往往是很多善良的人心中一道光明的幻觉，但他真的看到了自己在这场狂野的革命中有一定的影响力，可以引导它走向正确的轨道。
foreignization: 是的，洛德斯通岩在吸引他，他必须航行下去，直到他撞上它。他不知道有任何岩石；他几乎看不到任何危险。他所做的一切都是出于一个目的，即使他没有完成它，这个目的也会以一种让人感激的方式呈现在他面前，当他出现在法国并坚持这一点时。然后，那个美好的愿景——做好事，这常常是很多好心人乐观的海市蜃楼——出现在他面前，他甚至在幻觉中看到自己拥有某种影响力来指导这场正在如此可怕地失控的革命。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Yes. The Loadstone Rock was drawing him, and he must sail on, until he struck. He knew of no rock; he saw hardly any danger. The intention with which he had done what he had done, even although he had left it incomplete, presented it before him in an aspect that would be gratefully acknowledged in France on his presenting himself to assert it. Then, that glorious vision of doing good, which is so often the sanguine mirage of so many good minds, arose before him, and he even saw himself in the illusion with some influence to guide this raging Revolution that was running so fearfully wild.
是的，罗盘石像磁铁一样吸引着他，他必须继续航行，直到他到达那里。他不知道会遇到什么危险，也看不到任何危险的迹象。但他做了事，就算事情没完成，也有了一个好的开端，这让他相信在法国人面前，他的行为是值得感激的。然后，那个美好的愿景出现在他面前：他希望做好事，虽然这往往是很多善良的人心中一道光明的幻觉，但他真的看到了自己在这场狂野的革命中有一定的影响力，可以引导它走向正确的轨道。

source: “It is very high; it is a little difficult. Better to begin slowly.” Thus, Monsieur Defarge, in a stern voice, to Mr. Lorry, as they began ascending the stairs.
domestication: 这楼可真高啊，要爬起来也挺费劲的。还是先慢慢来吧。”这样，德法尔热先生对洛里先生说，他们开始登上楼梯的时候，他用的竟然是那么严厉的语气。

source: “Do you suppose,” Mr. Lorry went on, with a laughing twinkle in his bright eye, as it looked kindly at her, “that Doctor Manette has any theory of his own, preserved through all those years, relative to the cause of his being so oppressed; perhaps, even to the name of his oppressor?”
domestication: 洛里先生继续说，眼睛里闪着笑意，和善地看着她：“你觉得曼尼特医生在那些年里，是不是一直怀揣着自己的想法呢？也许他甚至有主见，知道自己为什么会遭受这么大的折磨，也许他还知道自己的仇家是谁？”
foreignization: "你觉得，”罗瑞先生继续说，明亮的眼睛里闪烁着笑意，他亲切地看着她，“曼尼特博士这些年来是否仍坚持着自己的某种理论，这种理论与他被压迫的原因有关，甚至也许还涉及到他的压迫者的名字？”

洛里先生继续说，眼睛里闪着笑意，和善地看着她：“你觉得曼尼特医生在那些年里，是不是一直怀揣着自己的想法呢？也许他甚至有主见，知道自己为什么会遭受这么大的折磨，也许他还知道自己的仇家是谁？”

“Do you suppose,” Mr. Lorry went on, with a laughing twinkle in his bright eye, as it looked kindly at her, “that Doctor Manette has any theory of his own, preserved through all those years, relative to the cause of his being so oppressed; perhaps, even to the name of his oppressor?”
"你觉得，”罗瑞先生继续说，明亮的眼睛里闪烁着笑意，他亲切地看着她，“曼尼特博士这些年来是否仍坚持着自己的某种理论，这种理论与他被压迫的原因有关，甚至也许还涉及到他的压迫者的名字？”

source: “Not I!” said Stryver, whistling. “I can’t undertake to find third parties in common sense; I can only find it for myself. I suppose sense in certain quarters; you suppose mincing bread-and-butter nonsense. It’s new to me, but you are right, I dare say.”
domestication: 斯特莱弗吹着口哨说：“算了吧，我可不想去替人家琢磨什么道理，我只知道自己怎么想就行。可能在有些人看来这是有道理的，但你却认为这都是些无关痛痒的废话。说实话，我以前从没这么想过，但是你说的也许有道理。”
foreignization: “不，我！” 斯特莱佛哨了一声说：“我不能承诺在常识的基础上找第三方；我只能为自己找到它。我想，在某些时候你会假设存在一些道理；而你却假设了一些琐碎、拖泥带水的废话。这对我来说是新鲜事，但你可能是对的。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Not I!” said Stryver, whistling. “I can’t undertake to find third parties in common sense; I can only find it for myself. I suppose sense in certain quarters; you suppose mincing bread-and-butter nonsense. It’s new to me, but you are right, I dare say.”
斯特莱弗吹着口哨说：“算了吧，我可不想去替人家琢磨什么道理，我只知道自己怎么想就行。可能在有些人看来这是有道理的，但你却认为这都是些无关痛痒的废话。说实话，我以前从没这么想过，但是你说的也许有道理。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Not I!” said Stryver, whistling. “I can’t undertake to find third parties in common sense; I can only find it for myself. I suppose sense in certain quarters; you suppose mincing bread-and-butter nonsense. It’s new to me, but you are right, I dare say.”
“不，我！” 斯特莱佛哨了一声说：“我不能承诺在常识的基础上找第三方；我只能为自己找到它。我想，在某些时候你会假设存在一些道理；而你却假设了一些琐碎、拖泥带水的废话。这对我来说是新鲜事，但你可能是对的。”

source: But, he had never seen his friend in his present aspect: he had never at all known him in his present character. For the first time the Doctor felt, now, that his suffering was strength and power. For the first time he felt that in that sharp fire, he had slowly forged the iron which could break the prison door of his daughter’s husband, and deliver him. “It all tended to a good end, my friend; it was not mere waste and ruin. As my beloved child was helpful in restoring me to myself, I will be helpful now in restoring the dearest part of herself to her; by the aid of Heaven I will do it!” Thus, Doctor Manette. And when Jarvis Lorry saw the kindled eyes, the resolute face, the calm strong look and bearing of the man whose life always seemed to him to have been stopped, like a clock, for so many years, and then set going again with an energy which had lain dormant during the cessation of its usefulness, he believed.
domestication: 但是，他从未见过朋友的现在样子：他从未了解过朋友的现在性格。第一次，医生在那一刻感觉到自己的痛苦变成了力量和动力。第一次，他感觉到自己在那烈火中，慢慢锻造了能打破女婿监牢的铁棒，并且能救出他。“这一切都是为了美好的结果，我的朋友；这不是毫无意义的浪费和毁灭。就像我心爱的孩子曾帮助我恢复自我一样，我现在也会帮助她，恢复她最珍视的东西；在上天的帮助下，我一定会做到！”医生如是说。当贾维斯·洛瑞看到那双炯炯有神的眼睛、那张坚定的面容、那平静而强壮的神态和气度时，他相信了。那个人的一生似乎一直停滞不前，就像一座钟表，一直静止不动了很多年，现在却又重新开始运转，迸发出一股在沉寂中积蓄起来的能量。
foreignization: 但是，他从未见过他的朋友现在的样子：他从未了解过他现在的性格。第一次，医生现在感觉到，他的受苦是力量和力量。第一次，他觉得在那猛烈的火焰中，他慢慢地锻造了能打破他女儿的丈夫监狱门并解救他的铁器。“一切都朝着好的结果发展，我的朋友；这不仅仅是浪费和毁灭。当我心爱的孩子帮助我恢复自我的时候，我现在将会帮助恢复她自己最珍贵的部分给她；在上天的帮助下，我一定会做到！”就这样，曼尼特博士说。当贾维斯·洛里看到点燃的眼睛，坚定的面容，宁静而强壮的神情和表情，这个人的生命似乎总是停止了，就像钟表一样，多年来一直如此，而后又以一种在其有用性停止期间处于休眠状态的能量重新运转时，他相信了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, he had never seen his friend in his present aspect: he had never at all known him in his present character. For the first time the Doctor felt, now, that his suffering was strength and power. For the first time he felt that in that sharp fire, he had slowly forged the iron which could break the prison door of his daughter’s husband, and deliver him. “It all tended to a good end, my friend; it was not mere waste and ruin. As my beloved child was helpful in restoring me to myself, I will be helpful now in restoring the dearest part of herself to her; by the aid of Heaven I will do it!” Thus, Doctor Manette. And when Jarvis Lorry saw the kindled eyes, the resolute face, the calm strong look and bearing of the man whose life always seemed to him to have been stopped, like a clock, for so many years, and then set going again with an energy which had lain dormant during the cessation of its usefulness, he believed.

但是，他从未见过朋友的现在样子：他从未了解过朋友的现在性格。第一次，医生在那一刻感觉到自己的痛苦变成了力量和动力。第一次，他感觉到自己在那烈火中，慢慢锻造了能打破女婿监牢的铁棒，并且能救出他。“这一切都是为了美好的结果，我的朋友；这不是毫无意义的浪费和毁灭。就像我心爱的孩子曾帮助我恢复自我一样，我现在也会帮助她，恢复她最珍视的东西；在上天的帮助下，我一定会做到！”医生如是说。当贾维斯·洛瑞看到那双炯炯有神的眼睛、那张坚定的面容、那平静而强壮的神态和气度时，他相信了。那个人的一生似乎一直停滞不前，就像一座钟表，一直静止不动了很多年，现在却又重新开始运转，迸发出一股在沉寂中积蓄起来的能量。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

But, he had never seen his friend in his present aspect: he had never at all known him in his present character. For the first time the Doctor felt, now, that his suffering was strength and power. For the first time he felt that in that sharp fire, he had slowly forged the iron which could break the prison door of his daughter’s husband, and deliver him. “It all tended to a good end, my friend; it was not mere waste and ruin. As my beloved child was helpful in restoring me to myself, I will be helpful now in restoring the dearest part of herself to her; by the aid of Heaven I will do it!” Thus, Doctor Manette. And when Jarvis Lorry saw the kindled eyes, the resolute face, the calm strong look and bearing of the man whose life always seemed to him to have been stopped, like a clock, for so many years, and then set going again with an energy which had lain dormant during the cessation of its usefulness, he believed.

但是，他从未见过他的朋友现在的样子：他从未了解过他现在的性格。第一次，医生现在感觉到，他的受苦是力量和力量。第一次，他觉得在那猛烈的火焰中，他慢慢地锻造了能打破他女儿的丈夫监狱门并解救他的铁器。“一切都朝着好的结果发展，我的朋友；这不仅仅是浪费和毁灭。当我心爱的孩子帮助我恢复自我的时候，我现在将会帮助恢复她自己最珍贵的部分给她；在上天的帮助下，我一定会做到！”就这样，曼尼特博士说。当贾维斯·洛里看到点燃的眼睛，坚定的面容，宁静而强壮的神情和表情，这个人的生命似乎总是停止了，就像钟表一样，多年来一直如此，而后又以一种在其有用性停止期间处于休眠状态的能量重新运转时，他相信了。

source: Tellson’s Bank, established in the Saint Germain Quarter of Paris, was in a wing of a large house, approached by a courtyard and shut off from the street by a high wall and a strong gate. The house belonged to a great nobleman who had lived in it until he made a flight from the troubles, in his own cook’s dress, and got across the borders. A mere beast of the chase flying from hunters, he was still in his metempsychosis no other than the same Monseigneur, the preparation of whose chocolate for whose lips had once occupied three strong men besides the cook in question.
domestication: 泰尔森银行位于巴黎的圣日耳曼区，坐落在一栋大宅的一翼，通过一个庭院进入，周围有一堵高墙和一道坚固的大门与马路隔绝。这座豪宅曾经属于一位贵族，他一直住在这里，直到他因为某些麻烦事而仓皇逃跑，穿着自己厨师的衣服，越过国境逃命。他就像一头被猎人追赶的野兽，在他转世投胎的过程中，他依然是同一个莫尼格爵士，曾经有三个人加上当时的厨师一起忙碌地为他的嘴唇准备巧克力。
foreignization: 特尔森银行位于巴黎的圣日耳曼区，坐落在一栋大房子的翼楼中，通过一个庭院进入，从街上隔离开来有一堵高墙和一道坚固的大门。这栋房子属于一位曾经住在这里的贵族，直到他从动乱中逃跑时，他穿着自己的厨师服装，跨过了国界。他就像一只猎场上被猎人追赶的野兽，尽管如此，在他的转世中，他仍然是同样的莫尼格先生，当年为他的嘴唇准备巧克力曾经需要三名强壮的男人除了相关的厨师之外。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Tellson’s Bank, established in the Saint Germain Quarter of Paris, was in a wing of a large house, approached by a courtyard and shut off from the street by a high wall and a strong gate. The house belonged to a great nobleman who had lived in it until he made a flight from the troubles, in his own cook’s dress, and got across the borders. A mere beast of the chase flying from hunters, he was still in his metempsychosis no other than the same Monseigneur, the preparation of whose chocolate for whose lips had once occupied three strong men besides the cook in question.

source: On the night of the day on which he left the house, Mr. Lorry went into his room with a chopper, saw, chisel, and hammer, attended by Miss Pross carrying a light. There, with closed doors, and in a mysterious and guilty manner, Mr. Lorry hacked the shoemaker’s bench to pieces, while Miss Pross held the candle as if she were assisting at a murder—for which, indeed, in her grimness, she was no unsuitable figure. The burning of the body (previously reduced to pieces convenient for the purpose) was commenced without delay in the kitchen fire; and the tools, shoes, and leather, were buried in the garden. So wicked do destruction and secrecy appear to honest minds, that Mr. Lorry and Miss Pross, while engaged in the commission of their deed and in the removal of its traces, almost felt, and almost looked, like accomplices in a horrible crime.
domestication: 那天夜里，洛瑞先生带着一把砍刀、一把锯子、一把凿子和一把锤子，走进了他的房间，普罗斯小姐跟在他后面，手里提着一盏灯。他们关上门，在那里神秘兮兮、鬼鬼祟祟地干起活来，洛瑞先生挥舞着砍刀，把鞋匠的工作台砸得粉碎，而普罗斯小姐则像是在协助杀人一样紧张地举着蜡烛——她严肃的样子倒也真像个凶手。他们随即在厨房的火里焚烧那些事先已经切成块的东西；然后，把工具、鞋子和皮革都埋在了花园里。破坏和隐瞒这种事情，对于正派的人来说实在太不光彩了，所以，当洛瑞先生和普罗斯小姐正在干这件事并且销毁证据的时候，他们几乎觉得自己像是某件可怕罪行的同谋犯，几乎看起来也是如此。
foreignization: 在他离开房子的那天晚上，劳瑞先生带着一把砍刀、锯子、凿子和锤子走进了他的房间，普罗斯小姐提着灯跟随其后。在那里，他们关上门，以一种神秘而又内疚的方式进行工作，劳瑞先生把鞋匠的工作台砍成碎片，而普罗斯小姐像是在协助谋杀一样拿着蜡烛——事实上，她严肃的表情使她看起来就像是谋杀案件中的一个非常适合的角色。然后，他们立即在厨房的火中开始烧掉已经切成适合焚烧的碎片；并将工具、鞋子和皮革埋在花园里。毁灭和保密看起来如此邪恶，以至于劳瑞先生和普罗斯小姐在执行他们的行为和销毁证据的过程中，几乎感到自己，几乎看起来像是在一起犯下了骇人听闻的罪行。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On the night of the day on which he left the house, Mr. Lorry went into his room with a chopper, saw, chisel, and hammer, attended by Miss Pross carrying a light. There, with closed doors, and in a mysterious and guilty manner, Mr. Lorry hacked the shoemaker’s bench to pieces, while Miss Pross held the candle as if she were assisting at a murder—for which, indeed, in her grimness, she was no unsuitable figure. The burning of the body (previously reduced to pieces convenient for the purpose) was commenced without delay in the kitchen fire; and the tools, shoes, and leather, were buried in the garden. So wicked do destruction and secrecy appear to honest minds, that Mr. Lorry and Miss Pross, while engaged in the commission of their deed and in the removal of its traces, almost felt, and almost looked, like accomplices in a horrible crime.

source: “If you had sent the message, ‘Recalled to Life,’ again,” muttered Jerry, as he turned, “I should have known what you meant, this time.”
domestication: 如果你再次发来“被召回人间”的消息，杰瑞自言自语道，同时转过身去，这次我就知道你的意思了。
foreignization: “如果你再次发来‘被召回生命’的消息，”杰瑞低声说，当他转过身来，“这次我就能知道你的意思了。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“If you had sent the message, ‘Recalled to Life,’ again,” muttered Jerry, as he turned, “I should have known what you meant, this time.”
如果你再次发来“被召回人间”的消息，杰瑞自言自语道，同时转过身去，这次我就知道你的意思了。

messages_foreignization.content:

“If you had sent the message, ‘Recalled to Life,’ again,” muttered Jerry, as he turned, “I should have known what you meant, this time.”
“如果你再次发来‘被召回生命’的消息，”杰瑞低声说，当他转过身来，“这次我就能知道你的意思了。”

source: Into his handsome face, the bitter waters of captivity had worn; but, he covered up their tracks with a determination so strong, that he held the mastery of them even in his sleep. A more remarkable face in its quiet, resolute, and guarded struggle with an unseen assailant, was not to be beheld in all the wide dominions of sleep, that night.
domestication: 他的脸庞依然俊朗，但被囚禁的苦涩已经在上面留下了痕迹。然而，他有着坚强的决心，足以掩盖这些伤痕，即便在梦中他也能掌控自己。整个睡眠王国在那晚都找不到一个像他这样安静、坚定、警惕地抵御着无形敌人的面容。他的睡脸透出一种宁静的力量，仿佛即使在梦中，也不会被任何困境所击败。
foreignization: 他的漂亮的脸上，苦涩的被囚禁的命运已经留下痕迹；但是，他用如此坚强的决心遮盖了他们的痕迹，以至于即使在他睡觉的时候也能控制住它们。在那一夜的整个广阔的梦境中，没有一个面容像他一样，在宁静中、坚定中和警惕中与看不见的攻击者斗争得如此出色。

A more remarkable face in its quiet, resolute, and guarded struggle with an unseen assailant, was not to be beheld in all the wide dominions of sleep, that night.
他的漂亮的脸上，苦涩的被囚禁的命运已经留下痕迹；但是，他用如此坚强的决心遮盖了他们的痕迹，以至于即使在他睡觉的时候也能控制住它们。在那一夜的整个广阔的梦境中，没有一个面容像他一样，在宁静中、坚定中和警惕中与看不见的攻击者斗争得如此出色。

source: When the quiet of the garret had been long undisturbed, and his heaving breast and shaken form had long yielded to the calm that must follow all storms—emblem to humanity, of the rest and silence into which the storm called Life must hush at last—they came forward to raise the father and daughter from the ground. He had gradually dropped to the floor, and lay there in a lethargy, worn out. She had nestled down with him, that his head might lie upon her arm; and her hair drooping over him curtained him from the light.
domestication: 屋顶阁楼的寂静已经持续了很久，风暴般的情绪终于开始平息下来。他剧烈起伏的胸膛和颤抖的身体终于渐渐平静下来，进入了宁静的状态——这就像对人类生命的启示一样，告诉我们风暴般的人生终究会归于宁静。当他们平静下来后，有人上前扶起了父女俩，他们已经瘫倒在地上，父亲已经精疲力尽，昏昏欲睡。女儿紧紧依偎着他，让他的头枕在她的臂弯里，她的头发垂落在他身上，就像一层帘幕，将光线隔绝在外。
foreignization: 当阁楼的寂静已经长时间没有被打扰，他起伏的胸膛和震颤的身体已经长时间地屈服于所有风暴之后必须到来的宁静——这是对人类的标志，象征着被称为生命的风暴最终必须安静成的休息和沉默——他们才走上前去把父亲和女儿从地上扶起来。他已经渐渐地倒在地板上，躺在那里处于昏迷状态，精疲力竭。她已经依偎在他身边，这样他的头就可以枕在她的手臂上；她的头发垂下遮蔽着他，将他与光线隔绝开来。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

When the quiet of the garret had been long undisturbed, and his heaving breast and shaken form had long yielded to the calm that must follow all storms—emblem to humanity, of the rest and silence into which the storm called Life must hush at last—they came forward to raise the father and daughter from the ground. He had gradually dropped to the floor, and lay there in a lethargy, worn out. She had nestled down with him, that his head might lie upon her arm; and her hair drooping over him curtained him from the light.
屋顶阁楼的寂静已经持续了很久，风暴般的情绪终于开始平息下来。他剧烈起伏的胸膛和颤抖的身体终于渐渐平静下来，进入了宁静的状态——这就像对人类生命的启示一样，告诉我们风暴般的人生终究会归于宁静。当他们平静下来后，有人上前扶起了父女俩，他们已经瘫倒在地上，父亲已经精疲力尽，昏昏欲睡。女儿紧紧依偎着他，让他的头枕在她的臂弯里，她的头发垂落在他身上，就像一层帘幕，将光线隔绝在外。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

When the quiet of the garret had been long undisturbed, and his heaving breast and shaken form had long yielded to the calm that must follow all storms—emblem to humanity, of the rest and silence into which the storm called Life must hush at last—they came forward to raise the father and daughter from the ground. He had gradually dropped to the floor, and lay there in a lethargy, worn out. She had nestled down with him, that his head might lie upon her arm; and her hair drooping over him curtained him from the light.
当阁楼的寂静已经长时间没有被打扰，他起伏的胸膛和震颤的身体已经长时间地屈服于所有风暴之后必须到来的宁静——这是对人类的标志，象征着被称为生命的风暴最终必须安静成的休息和沉默——他们才走上前去把父亲和女儿从地上扶起来。他已经渐渐地倒在地板上，躺在那里处于昏迷状态，精疲力竭。她已经依偎在他身边，这样他的头就可以枕在她的手臂上；她的头发垂下遮蔽着他，将他与光线隔绝开来。

source: “And, O my dearest Love!” she urged, clinging nearer to him, laying her head upon his breast, and raising her eyes to his, “remember how strong we are in our happiness, and how weak he is in his misery!”
domestication: 而且，我的爱人！她说着，更加紧密地依偎在他身边，将头靠在他的胸前，眼神充满深情地凝视着他，“我们在幸福中是如此坚强，而他却在痛苦中变得如此脆弱！”
foreignization: “而且，我的挚爱！”她恳求道，紧贴着他，将头靠在他的胸口，并抬起眼睛看着他，“记住我们在幸福中有多强大，而他在痛苦中又是多么虚弱！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“And, O my dearest Love!” she urged, clinging nearer to him, laying her head upon his breast, and raising her eyes to his, “remember how strong we are in our happiness, and how weak he is in his misery!”
而且，我的爱人！她说着，更加紧密地依偎在他身边，将头靠在他的胸前，眼神充满深情地凝视着他，“我们在幸福中是如此坚强，而他却在痛苦中变得如此脆弱！”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“And, O my dearest Love!” she urged, clinging nearer to him, laying her head upon his breast, and raising her eyes to his, “remember how strong we are in our happiness, and how weak he is in his misery!”
“而且，我的挚爱！”她恳求道，紧贴着他，将头靠在他的胸口，并抬起眼睛看着他，“记住我们在幸福中有多强大，而他在痛苦中又是多么虚弱！”

source: “My dear friend, I have a charmed life in this city. I have been a Bastille prisoner. There is no patriot in Paris—in Paris? In France—who, knowing me to have been a prisoner in the Bastille, would touch me, except to overwhelm me with embraces, or carry me in triumph. My old pain has given me a power that has brought us through the barrier, and gained us news of Charles there, and brought us here. I knew it would be so; I knew I could help Charles out of all danger; I told Lucie so.—What is that noise?” His hand was again upon the window.
domestication: “我的亲爱的朋友，我在这个城市里有一种神奇的力量。我曾经是巴士底狱的囚犯。在巴黎，有谁知道我曾经是巴士底狱的囚犯，还会对我有所偏见吗？在法国，谁会不因为我曾经是巴士底狱的囚犯而拥抱我，或者把我当作胜利者抬起来呢？我的过去的痛苦给我带来了力量，这种力量让我我们冲破障碍，得到了查尔斯安全的消息，并让我我们来到这里。我早就料到了这一点；我知道我可以帮助查尔斯摆脱所有的危险；我也跟卢西说过了。” 他又一次把手放在窗户上。“那是什么声音？”
foreignization: “我的亲爱的朋友，我在这个城市里有着一段神奇的经历。我曾是一名巴士底狱的囚徒。在巴黎——是在巴黎？在法国——没有一个爱国者，如果知道我曾是巴士底狱的囚徒，会碰我，除了用拥抱淹没我，或把我当作胜利者抬着走。我的旧日痛苦已经给我带来了力量，这种力量使我们通过了屏障，并得到了查尔斯的消息，把我们带到了这里。我就知道会这样；我知道我可以帮助查尔斯摆脱所有危险；我告诉卢西这么说。——那是什么声音？” 他又把手放在窗户上。

source: Defarge motioned with the paper to the prisoner that he must accompany him. The prisoner obeyed, and a guard of two armed patriots attended them.
domestication: 德法尔热朝囚犯挥了挥手里的纸，示意他跟着自己走。囚犯照做，两名带枪的爱国者护送他们三人前往目的地。
foreignization: 德法尔热用文件向囚犯示意，让他跟随自己，囚犯听从了，他和德法尔热一起走的时候，有两个拿着武器的爱国者作为他们的警卫。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: “I think?” returned madame, in a high voice. “I and my husband have enough to do to keep this wine-shop open, without thinking. All we think, here, is how to live. That is the subject we think of, and it gives us, from morning to night, enough to think about, without embarrassing our heads concerning others. I think for others? No, no.”
domestication: “会吗？”女士用高亢的声音回答道。“我和丈夫光是想办法维持这家酒馆就够忙的了，没有时间去想其他事情。在这里，我们唯一思考的就是如何生活。这是一个从早到晚都让我们绞尽脑汁的问题，根本没工夫去操心别人的事。我替别人着想？不可能，不可能。”
foreignization: “我想？”店主夫人用高亢的声音回答道。“我和我的丈夫已经有足够多的事情要做，以维持这个酒馆的正常运营，而不需要思考。我们在这里思考的全部内容，就是如何生存。这是我们的主要思考对象，从早到晚，这个问题让我们有足够多的事情要考虑，而不需要为他人操心。我为他人思考？不，不。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

That is the subject we think of, and it gives us, from morning to night, enough to think about, without embarrassing our heads concerning others. I think for others? No, no.”

source: On this second day, Mr. Lorry saluted him cheerfully by his name, and spoke to him on topics that had been of late familiar to them. He returned no reply, but it was evident that he heard what was said, and that he thought about it, however confusedly. This encouraged Mr. Lorry to have Miss Pross in with her work, several times during the day; at those times, they quietly spoke of Lucie, and of her father then present, precisely in the usual manner, and as if there were nothing amiss. This was done without any demonstrative accompaniment, not long enough, or often enough to harass him; and it lightened Mr. Lorry’s friendly heart to believe that he looked up oftener, and that he appeared to be stirred by some perception of inconsistencies surrounding him.
domestication: 第二天，洛里先生高兴地叫出了他的名字，并与他讨论了最近他们熟悉的话题。他没有回答，但很明显他听到了所说的话，并思考着它，即使是混乱的。这鼓励洛里先生让普罗斯小姐带着她的工作进来，整个白天有好几次；在那些时刻，他们安静地谈论露西和她当时在场的父亲，完全按照平常的方式，就好像一切正常一样。这一切都是轻松完成的，没有过度的表演，不会让他感到厌烦；这让洛里先生的心情大好，他相信自己看到他抬头看的次数越来越多，而且似乎被他周围的一些矛盾所唤醒。
foreignization: 在这第二天，洛里先生以他的名字亲切地问候他，并就他们最近熟悉的话题与他交谈。他没有回应，但很明显他听到了所说的话，并且思考着它，无论是多么混乱的。这鼓励洛里先生让普罗斯小姐带着她的工作进来，整天几次；在那时，他们安静地谈论露西和她父亲，恰好像往常一样，并且好像没有什么不妥。这是在没有任何夸张的伴随下完成的，没有太长时间，也没有足够频繁地来烦扰他；这使洛里先生友好的心情变得轻松，他相信他抬头看得更频繁一些，并且他似乎被周围的一些不一致点所感动。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

On this second day, Mr. Lorry saluted him cheerfully by his name, and spoke to him on topics that had been of late familiar to them. He returned no reply, but it was evident that he heard what was said, and that he thought about it, however confusedly. This encouraged Mr. Lorry to have Miss Pross in with her work, several times during the day; at those times, they quietly spoke of Lucie, and of her father then present, precisely in the usual manner, and as if there were nothing amiss. This was done without any demonstrative accompaniment, not long enough, or often enough to harass him; and it lightened Mr. Lorry’s friendly heart to believe that he looked up oftener, and that he appeared to be stirred by some perception of inconsistencies surrounding him.

source: “Thank God,” said Mr. Lorry, clasping his hands, “that no one near and dear to me is in this dreadful town to-night. May He have mercy on all who are in danger!”
domestication: 劳里先生双手合十，感叹道：“幸好我没有亲人在这个可怕的夜晚出现在这座城市里。愿上帝保佑所有有危险的人吧！”
foreignization: “谢天谢地，”洛里先生合起双手说，“我没有亲爱的人今晚在这可怕的城镇里。愿上帝怜悯所有处于危险中的人！”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Thank God,” said Mr. Lorry, clasping his hands, “that no one near and dear to me is in this dreadful town to-night. May He have mercy on all who are in danger!”

source: The old man kissed her, and hurried her into his room, and turned the key; then, came hurrying back to the Doctor, and opened the window and partly opened the blind, and put his hand upon the Doctor’s arm, and looked out with him into the courtyard.
domestication: 老头儿亲了亲她，就把她推进自己的房间，还特意把门锁上了。然后，他匆忙地跑回医生身边，打开窗户，掀开一半窗帘，伸手搭在医生的胳膊上，和他一起往外面的天井里张望。
foreignization: 老人亲吻了她，然后匆忙地把她推进他的房间，并且转动钥匙；然后，急忙回到医生身边，打开窗户并且部分打开百叶窗，并把手放在医生胳膊上，和他一起向庭院里望去。

老人亲吻了她，然后匆忙地把她推进他的房间，并且转动钥匙；然后，急忙回到医生身边，打开窗户并且部分打开百叶窗，并把手放在医生胳膊上，和他一起向庭院里望去。

source: Our booked passenger showed in a moment that it was his name. The guard, the coachman, and the two other passengers eyed him distrustfully.
domestication: 我们预定的乘客一出现，就明确无误地证明他就是我们要找的人。列车长、马车夫，还有另外两位乘客，都用怀疑的眼神打量着他。
foreignization: 我们的预订乘客在片刻间表明了他的名字。守卫，马车夫和另外两名乘客怀疑地看着他。

我们的预订乘客在片刻间表明了他的名字。守卫，马车夫和另外两名乘客怀疑地看着他。

source: “To the eye it is fair enough, here; but seen in its integrity, under the sky, and by the daylight, it is a crumbling tower of waste, mismanagement, extortion, debt, mortgage, oppression, hunger, nakedness, and suffering.”
domestication: 从表面上看，这里似乎还算不错，但当你用全新的视角，从天空下，明亮的日光下观察，你就会发现这实际上是一个摇摇欲坠的废墟，到处都是浪费、管理不善、敲诈、债务、抵押、压迫、饥饿、赤贫和痛苦。
foreignization: “从表面上看似乎还过得去，但当它在天空下、阳光下展现出全部真实面目时，它不过是一个摇摇欲坠的废墟，到处是浪费、管理不善、盘剥、债务、抵押、压迫、饥饿、赤贫和痛苦。”

source: “If you were shown a great heap of dolls, and were set upon them to pluck them to pieces and despoil them for your own advantage, you would pick out the richest and gayest. Say! Would you not?”
domestication: 如果有人把一堆娃娃放在你面前，让你任意挑选和拆卸这些娃娃以满足自己的利益，你肯定会选择那些最漂亮和最值钱的吧？说实话，你不这么认为吗？这就像我们常说的“抢占先机”，总是想挑到最好的东西嘛！
foreignization: 如果你看到一堆很大的娃娃，并被要求去拆开它们并且为自己的利益剥夺它们，你会挑选最富有和最欢乐的那一个。说！你不会这样做吗？

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“If you were shown a great heap of dolls, and were set upon them to pluck them to pieces and despoil them for your own advantage, you would pick out the richest and gayest. Say! Would you not?”
如果有人把一堆娃娃放在你面前，让你任意挑选和拆卸这些娃娃以满足自己的利益，你肯定会选择那些最漂亮和最值钱的吧？说实话，你不这么认为吗？这就像我们常说的“抢占先机”，总是想挑到最好的东西嘛！

如果你看到一堆很大的娃娃，并被要求去拆开它们并且为自己的利益剥夺它们，你会挑选最富有和最欢乐的那一个。说！你不会这样做吗？

source: “Stranger things than that will happen when it does come,” answered madame. “I have them both here, of a certainty; and they are both here for their merits; that is enough.”
domestication: 这位夫人回答说，“事实证明，奇怪的事情还在后面呢。我现在已经有两份了，这是肯定的，而且都是因为他们有真才实学才被录用的，所以就不需要多说了。”
foreignization: "比这更奇怪的事情将会发生，当它真的来临的时候，”夫人回答道。“我两个都有，绝对的；他们两人都是因为他们的功绩才来到这里的；就这样足够了。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Stranger things than that will happen when it does come,” answered madame. “I have them both here, of a certainty; and they are both here for their merits; that is enough.”
这位夫人回答说，“事实证明，奇怪的事情还在后面呢。我现在已经有两份了，这是肯定的，而且都是因为他们有真才实学才被录用的，所以就不需要多说了。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Stranger things than that will happen when it does come,” answered madame. “I have them both here, of a certainty; and they are both here for their merits; that is enough.”
"比这更奇怪的事情将会发生，当它真的来临的时候，”夫人回答道。“我两个都有，绝对的；他们两人都是因为他们的功绩才来到这里的；就这样足够了。”

source: “Sir, I thank you indeed. I thank you very gratefully. It was told me by the Bank that the gentleman would explain to me the details of the business, and that I must prepare myself to find them of a surprising nature. I have done my best to prepare myself, and I naturally have a strong and eager interest to know what they are.”
domestication: “谢谢您，先生，我真的非常感谢您！我已经听银行的人说过，这位先生会跟我详细说明这件事的来龙去脉，并且提醒我要有心理准备，因为事情的性质可能会出乎我的意料。我已经尽量做好了准备工作，现在我当然非常渴望了解事情的真相。”
foreignization: 先生，我确实非常感谢您。银行方面告诉我，先生会向我解释这笔生意的详细情况，并且我必须做好准备，因为这些事情的性质可能会令人惊讶。我已经尽我所能地做好了准备，我当然非常渴望知道这些事情是什么。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Sir, I thank you indeed. I thank you very gratefully. It was told me by the Bank that the gentleman would explain to me the details of the business, and that I must prepare myself to find them of a surprising nature. I have done my best to prepare myself, and I naturally have a strong and eager interest to know what they are.”

source: The door slowly opened inward under his hand, and he looked into the room and said something. A faint voice answered something. Little more than a single syllable could have been spoken on either side.
domestication: 他慢慢推开门，朝屋里张望了一下，说了句什么。里面传来一声微弱的回应，两个人说的加起来也就一个字。
foreignization: 门在他的手下慢慢向内打开，他往房间里看了一眼，说了些什么。一声微弱的声音回答了些什么。几乎没有在两边说出不止一个音节以上的话。

source: The five had had, it is true, no audience to lengthen their proceedings, for when he and Doctor Manette emerged from the gate, there was a great crowd about it, in which there seemed to be every face he had seen in Court—except two, for which he looked in vain. On his coming out, the concourse made at him anew, weeping, embracing, and shouting, all by turns and all together, until the very tide of the river on the bank of which the mad scene was acted, seemed to run mad, like the people on the shore.
domestication: 他们五个人虽然一直在说话，但是没有人听他们说话，因为当他和曼尼大夫走出门时，一大群人围在门口，好像法庭上的每一张脸都在这里，只有两张脸没看到。他一出来，人群又涌向他，哭泣、拥抱、喊叫，轮流又同时进行，直到河岸上演出的这场疯狂的场景，连河里的水似乎也像河岸上的人们一样发了狂。
foreignization: 这五个人确实没有观众让他们的程序变得更长，因为当他和曼内特医生从大门出来时，大门周围有一大群人，在人群中似乎有他在法庭上见过的每一张脸——除了两张，他徒劳地寻找着它们。当他出来时，人群再次向他涌来，哭泣、拥抱和喊叫，轮流进行，大家一起进行，直到河岸上演出疯狂场景的河流似乎像河岸上的人们一样发狂。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The five had had, it is true, no audience to lengthen their proceedings, for when he and Doctor Manette emerged from the gate, there was a great crowd about it, in which there seemed to be every face he had seen in Court—except two, for which he looked in vain. On his coming out, the concourse made at him anew, weeping, embracing, and shouting, all by turns and all together, until the very tide of the river on the bank of which the mad scene was acted, seemed to run mad, like the people on the shore.
他们五个人虽然一直在说话，但是没有人听他们说话，因为当他和曼尼大夫走出门时，一大群人围在门口，好像法庭上的每一张脸都在这里，只有两张脸没看到。他一出来，人群又涌向他，哭泣、拥抱、喊叫，轮流又同时进行，直到河岸上演出的这场疯狂的场景，连河里的水似乎也像河岸上的人们一样发了狂。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

The five had had, it is true, no audience to lengthen their proceedings, for when he and Doctor Manette emerged from the gate, there was a great crowd about it, in which there seemed to be every face he had seen in Court—except two, for which he looked in vain. On his coming out, the concourse made at him anew, weeping, embracing, and shouting, all by turns and all together, until the very tide of the river on the bank of which the mad scene was acted, seemed to run mad, like the people on the shore.
这五个人确实没有观众让他们的程序变得更长，因为当他和曼内特医生从大门出来时，大门周围有一大群人，在人群中似乎有他在法庭上见过的每一张脸——除了两张，他徒劳地寻找着它们。当他出来时，人群再次向他涌来，哭泣、拥抱和喊叫，轮流进行，大家一起进行，直到河岸上演出疯狂场景的河流似乎像河岸上的人们一样发狂。

source: Probably, Monsieur Gabelle passed a long night up there, with the distant chateau for fire and candle, and the beating at his door, combined with the joy-ringing, for music; not to mention his having an ill-omened lamp slung across the road before his posting-house gate, which the village showed a lively inclination to displace in his favour. A trying suspense, to be passing a whole summer night on the brink of the black ocean, ready to take that plunge into it upon which Monsieur Gabelle had resolved! But, the friendly dawn appearing at last, and the rush-candles of the village guttering out, the people happily dispersed, and Monsieur Gabelle came down bringing his life with him for that while.
domestication: 盖贝尔先生可能在楼上度过了一个漫漫长夜，远处的城堡里火光熊熊，烛光闪烁，而敲门声和欢快的钟声交织成了一首音乐；更别提村民们在他客栈门前挂起一盏不吉利的灯笼，村民们似乎很高兴替他把它搬走。这是一种令人紧张的悬念，整个夏夜都处于黑暗的深渊边缘，随时准备跳入其中，这正是盖贝尔先生决心要做的。但是，友好的黎明终于出现了，村庄里的灯笼渐渐熄灭，人群欣喜地散去，盖贝尔先生也下楼来了，暂时保住了性命。
foreignization: 很可能，盖贝尔先生在那里度过了一个漫长的夜晚，远处的城堡像火焰和蜡烛一样，敲门声与欢快的铃声交织在一起，构成了一首音乐；更不用说他在客栈门口的路上挂着一个不祥的灯笼，全村人都很高兴地把它移开以讨好他。在黑暗的海洋边缘，整个夏夜都处于紧张的悬念中，随时准备采取盖贝尔先生已经决定的行动！但终于，友好的黎明出现了，村里的灯笼逐渐熄灭，人们幸福地散去，盖贝尔先生带着性命下楼来了。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Probably, Monsieur Gabelle passed a long night up there, with the distant chateau for fire and candle, and the beating at his door, combined with the joy-ringing, for music; not to mention his having an ill-omened lamp slung across the road before his posting-house gate, which the village showed a lively inclination to displace in his favour. A trying suspense, to be passing a whole summer night on the brink of the black ocean, ready to take that plunge into it upon which Monsieur Gabelle had resolved! But, the friendly dawn appearing at last, and the rush-candles of the village guttering out, the people happily dispersed, and Monsieur Gabelle came down bringing his life with him for that while.
盖贝尔先生可能在楼上度过了一个漫漫长夜，远处的城堡里火光熊熊，烛光闪烁，而敲门声和欢快的钟声交织成了一首音乐；更别提村民们在他客栈门前挂起一盏不吉利的灯笼，村民们似乎很高兴替他把它搬走。这是一种令人紧张的悬念，整个夏夜都处于黑暗的深渊边缘，随时准备跳入其中，这正是盖贝尔先生决心要做的。但是，友好的黎明终于出现了，村庄里的灯笼渐渐熄灭，人群欣喜地散去，盖贝尔先生也下楼来了，暂时保住了性命。

source: Young Jerry relieved his father with dutiful interest, and reported No job in his absence. The bank closed, the ancient clerks came out, the usual watch was set, and Mr. Cruncher and his son went home to tea.
domestication: 年轻的杰瑞带着孝顺的关心替父亲值了班，没他的事。银行关门了，老式的职员们出来了，通常的岗哨也就此站立起来。克朗彻先生和他儿子于是就回家喝茶去了。
foreignization: 年轻的杰瑞带着尽职的兴趣解除了父亲的职责，并报告说在他的缺席期间没有工作。银行关门了，古老的职员出来了，通常的守夜开始了，克兰彻先生和他的儿子回家喝茶。

Young Jerry relieved his father with dutiful interest, and reported No job in his absence. The bank closed, the ancient clerks came out, the usual watch was set, and Mr. Cruncher and his son went home to tea.
年轻的杰瑞带着尽职的兴趣解除了父亲的职责，并报告说在他的缺席期间没有工作。银行关门了，古老的职员出来了，通常的守夜开始了，克兰彻先生和他的儿子回家喝茶。

source: The traveller fared slowly on his way, who fared towards Paris from England in the autumn of the year one thousand seven hundred and ninety-two. More than enough of bad roads, bad equipages, and bad horses, he would have encountered to delay him, though the fallen and unfortunate King of France had been upon his throne in all his glory; but, the changed times were fraught with other obstacles than these. Every town-gate and village taxing-house had its band of citizen-patriots, with their national muskets in a most explosive state of readiness, who stopped all comers and goers, cross-questioned them, inspected their papers, looked for their names in lists of their own, turned them back, or sent them on, or stopped them and laid them in hold, as their capricious judgment or fancy deemed best for the dawning Republic One and Indivisible, of Liberty, Equality, Fraternity, or Death.
domestication: 秋高气爽的1792年，一位旅行者从英格兰往巴黎赶路。平常来说，差劲的路况、马车和马匹就足以让他的旅程进展缓慢了，即便法国国王还坐在他的宝座上，风光无限。但是，这一年形势不同了，除了那些老问题，还有其他更多的障碍挡在了这位旅行者的路上。每个城门口，每个村庄的税务所，都有一群热情的爱国者，手里端着随时可能爆发的国民步枪，他们拦住所有路过的人，盘问来意，检查文件，核对名单，有时候他们会让你回头，有时候会放你通过，有时候则把你扣留下来，全凭他们的任性或心血来潮，为伟大的不屈、解放、平等、博爱的法兰西共和国服务，或者面对死亡。
foreignization: 旅行者缓慢地前行，于一七九二年秋天从英格兰前往巴黎的路上。他将会遇到足够多的糟糕的道路、糟糕的马车和糟糕的马匹来延迟他的旅程，即使法国的国王倒台并不幸地衰落仍然在他的宝座上拥有全部荣耀；但是，变化了的时代充满了比这些更多的障碍。每个城门和村庄的税务所都有公民爱国者的团队，他们的国家步枪处于最爆炸性的准备状态，他们拦截所有路人，盘问他们，检查他们的文件，在他们自己的名单中寻找他们的名字，将他们送回去，或让他们继续前进，或拦截他们并拘留他们，就像他们任性的判断或想象力认为对于黎明中的不可分割的共和国，一切以自由、平等、博爱、死亡为准则的最佳选择。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The traveller fared slowly on his way, who fared towards Paris from England in the autumn of the year one thousand seven hundred and ninety-two. More than enough of bad roads, bad equipages, and bad horses, he would have encountered to delay him, though the fallen and unfortunate King of France had been upon his throne in all his glory; but, the changed times were fraught with other obstacles than these. Every town-gate and village taxing-house had its band of citizen-patriots, with their national muskets in a most explosive state of readiness, who stopped all comers and goers, cross-questioned them, inspected their papers, looked for their names in lists of their own, turned them back, or sent them on, or stopped them and laid them in hold, as their capricious judgment or fancy deemed best for the dawning Republic One and Indivisible, of Liberty, Equality, Fraternity, or Death.

秋高气爽的1792年，一位旅行者从英格兰往巴黎赶路。平常来说，差劲的路况、马车和马匹就足以让他的旅程进展缓慢了，即便法国国王还坐在他的宝座上，风光无限。但是，这一年形势不同了，除了那些老问题，还有其他更多的障碍挡在了这位旅行者的路上。每个城门口，每个村庄的税务所，都有一群热情的爱国者，手里端着随时可能爆发的国民步枪，他们拦住所有路过的人，盘问来意，检查文件，核对名单，有时候他们会让你回头，有时候会放你通过，有时候则把你扣留下来，全凭他们的任性或心血来潮，为伟大的不屈、解放、平等、博爱的法兰西共和国服务，或者面对死亡。

source: “I kiss your hand, miss,” said Mr. Lorry, with the manners of an earlier date, as he made his formal bow again, and took his seat.
domestication: 洛里先生很有绅士风度，行了个古代的礼，重新鞠了一躬，坐下时说：“我吻你的手，小姐。”
foreignization: “我亲吻你的手，小姐，”劳瑞先生说，他带着更早时期的礼仪，再次行了一个正式的鞠躬礼，然后坐下。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“I kiss your hand, miss,” said Mr. Lorry, with the manners of an earlier date, as he made his formal bow again, and took his seat.
洛里先生很有绅士风度，行了个古代的礼，重新鞠了一躬，坐下时说：“我吻你的手，小姐。”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“I kiss your hand, miss,” said Mr. Lorry, with the manners of an earlier date, as he made his formal bow again, and took his seat.
“我亲吻你的手，小姐，”劳瑞先生说，他带着更早时期的礼仪，再次行了一个正式的鞠躬礼，然后坐下。

source: Twice more in all; but, the last spell of work was feeble and fitful. Soon afterwards the day began to dawn, and he softly detached himself from the clasping hand, and cautiously looked out again. A man, so besmeared that he might have been a sorely wounded soldier creeping back to consciousness on a field of slain, was rising from the pavement by the side of the grindstone, and looking about him with a vacant air. Shortly, this worn-out murderer descried in the imperfect light one of the carriages of Monseigneur, and, staggering to that gorgeous vehicle, climbed in at the door, and shut himself up to take his rest on its dainty cushions.
domestication: 一切重复了两次，但是最后一次动作显得很虚弱和无力。没过多久，天就开始亮了，他轻轻地从紧握的双手中脱身，小心翼翼地再次向外张望。一个满身是血污的人影，从磨刀石旁边的人行道上站起来，茫然地四处张望，就像一名在战场上遍体鳞伤的士兵刚刚苏醒过来一样。不久，这个疲惫不堪的凶手在昏暗的光线下发现了一辆属于蒙西尼尔的马车，踉跄地走到那辆豪华车辆旁，爬进门，关上门，倒在其精美的靠垫上睡去。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Twice more in all; but, the last spell of work was feeble and fitful. Soon afterwards the day began to dawn, and he softly detached himself from the clasping hand, and cautiously looked out again. A man, so besmeared that he might have been a sorely wounded soldier creeping back to consciousness on a field of slain, was rising from the pavement by the side of the grindstone, and looking about him with a vacant air. Shortly, this worn-out murderer descried in the imperfect light one of the carriages of Monseigneur, and, staggering to that gorgeous vehicle, climbed in at the door, and shut himself up to take his rest on its dainty cushions.

source: The rider from the chateau, and the horse in a foam, clattered away through the village, and galloped up the stony steep, to the prison on the crag. At the gate, a group of officers were looking at the fire; removed from them, a group of soldiers. “Help, gentlemen—officers! The chateau is on fire; valuable objects may be saved from the flames by timely aid! Help, help!” The officers looked towards the soldiers who looked at the fire; gave no orders; and answered, with shrugs and biting of lips, “It must burn.”
domestication: 一位骑马者从城堡中疾驰而出，马匹满身汗沫，在村庄中飞速奔驰，接着沿着岩石嶙峋的陡坡冲向山崖上的监狱。抵达监狱门前，发现一群军官正在注视着火焰，不远处有一群士兵。骑马者高呼：“救命，先生们——军官们！城堡着火了，许多贵重物品如果及时施救，可以从火焰中抢救出来！救命啊，快来救命！”那些军官转头看着士兵，士兵们也在看着火焰，却没有人下令救火。他们只是耸耸肩，咬着嘴唇回答说：“就让它烧吧。”
foreignization: 从城堡里出来的骑手，带着一匹满身是汗的马，嘈杂地穿过村庄，沿着石头路飞速奔向悬崖上的监狱。在大门口，一群军官正在注视着火灾；与他们稍微隔开的是一群士兵。“救命，先生们——军官们！城堡着火了；如果能及时提供帮助，可能会从火焰中抢救出贵重物品！救命，救命！”军官们望着士兵，士兵们看着火；他们没有发出任何命令，只是耸了耸肩，并咬着嘴唇回答道：“让它烧吧。”

The chateau is on fire; valuable objects may be saved from the flames by timely aid! Help, help!” The officers looked towards the soldiers who looked at the fire; gave no orders; and answered, with shrugs and biting of lips, “It must burn.”

source: The spy, who was there to pick up any crumbs he could find or make, did not allow his baffled state to express itself in his sinister face; but, stood with an air of gossiping gallantry, leaning his elbow on Madame Defarge’s little counter, and occasionally sipping his cognac.
domestication: 间谍混在人群中，想找点线索或者散布点谣言。虽然他一无所获，摸不着头脑，但脸上仍然挂着狡黠的笑容。他靠在德法尔热夫人的小柜台上，装出一副八卦的样子，时不时地喝一口白兰地。
foreignization: 这名在那里收集可能发现或制造的任何信息的间谍，没有让他困惑的状态在他险恶的脸上表现出来；但，他带着八卦的潇洒风度站立着，肘部靠在德法尔热夫人的小柜台上，并且偶尔啜饮他的干邑白兰地。

source: The wine-shop was a corner shop, better than most others in its appearance and degree, and the master of the wine-shop had stood outside it, in a yellow waistcoat and green breeches, looking on at the struggle for the lost wine. “It’s not my affair,” said he, with a final shrug of the shoulders. “The people from the market did it. Let them bring another.”
domestication: 这家酒店位于街角，是一家比一般的店面稍微好一点的店铺。店主站在门外，看着人们为争夺洒出的酒而纷争。他穿着一件黄色马甲和一条绿色的裤子，神情悠闲地看着眼前的一切。“这跟我没关系，”他耸了耸肩，带着无奈地说，“是那些从市场上来的客人弄出的乱子，让他们自己解决吧。”
foreignization: 这家酒馆是一家拐角处的商店，它的外观和档次都比同类中的大多数要好。酒馆老板穿着黄色马甲、绿色马裤站在店外，看着人们争夺洒出的葡萄酒。“与我无关，”他说，最后一次耸了耸肩膀，“是那些来自市场的人干的。让他们自己再拿一个来。”

source: After this odd description of his daily routine of employment, Mr. Lorry flattened his flaxen wig upon his head with both hands (which was most unnecessary, for nothing could be flatter than its shining surface was before), and resumed his former attitude.
domestication: 洛里先生讲完自己每天工作的奇怪日程之后，用双手将自己的白发假发往头上按了按（其实完全没这个必要，因为就算不按，假发已经是平贴在头皮上，无法再扁平了），然后又恢复了之前的姿势。

source: “You have no idea how such an apprehension weighs on the sufferer’s mind, and how difficult—how almost impossible—it is, for him to force himself to utter a word upon the topic that oppresses him.”
domestication: 你根本无法想象，这种担忧会有多么地压迫着受苦者的心灵，也有多么地难以——几乎是根本不可能——让他开口谈论那些困扰他的事情。这种心理负担会让人觉得每句话都说不出口，每个字都像是从牙缝里挤出来一样。
foreignization: “你不知道这样一种忧虑有多大的分量压在受苦者的脑海里，而且他多么难以——几乎不可能——强迫自己说出一句话来谈论那件事物，这件事物压迫着他。”

source: “John Barsad,” repeated madame, after murmuring it once to herself. “Good. His appearance; is it known?”
domestication: “约翰·巴萨德，”那位女士在自言自语地念了一遍后又重复了一遍。“好吧，那么他的长相怎么样？有人知道吗？”
foreignization: “约翰·巴萨德，”夫人在自言自语地低声说过后，又再次重复道。“好。他长什么样；有人知道吗？”

source: Monseigneur had one truly noble idea of general public business, which was, to let everything go on in its own way; of particular public business, Monseigneur had the other truly noble idea that it must all go his way—tend to his own power and pocket. Of his pleasures, general and particular, Monseigneur had the other truly noble idea, that the world was made for them. The text of his order (altered from the original by only a pronoun, which is not much) ran: “The earth and the fulness thereof are mine, saith Monseigneur.”
domestication: 莫内昂有一个非常高尚的处理公共事务的想法，那就是任其自然，让一切顺其自然发展。而对于个人利益方面的公务，莫内昂又有一个高尚的想法，那就是一切都必须按照他的意愿行事，照顾他的权力和钱袋。无论是大众的还是个人的享乐，莫内昂也有一个高尚的想法，那就是世界都是为他而存在的。他的座右铭（只改动了一个代词，这改动不算什么），内容是：“地球及其一切，都归我莫内昂所有。”这句话说明了莫内昂的狂妄自大和自私自利，他认为整个世界都是为了满足自己的欲望而存在的。
foreignization: 蒙西纽尔对于公务有一个真正高尚的想法，那就是让一切顺其自然；对于私事，蒙西纽尔有另一个真正高尚的想法，就是一切都必须按照他的意愿进行——符合他的权力和钱袋。至于他的乐趣，无论是普遍还是特殊的，蒙西纽尔还有一个真正高尚的想法，那就是世界是为它们而造的。他命令的内容（只是把原来的代词改了一个，这改动不大）是：“地球和其中的一切都是我的，蒙西纽尔说。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Monseigneur had one truly noble idea of general public business, which was, to let everything go on in its own way; of particular public business, Monseigneur had the other truly noble idea that it must all go his way—tend to his own power and pocket. Of his pleasures, general and particular, Monseigneur had the other truly noble idea, that the world was made for them. The text of his order (altered from the original by only a pronoun, which is not much) ran: “The earth and the fulness thereof are mine, saith Monseigneur.”

Of his pleasures, general and particular, Monseigneur had the other truly noble idea, that the world was made for them. The text of his order (altered from the original by only a pronoun, which is not much) ran: “The earth and the fulness thereof are mine, saith Monseigneur.”
蒙西纽尔对于公务有一个真正高尚的想法，那就是让一切顺其自然；对于私事，蒙西纽尔有另一个真正高尚的想法，就是一切都必须按照他的意愿进行——符合他的权力和钱袋。至于他的乐趣，无论是普遍还是特殊的，蒙西纽尔还有一个真正高尚的想法，那就是世界是为它们而造的。他命令的内容（只是把原来的代词改了一个，这改动不大）是：“地球和其中的一切都是我的，蒙西纽尔说。”

source: He spoke with the diffidence of a man who knew how slight a thing would overset the delicate organisation of the mind, and yet with the confidence of a man who had slowly won his assurance out of personal endurance and distress. It was not for his friend to abate that confidence. He professed himself more relieved and encouraged than he really was, and approached his second and last point. He felt it to be the most difficult of all; but, remembering his old Sunday morning conversation with Miss Pross, and remembering what he had seen in the last nine days, he knew that he must face it.
domestication: 他说话的态度谨慎，仿佛一个不经意的小事就能打乱思绪的微妙平衡，但同时，他又带有一种自信，这种自信是通过个人奋斗和痛苦慢慢积累起来的。他的朋友不应该削弱这种自信。尽管他内心不那么乐观，但他还是装出一副如释重负、更有信心的样子，然后开始讨论第二个，也是最后一个问题。他觉得这将是最难以啃下的硬骨头，但他记得自己跟普罗斯小姐过去周日早晨的对话，以及过去九天里所见所闻，因此知道自己必须面对这个问题。
foreignization: 他说话时带着一个知道只要有一点小事就能打乱思维中微妙组织的人的胆怯，但同时也带着一个通过个人忍耐和痛苦慢慢获得自信的人的自信。这不是他朋友要削弱这种信心的时候。他宣称自己比实际上更感宽慰和鼓舞，于是开始讨论他的第二点也是最后一点。他觉得这是所有问题中最困难的；但是，回想起他与普罗斯小姐过去在星期天早晨的交谈，以及他在过去九天里所看到的一切，他知道他必须面对它。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He felt it to be the most difficult of all; but, remembering his old Sunday morning conversation with Miss Pross, and remembering what he had seen in the last nine days, he knew that he must face it.

source: The bill being paid, Charles Darnay rose and wished him good night. Without returning the wish, Carton rose too, with something of a threat of defiance in his manner, and said, “A last word, Mr. Darnay: you think I am drunk?”
domestication: 账单付完了，查尔斯·丹尼走了过来，跟他说了声晚安。卡通没有回应，反而也站了起来，脸上带着一丝挑衅的意味，说：“最后再说一句话，丹尼先生：你以为我喝醉了吧？”

source: “I saw him then, messieurs,” began the mender of roads, “a year ago this running summer, underneath the carriage of the Marquis, hanging by the chain. Behold the manner of it. I leaving my work on the road, the sun going to bed, the carriage of the Marquis slowly ascending the hill, he hanging by the chain—like this.”
domestication: “各位先生，我就那时候见过他，”修路工开始说，“大约是一年前，在那个夏天，我还在修路，夕阳西下的时候，看见侯爵的马车正在缓慢地爬坡，从马车底下吊着一个人，手脚悬空，就像这样儿……”
foreignization: “我那时看见他，先生们，”修路工开始说，“就在一年前，这个夏天，马车在马克的马车底下，吊在链子上。看哪，这就是事情的经过。我离开了我的工作岗位，太阳要落山了，马克的马车慢慢地爬着坡，他吊在链子上——就像这样。”

source: Towards Soho, therefore, Mr. Stryver shouldered his way from the Temple, while the bloom of the Long Vacation’s infancy was still upon it. Anybody who had seen him projecting himself into Soho while he was yet on Saint Dunstan’s side of Temple Bar, bursting in his full-blown way along the pavement, to the jostlement of all weaker people, might have seen how safe and strong he was.
domestication: 苏特威尔先生从 Inner Temple 出来，朝索霍区大步走去，刚刚开始的长假期带给这个地方一片生机。他一边走，一边伸展着他那壮实的身体，行人街上所有弱小的人都被他挤得东倒西歪。如果谁在他穿过坦普尔酒吧，进入圣邓斯坦一侧的时候看到他，就会知道他是多么的强壮有力。
foreignization: 向索霍区走去，因此，斯特莱弗先生从圣殿法学院开始他的旅程，当时长假的黎明还在照耀着那片区域。任何人见过他在圣邓斯坦教堂一侧的圣殿酒吧时，他就把自己推入索霍区，沿着人行道昂首阔步前进，以一种强有力的方式将所有弱小的人群撞开，可能已经看到了他是多么安全而强壮。

source: There was a murmur of confidence and approval, and then the man who hungered, asked: “Is this rustic to be sent back soon? I hope so. He is very simple; is he not a little dangerous?”
domestication: 大家低声议论纷纷，表示同意和赞许。这时，那个饥饿的人开口问道：“这个乡下人什么时候才能被送回去？我希望越快越好，他太过单纯了，会不会有点危险呢？”
foreignization: 有一阵轻微的自信和赞同的声音，接着那个饥饿的人问道：“这个乡下人是不是很快就要被送回去了？我希望如此。他非常简单；他不是有点危险吗？”

source: There was much commiseration for her as she was removed, and much sympathy with her father. It had evidently been a great distress to him, to have the days of his imprisonment recalled. He had shown strong internal agitation when he was questioned, and that pondering or brooding look which made him old, had been upon him, like a heavy cloud, ever since. As he passed out, the jury, who had turned back and paused a moment, spoke, through their foreman.
domestication: 大家都对她表示了同情，因为她被带走时显得很可怜，而对她父亲也很同情。很明显，他被提醒自己曾经被关押的日子时感到非常痛苦。当他被问及相关问题时，他表现出了强烈的内心动荡，从那以后，他那思绪万千、心事重重的表情使他看起来老了很多，就像有一朵乌云一直笼罩着他一样。当他离开时，陪审团成员们转过身来停顿了一下，然后通过他们的首领开口说话。
foreignization: 当她被带走时，大家对她表示了很多同情，对她的父亲也表示了很多怜悯。很明显，回忆监禁的日子对他来说是一种极大的痛苦。当他被问及相关事宜时，他表现出强烈的内心动荡，而那让他看起来衰老的沉思或痴想的表情，就像一朵厚重的乌云一样，自那以后就一直笼罩着他。 当他走出去时，陪审团成员们转过身来，稍作停留，然后通过他们的首席发言人说话。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

He had shown strong internal agitation when he was questioned, and that pondering or brooding look which made him old, had been upon him, like a heavy cloud, ever since. As he passed out, the jury, who had turned back and paused a moment, spoke, through their foreman.

source: They rested on some straw in a loft until the middle of the night, and then rode forward again when all the town was asleep. Among the many wild changes observable on familiar things which made this wild ride unreal, not the least was the seeming rarity of sleep. After long and lonely spurring over dreary roads, they would come to a cluster of poor cottages, not steeped in darkness, but all glittering with lights, and would find the people, in a ghostly manner in the dead of the night, circling hand in hand round a shrivelled tree of Liberty, or all drawn up together singing a Liberty song. Happily, however, there was sleep in Beauvais that night to help them out of it and they passed on once more into solitude and loneliness: jingling through the untimely cold and wet, among impoverished fields that had yielded no fruits of the earth that year, diversified by the blackened remains of burnt houses, and by the sudden emergence from ambuscade, and sharp reining up across their way, of patriot patrols on the watch on all the roads.
domestication: 他们在一个阁楼的稻草堆上休息到半夜，然后当整个镇子都入睡后继续出发。这个狂野的旅程中，有很多让人感到陌生的变化，让人觉得一切都不真实，其中最奇怪的是人们似乎都不睡觉。经过长时间、孤独的骑马和奔驰在荒凉的道路上，他们会遇到一簇簇破旧的小屋，不是浸没在黑暗中，而是闪烁着灯光，并会发现人们在半夜里鬼魅般地手牵手围绕着一棵枯萎的自由树跳舞，或者聚集在一起唱自由歌。幸好，那个晚上博韦城里还是有睡眠的，帮助他们度过了难关，他们再一次进入寂静和孤独：马铃声响彻寒冷潮湿的夜空，经过贫瘠的田地，那年没有收获任何作物，沿途还看到烧毁的房屋的残骸，爱国巡逻队突然从埋伏处出现，急刹车拦住了他们的去路。
foreignization: 他们在一间阁楼里的些草上休息到夜半，然后在镇上所有人都睡着后再次出发。在这次狂野的旅程中，熟悉的事物经历了许多狂野的变化，使得这次旅程显得不真实，其中最引人注目的一点是睡眠的稀少似乎是一种罕见的现象。在经过长时间和孤独的骑行过荒凉的道路之后，他们会来到一簇贫穷的小屋旁，这些小屋并没有被黑暗所笼罩，而是闪烁着灯光，他们会发现人们在死一般的夜晚，以一种鬼魅般的方式手牵手围绕着一棵枯萎的自由树，或聚集在一起唱着自由之歌。幸运的是，那个夜晚在博韦还有睡眠来帮助他们度过难关，他们一次又一次地继续前行，陷入孤独和寂寞之中：在寒冷潮湿的环境中，他们的马铃声在寂静中回荡，穿过那一年没有产出任何果实的大地，途经烧毁房屋的黑焦残骸，以及爱国者巡逻队的突然出现和急剧勒马挡住他们的去路，他们在所有的道路上都处于戒备状态。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

They rested on some straw in a loft until the middle of the night, and then rode forward again when all the town was asleep. Among the many wild changes observable on familiar things which made this wild ride unreal, not the least was the seeming rarity of sleep. After long and lonely spurring over dreary roads, they would come to a cluster of poor cottages, not steeped in darkness, but all glittering with lights, and would find the people, in a ghostly manner in the dead of the night, circling hand in hand round a shrivelled tree of Liberty, or all drawn up together singing a Liberty song. Happily, however, there was sleep in Beauvais that night to help them out of it and they passed on once more into solitude and loneliness: jingling through the untimely cold and wet, among impoverished fields that had yielded no fruits of the earth that year, diversified by the blackened remains of burnt houses, and by the sudden emergence from ambuscade, and sharp reining up across their way, of patriot patrols on the watch on all the roads.

source: “It is possible,” said the uncle, with great calmness. “For the honour of the family, I could even resolve to incommode you to that extent. Pray excuse me!”
domestication: “有可能，”叔叔很平静地说。“为了家庭的尊严，我甚至可以决定麻烦你到这种程度，请原谅我！”或者这样说：“为了家里体面，我也不能太计较了，你就委屈一下吧。”
foreignization: “这是可能的，”叔叔非常平静地说。“为了家庭的荣誉，我甚至可以决定在那方面给你带来麻烦，请原谅我！”

source: He lapsed away, even for minutes, ringing those measured changes on his hands the whole time. His eyes came slowly back, at last, to the face from which they had wandered; when they rested on it, he started, and resumed, in the manner of a sleeper that moment awake, reverting to a subject of last night.
domestication: 他渐渐地神游了，甚至有一两分钟都这样，双手一直在敲出那有节奏的变化。他的眼睛终于慢慢回到了从哪儿漫游过去的脸上；当它们重新落在那张脸上时，他突然惊醒过来，就像一个睡着的人刚醒过来一样，又开始说起昨晚的话题。
foreignization: 他渐渐离开了，甚至持续了几分钟，在这段时间里，他一直在双手上敲出那些有节奏的变化。他的眼睛慢慢地回到他凝视离开的脸上；当他的眼睛落在那张脸上时，他吓了一跳，然后继续说下去，就像一个刚醒来的睡者重新开始讨论昨晚的话题。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

He lapsed away, even for minutes, ringing those measured changes on his hands the whole time. His eyes came slowly back, at last, to the face from which they had wandered; when they rested on it, he started, and resumed, in the manner of a sleeper that moment awake, reverting to a subject of last night.

He lapsed away, even for minutes, ringing those measured changes on his hands the whole time. 他渐渐离开了，甚至持续了几分钟，在这段时间里，他一直在双手上敲出那些有节奏的变化。他的眼睛慢慢地回到他凝视离开的脸上；当他的眼睛落在那张脸上时，他吓了一跳，然后继续说下去，就像一个刚醒来的睡者重新开始讨论昨晚的话题。

source: “No, my dear, not ill. There are large drops of rain falling, and they made me start. We had better go in.”
domestication: “不，亲爱的，不是生病了。外面下雨了，雨滴落在我身上吓了我一跳，我们还是进去吧。”
foreignization: “不，亲爱的，我没事，只是下雨了，大的雨滴落下来吓了我一跳，我们最好进去。”

source: With a hope ever darkening, and with a heart always growing heavier and heavier, Mr. Lorry passed through this anxious time. The secret was well kept, and Lucie was unconscious and happy; but he could not fail to observe that the shoemaker, whose hand had been a little out at first, was growing dreadfully skilful, and that he had never been so intent on his work, and that his hands had never been so nimble and expert, as in the dusk of the ninth evening.
domestication: 洛瑞先生的心情越来越沉重，带着一丝希望和日渐加重的忧虑，他度过了这段焦急的时光。秘密被很好地保守着，露西还浑然不知，过得很幸福；但洛瑞先生还是忍不住注意到，那位鞋匠虽然一开始手法有点生疏，但现在却越来越娴熟，专注地做着他的手工，比如在第九个晚上的傍晚，他的手法从未如此灵活和娴熟。
foreignization: 怀着越来越黑暗的希望和越来越沉重的心，洛里先生度过了这段焦虑的时期。这个秘密被很好地保守着，露西无知无觉且幸福；但他不禁注意到鞋匠一开始有点不擅长的手正变得可怕地娴熟，他从未如此专心地工作，他的手也从未像在第九个晚上黄昏时那样敏捷和娴熟。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

With a hope ever darkening, and with a heart always growing heavier and heavier, Mr. Lorry passed through this anxious time. The secret was well kept, and Lucie was unconscious and happy; but he could not fail to observe that the shoemaker, whose hand had been a little out at first, was growing dreadfully skilful, and that he had never been so intent on his work, and that his hands had never been so nimble and expert, as in the dusk of the ninth evening.
洛瑞先生的心情越来越沉重，带着一丝希望和日渐加重的忧虑，他度过了这段焦急的时光。秘密被很好地保守着，露西还浑然不知，过得很幸福；但洛瑞先生还是忍不住注意到，那位鞋匠虽然一开始手法有点生疏，但现在却越来越娴熟，专注地做着他的手工，比如在第九个晚上的傍晚，他的手法从未如此灵活和娴熟。

With a hope ever darkening, and with a heart always growing heavier and heavier, Mr. Lorry passed through this anxious time. The secret was well kept, and Lucie was unconscious and happy; but he could not fail to observe that the shoemaker, whose hand had been a little out at first, was growing dreadfully skilful, and that he had never been so intent on his work, and that his hands had never been so nimble and expert, as in the dusk of the ninth evening.
怀着越来越黑暗的希望和越来越沉重的心，洛里先生度过了这段焦虑的时期。这个秘密被很好地保守着，露西无知无觉且幸福；但他不禁注意到鞋匠一开始有点不擅长的手正变得可怕地娴熟，他从未如此专心地工作，他的手也从未像在第九个晚上黄昏时那样敏捷和娴熟。

source: Having said it, he passed behind the little counter, and stood with his hand on the back of his wife’s chair, looking over that barrier at the person to whom they were both opposed, and whom either of them would have shot with the greatest satisfaction.
domestication: 说完了，他从小柜台后面走过去，站在他老婆的椅子背后，把手搭在椅背上，从那道"防线"上看着他们共同的敌人。如果可以的话，他们两人都愿意开枪打死这个人。
foreignization: 说完后，他从小柜台后面走过，站在他妻子的椅子背后，用手扶着椅背，从屏障那边看着他们两人共同反对的人，如果可以的话，他们两人都会很高兴地向这个人开枪。

Having said it, he passed behind the little counter, and stood with his hand on the back of his wife’s chair, looking over that barrier at the person to whom they were both opposed, and whom either of them would have shot with the greatest satisfaction.
说完了，他从小柜台后面走过去，站在他老婆的椅子背后，把手搭在椅背上，从那道"防线"上看着他们共同的敌人。如果可以的话，他们两人都愿意开枪打死这个人。

Having said it, he passed behind the little counter, and stood with his hand on the back of his wife’s chair, looking over that barrier at the person to whom they were both opposed, and whom either of them would have shot with the greatest satisfaction.

source: The Dover mail was in its usual genial position that the guard suspected the passengers, the passengers suspected one another and the guard, they all suspected everybody else, and the coachman was sure of nothing but the horses; as to which cattle he could with a clear conscience have taken his oath on the two Testaments that they were not fit for the journey.
domestication: 多佛邮车正处于它惯常的状态，一个令人感到焦虑的氛围笼罩着所有人。乘客们互相怀疑，守卫也在观察他们，大家都对彼此保持警惕。只有马车夫对什么都不置可否，只有他对马的状况了如指掌，但可惜的是，他可以发誓，这几匹马已经不适合再上路了。
foreignization: 多佛邮车正处于它通常的状态中，守卫怀疑乘客，乘客们互相怀疑，并怀疑守卫，他们都怀疑其他所有人，而马车夫对除了马之外的一切都没有把握；至于这些牲口，他可以以明确的良心发誓，在两个《圣经》上宣誓说它们不适合这次旅程。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Dover mail was in its usual genial position that the guard suspected the passengers, the passengers suspected one another and the guard, they all suspected everybody else, and the coachman was sure of nothing but the horses; as to which cattle he could with a clear conscience have taken his oath on the two Testaments that they were not fit for the journey.
多佛邮车正处于它惯常的状态，一个令人感到焦虑的氛围笼罩着所有人。乘客们互相怀疑，守卫也在观察他们，大家都对彼此保持警惕。只有马车夫对什么都不置可否，只有他对马的状况了如指掌，但可惜的是，他可以发誓，这几匹马已经不适合再上路了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The Dover mail was in its usual genial position that the guard suspected the passengers, the passengers suspected one another and the guard, they all suspected everybody else, and the coachman was sure of nothing but the horses; as to which cattle he could with a clear conscience have taken his oath on the two Testaments that they were not fit for the journey.
多佛邮车正处于它通常的状态中，守卫怀疑乘客，乘客们互相怀疑，并怀疑守卫，他们都怀疑其他所有人，而马车夫对除了马之外的一切都没有把握；至于这些牲口，他可以以明确的良心发誓，在两个《圣经》上宣誓说它们不适合这次旅程。

source: “That’s right, that’s right. Courage! Business! You have business before you; useful business. Miss Manette, your mother took this course with you. And when she died—I believe broken-hearted—having never slackened her unavailing search for your father, she left you, at two years old, to grow to be blooming, beautiful, and happy, without the dark cloud upon you of living in uncertainty whether your father soon wore his heart out in prison, or wasted there through many lingering years.”
domestication: 没错没错，为了找到父亲，你必须要有胆量！这是一件大事，值得你去做的。曼妮特小姐，你的母亲当年也是这么做的。她一直在寻找你的父亲，直到去世。我相信，她是心死了。尽管她始终没有放弃寻找你的父亲，但还是没能活着看到这一天。当她离开人世的时候，你才只有两岁。她希望你能长大后幸福美满，不用承担起对父亲下落不明的忧虑，不用整日担心父亲是不是还在监狱里苦苦挣扎。
foreignization: “就是这样，就是这样。勇气！事情！你面前有事情要处理；有用的事情。曼妮特小姐，你的母亲和你一起走过了这条路。而当她去世时——我相信是因为心碎——她一直没有放弃寻找你父亲的徒劳无功的搜索，她把你留下，两岁的时候，让你在没有你父亲可能很快就在监狱里消耗掉他的心，或是在那里慢慢消耗掉的许多年中的不确定性的黑云下长大，开朗，美丽，幸福。”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“That’s right, that’s right. Courage! Business! You have business before you; useful business. Miss Manette, your mother took this course with you. And when she died—I believe broken-hearted—having never slackened her unavailing search for your father, she left you, at two years old, to grow to be blooming, beautiful, and happy, without the dark cloud upon you of living in uncertainty whether your father soon wore his heart out in prison, or wasted there through many lingering years.”
没错没错，为了找到父亲，你必须要有胆量！这是一件大事，值得你去做的。曼妮特小姐，你的母亲当年也是这么做的。她一直在寻找你的父亲，直到去世。我相信，她是心死了。尽管她始终没有放弃寻找你的父亲，但还是没能活着看到这一天。当她离开人世的时候，你才只有两岁。她希望你能长大后幸福美满，不用承担起对父亲下落不明的忧虑，不用整日担心父亲是不是还在监狱里苦苦挣扎。

And when she died—I believe broken-hearted—having never slackened her unavailing search for your father, she left you, at two years old, to grow to be blooming, beautiful, and happy, without the dark cloud upon you of living in uncertainty whether your father soon wore his heart out in prison, or wasted there through many lingering years.”
“就是这样，就是这样。勇气！事情！你面前有事情要处理；有用的事情。曼妮特小姐，你的母亲和你一起走过了这条路。而当她去世时——我相信是因为心碎——她一直没有放弃寻找你父亲的徒劳无功的搜索，她把你留下，两岁的时候，让你在没有你父亲可能很快就在监狱里消耗掉他的心，或是在那里慢慢消耗掉的许多年中的不确定性的黑云下长大，开朗，美丽，幸福。”

source: A bottle of good claret after dinner does a digger in the red coals no harm, otherwise than as it has a tendency to throw him out of work. Mr. Lorry had been idle a long time, and had just poured out his last glassful of wine with as complete an appearance of satisfaction as is ever to be found in an elderly gentleman of a fresh complexion who has got to the end of a bottle, when a rattling of wheels came up the narrow street, and rumbled into the inn-yard.
domestication: 吃完饭后喝一瓶好红酒，对在火红的煤堆旁挖坑的人来说并没有坏处，除非这会让他失业。洛里先生已经闲置了很长时间，他刚刚倒出最后一杯酒，脸上带着极其满足的表情，就像一个皮肤白皙的老人喝完一瓶酒一样。当时，狭窄的街道上传来一阵轮子的隆隆声，接着驶入了客栈的院子。
foreignization: 晚饭后喝一瓶好赤霞珠对正在红炭中劳作的人是没有坏处的，除非它使他失业。洛里先生已经闲置了一段长时间，并且刚刚倒出他最后一杯酒，带着完全的满足感，这种满足感可以在一个皮肤白皙的老先生喝完一瓶酒时找到，当马车轮子的响声沿着狭窄的街道驶来，隆隆地驶入客栈院子。

source: “Ah!” said Carton, with a careless wave of his hand, as if he waved that away. “On the drunken occasion in question (one of a large number, as you know), I was insufferable about liking you, and not liking you. I wish you would forget it.”
domestication: 卡通耸了耸肩，漫不经心地挥了挥手，好像要把这件事赶走似的。“那天醉酒闹事（你知道的，就像往常一样），我对你的态度很糟糕，忽而喜欢你，忽而又讨厌你。希望你能忘掉那回事。”
foreignization: “啊！”卡通带着一副漫不经心的样子挥了挥手，就好像要把这件事挥走似的。“在当时的那次醉酒事件中（你知道的，这仅是众多此类事件中的一个），我对你表现得非常难以忍受，我时而喜欢你，时而又不喜欢你。我希望你能忘记那件事。”

“Ah!” said Carton, with a careless wave of his hand, as if he waved that away. “On the drunken occasion in question (one of a large number, as you know), I was insufferable about liking you, and not liking you. I wish you would forget it.”

“啊！”卡通带着一副漫不经心的样子挥了挥手，就好像要把这件事挥走似的。“在当时的那次醉酒事件中（你知道的，这仅是众多此类事件中的一个），我对你表现得非常难以忍受，我时而喜欢你，时而又不喜欢你。我希望你能忘记那件事。”

source: His bloated gaoler, who wore spectacles to read with, glanced over them to assure himself that he had taken his place, and went through the list, making a similar short pause at each name. There were twenty-three names, but only twenty were responded to; for one of the prisoners so summoned had died in gaol and been forgotten, and two had already been guillotined and forgotten. The list was read, in the vaulted chamber where Darnay had seen the associated prisoners on the night of his arrival. Every one of those had perished in the massacre; every human creature he had since cared for and parted with, had died on the scaffold.
domestication: 他那个面目狰狞的狱卒戴着眼镜，扫视了犯人一圈，确认每个人都到齐后，开始宣读名单，每念一个名字就停顿片刻。名单上有二十三个名字，但只有人应答了二十个，因为其中一个被叫到的囚犯已经在监狱里死了，还有两个已经被砍头了，都被遗忘得一干二净。宣读名单的地点是在那天达纳里到来时见过的与其他囚犯聚集的拱形大厅里。那个时候在一起的所有人，都已在大屠杀中丧生了；之后他又关心和分别过的每一个人，都已死在断头台上。
foreignization: 他那肥胖的看守戴着眼镜来阅读，朝他瞥了一眼，以确保他就位，然后读遍了名单，在每个名字处都停顿片刻。名单上有二十三个名字，但只有二十个名字得到了回应；因为被传唤的囚犯之一在监狱里死了，被遗忘了，还有两个已经被断头台处决并且被遗忘了。名单是在拱形大殿中宣读的，达纳伊曾在到达的那晚见过在一起的囚犯。那些人都在大屠杀中丧生；他以后所关心和分别的每一个人类，都死在了断头台上。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

His bloated gaoler, who wore spectacles to read with, glanced over them to assure himself that he had taken his place, and went through the list, making a similar short pause at each name. There were twenty-three names, but only twenty were responded to; for one of the prisoners so summoned had died in gaol and been forgotten, and two had already been guillotined and forgotten. The list was read, in the vaulted chamber where Darnay had seen the associated prisoners on the night of his arrival. Every one of those had perished in the massacre; every human creature he had since cared for and parted with, had died on the scaffold.
他那个面目狰狞的狱卒戴着眼镜，扫视了犯人一圈，确认每个人都到齐后，开始宣读名单，每念一个名字就停顿片刻。名单上有二十三个名字，但只有人应答了二十个，因为其中一个被叫到的囚犯已经在监狱里死了，还有两个已经被砍头了，都被遗忘得一干二净。宣读名单的地点是在那天达纳里到来时见过的与其他囚犯聚集的拱形大厅里。那个时候在一起的所有人，都已在大屠杀中丧生了；之后他又关心和分别过的每一个人，都已死在断头台上。

source: “Look well upon that gentleman, my learned friend there,” pointing to him who had tossed the paper over, “and then look well upon the prisoner. How say you? Are they very like each other?”
domestication: "好好看看那位先生，我的朋友，”他指着扔纸的人说，“然后再看看被告。你觉得呢？他们长得很像吗？”
foreignization: “仔细看看那位先生，我的博学的朋友那里，”指着那个扔过纸的人说，“然后仔细看看被告。你们说什么？他们彼此非常相像吗？”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

"好好看看那位先生，我的朋友，”他指着扔纸的人说，“然后再看看被告。你觉得呢？他们长得很像吗？”

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Look well upon that gentleman, my learned friend there,” pointing to him who had tossed the paper over, “and then look well upon the prisoner. How say you? Are they very like each other?”
“仔细看看那位先生，我的博学的朋友那里，”指着那个扔过纸的人说，“然后仔细看看被告。你们说什么？他们彼此非常相像吗？”

source: “Since the state of your mind that you describe, is, at all events, attributable to some influence of mine—this is what I mean, if I can make it plain—can I use no influence to serve you? Have I no power for good, with you, at all?”
domestication: 你说的那种心境，如果我理解得没错的话，肯定是受了我的影响。我的意思是说，如果我能让你明白我的意思——那我就不能利用这种影响来帮助你吗？难道我在你眼里一点好处都没有吗？
foreignization: “由于你描述的你的心情，不管怎么说，是可以归因于我某种影响的——我的意思是，如果我能让它变得清楚的话——我就不能利用这种影响来帮助你吗？我在你面前就没有任何好处的力量吗？”

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Since the state of your mind that you describe, is, at all events, attributable to some influence of mine—this is what I mean, if I can make it plain—can I use no influence to serve you? Have I no power for good, with you, at all?”
你说的那种心境，如果我理解得没错的话，肯定是受了我的影响。我的意思是说，如果我能让你明白我的意思——那我就不能利用这种影响来帮助你吗？难道我在你眼里一点好处都没有吗？

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

“Since the state of your mind that you describe, is, at all events, attributable to some influence of mine—this is what I mean, if I can make it plain—can I use no influence to serve you? Have I no power for good, with you, at all?”
“由于你描述的你的心情，不管怎么说，是可以归因于我某种影响的——我的意思是，如果我能让它变得清楚的话——我就不能利用这种影响来帮助你吗？我在你面前就没有任何好处的力量吗？”

source: A shrill sound of laughter and of amused voices—voices of men, women, and children—resounded in the street while this wine game lasted. There was little roughness in the sport, and much playfulness. There was a special companionship in it, an observable inclination on the part of every one to join some other one, which led, especially among the luckier or lighter-hearted, to frolicsome embraces, drinking of healths, shaking of hands, and even joining of hands and dancing, a dozen together. When the wine was gone, and the places where it had been most abundant were raked into a gridiron-pattern by fingers, these demonstrations ceased, as suddenly as they had broken out. The man who had left his saw sticking in the firewood he was cutting, set it in motion again; the women who had left on a door-step the little pot of hot ashes, at which she had been trying to soften the pain in her own starved fingers and toes, or in those of her child, returned to it; men with bare arms, matted locks, and cadaverous faces, who had emerged into the winter light from cellars, moved away, to descend again; and a gloom gathered on the scene that appeared more natural to it than sunshine.
domestication: 一阵刺耳的笑声和欢快的声音，男女老少的声音，在街道上回荡，这是因为这场酒局游戏一直持续到现在。游戏中几乎没有粗暴的行为，只有玩乐的气氛。每个人都想和别人一起玩，这种特别的友谊，让幸运或者心情轻松的人们，相互拥抱，祝酒，握手，甚至牵手跳舞，一起跳成一片。酒喝完了，人们用手指在地上划出格子花纹的样子，欢乐的气氛戛然而止，就像突然爆发出来一样迅速消失。那个正在劈柴的男人，又继续挥动着锯子，那些女人回到门口的热灰锅旁，为自己或孩子冰冷的手脚缓解疼痛。而那些从地下室里走出来，光着胳膊，头发蓬乱，面色苍白的男人，也渐渐散去，重新回到黑暗之中。街头的气氛一下子变得阴郁起来，好像黑暗才是这里更自然的景象。
foreignization: 刺耳的笑声和愉快的声音——男人、女人和孩子们的声音——在街上回荡着，当时这场酒游戏还在继续。 这个游戏中几乎没有粗鲁的行为，充满了玩闹的气氛。 在游戏中有一种特殊的伴侣关系，每个人都有加入另一个人的倾向，特别是在那些更幸运或心情更轻松的人中，这导致他们之间发生嬉戏的拥抱，祝酒，握手，甚至牵手跳舞，一起跳舞的人多达十二个。 当酒喝完后，酒最丰富的地方被手指抠成格子形，表演突然停止，就像它们突然爆发一样。 那个把锯子留在他正在劈的柴火中的男人，又继续使用它；那个把小锅热灰留在门阶上的女人，她曾试图缓解自己和孩子饥饿的手指和脚趾的疼痛，现在回到小锅旁；一些光着手臂、头发凌乱、面容憔悴的男人，他们从地窖里走出来，现入冬日的阳光下，又离开了，重新下降；阴郁的气氛笼罩了现场，这种气氛似乎比阳光更加自然。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

A shrill sound of laughter and of amused voices—voices of men, women, and children—resounded in the street while this wine game lasted. There was little roughness in the sport, and much playfulness. There was a special companionship in it, an observable inclination on the part of every one to join some other one, which led, especially among the luckier or lighter-hearted, to frolicsome embraces, drinking of healths, shaking of hands, and even joining of hands and dancing, a dozen together. When the wine was gone, and the places where it had been most abundant were raked into a gridiron-pattern by fingers, these demonstrations ceased, as suddenly as they had broken out. The man who had left his saw sticking in the firewood he was cutting, set it in motion again; the women who had left on a door-step the little pot of hot ashes, at which she had been trying to soften the pain in her own starved fingers and toes, or in those of her child, returned to it; men with bare arms, matted locks, and cadaverous faces, who had emerged into the winter light from cellars, moved away, to descend again; and a gloom gathered on the scene that appeared more natural to it than sunshine.

source: Within a few minutes, Miss Pross stood whispering at his side. If he had had any particle of doubt left, her talk would of necessity have resolved it; but he was by that time clear-headed, and had none. He advised that they should let the time go by until the regular breakfast-hour, and should then meet the Doctor as if nothing unusual had occurred. If he appeared to be in his customary state of mind, Mr. Lorry would then cautiously proceed to seek direction and guidance from the opinion he had been, in his anxiety, so anxious to obtain.
domestication: 过了几分钟，普罗斯小姐悄悄地走到他身边，低声说话。如果他当时还有一丝疑虑的话，她的话肯定能让他豁然开朗。但他已经头脑清醒，没有任何疑惑。他建议他们就这么等着，直到正常的早餐时间，然后像没事一样去见医生。如果医生看起来还是一如既往的心态，洛里先生就会谨慎地寻求他一直非常渴望得到的意见来指导自己。
foreignization: 在几分钟之内，普洛小姐站在他身边低声细语。如果他还剩下任何疑虑，她的谈话必然会消除它，但他当时头脑清醒，没有任何疑虑。他建议他们等到通常的早餐时间，然后像什么都没发生一样与医生见面。如果他看起来处于他平常的精神状态，洛里先生就会谨慎地寻求他曾经非常渴望得到的意见的指引和指导。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Within a few minutes, Miss Pross stood whispering at his side. If he had had any particle of doubt left, her talk would of necessity have resolved it; but he was by that time clear-headed, and had none. He advised that they should let the time go by until the regular breakfast-hour, and should then meet the Doctor as if nothing unusual had occurred. If he appeared to be in his customary state of mind, Mr. Lorry would then cautiously proceed to seek direction and guidance from the opinion he had been, in his anxiety, so anxious to obtain.
过了几分钟，普罗斯小姐悄悄地走到他身边，低声说话。如果他当时还有一丝疑虑的话，她的话肯定能让他豁然开朗。但他已经头脑清醒，没有任何疑惑。他建议他们就这么等着，直到正常的早餐时间，然后像没事一样去见医生。如果医生看起来还是一如既往的心态，洛里先生就会谨慎地寻求他一直非常渴望得到的意见来指导自己。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Within a few minutes, Miss Pross stood whispering at his side. If he had had any particle of doubt left, her talk would of necessity have resolved it; but he was by that time clear-headed, and had none. He advised that they should let the time go by until the regular breakfast-hour, and should then meet the Doctor as if nothing unusual had occurred. If he appeared to be in his customary state of mind, Mr. Lorry would then cautiously proceed to seek direction and guidance from the opinion he had been, in his anxiety, so anxious to obtain.
在几分钟之内，普洛小姐站在他身边低声细语。如果他还剩下任何疑虑，她的谈话必然会消除它，但他当时头脑清醒，没有任何疑虑。他建议他们等到通常的早餐时间，然后像什么都没发生一样与医生见面。如果他看起来处于他平常的精神状态，洛里先生就会谨慎地寻求他曾经非常渴望得到的意见的指引和指导。

source: Confused by the emotion of the day, and feeling his being there with this Double of coarse deportment, to be like a dream, Charles Darnay was at a loss how to answer; finally, answered not at all.
domestication: 这一天的情绪波动让他感到迷茫，他感觉自己站在那里，就像一场梦境一般，面对这种粗鲁的态度，查尔斯·丹雷无从应答，最后干脆没有回答。
foreignization: 被这一天的情绪所困惑，并且感觉到自己在那里有着这种粗鲁举止的双重性，就像在做梦一样，查尔斯·达纳依无所适从，不知道如何回答；最后，根本没有回答。

source: They had said little, though they had been there a long time. When it was yet light enough to work and read, she had neither engaged herself in her usual work, nor had she read to him. She had employed herself in both ways, at his side under the tree, many and many a time; but, this time was not quite like any other, and nothing could make it so.
domestication: 他们虽然在那里待了很长时间，却说了很少的话。当天还亮得足以工作和阅读时，她既没有做她的通常工作，也没有为他读书。在树下陪伴他的时候，她曾无数次这样做过；但这次与以往不同，什么都无法改变这一点。她只是静静地坐在他身边，两人之间弥漫着一股低沉的气氛，仿佛在等待着什么事情的发生。
foreignization: 他们虽然在那里待了很长时间，但说的话很少。当仍然有足够的光线可以工作和阅读时，她既没有从事她平常的工作，也没有为他朗读。她曾多次在树下的他身边这样做过两种事情；但这次与以往任何一次都不太一样，没有什么能使它变得相同。
